- Yanfei's father is an illuminated beast, while her mother is an ordinary mortal merchant. Born into peaceful times, Yanfei did not sign a contract with Rex Lapis, but instead has one with her parents to "live happily."\nAs Liyue's leading legal exegete, she is no stranger to exploiting some existing loopholes in the law — at times for herself, and sometimes for others.\nIt has been made clear often enough that Yanfei is not a stickler for the rules and has no wish to be shackled by strictures.\nStill, she contributes to the betterment of Liyue as she seeks her own pleasure, and will not use these loopholes for ill.\nWhen making amendments to legal loopholes each year, Ningguang the Tianquan will often study Yanfei's doings, as if she were Liyue's unofficial legal troubleshooter.\nIn a sense, one could argue that Yanfei makes the laws better at the lowest possible price... This principle is also the reason why she has never been convicted of exploiting any such loopholes.\nYanfei believes in "no structure without laws," and what she wishes for is to "live as one pleases without overstepping."\nEveryone in Liyue, adeptus or mortal, protects it in their own way.\nThat is why Yanfei possesses a Vision, one that is of equal weight to her principles. ｜ 烟绯的父亲是仙兽，母亲则是普通的商人。降生在和平时期的烟绯并未与岩王帝君签订契约，只与父母约定「要快乐地生活」。\n她是璃月港头牌法典解读专家，自然也会利用法典存在的疏漏，有时是为了自己，有时是为了他人。\n种种迹象表明，烟绯并不是一个循规蹈矩的人，她并不希望被规则束缚。\n可她在追求自身快乐的同时也在让璃月变得更好，会利用法典的疏漏却不会以此作恶。\n「天权」凝光每年对法典进行查漏补缺时，会大量参考烟绯的所作所为，仿佛烟绯就是璃月法典的问题质检员。\n从某种程度来说，烟绯在以最小的代价，让规则变得更加完善…这也是她从未因利用法典漏洞获罪的原因。\n烟绯信奉的是「没有规矩不成方圆」，而她期望的则是「随心所欲不逾矩」。\n璃月的仙人与凡人，都在用自己的方式守护着璃月。\n所以烟绯也拥有神之眼——而且她的神之眼，与她信奉的「规则」等价。

- See you. ｜ 再见。
- But Tighnari said that we're not anything like an academic family. He wouldn't write joint papers with us... ｜ 你知道吗，提纳里说我们不是学术家庭。他都不跟我们一起写论文。

- Kachina's become your companion!\nWhen she uses her Elemental Skill, she will enter Nightsoul's Blessing and summon Turbo Twirly to fight alongside her.\nIf the Hold Mode of her Elemental Skill is used, or she uses it while Turbo Twirly is on the field, she will ride Turbo Twirly and gain the ability to move and climb quickly. ｜ 卡齐娜成为一起同行的伙伴了！\n卡齐娜施放元素战技后会进入夜魂加持状态，召唤冲天转转一同战斗。\n长按施放或是在冲天转转在场时再次施放，卡齐娜将会搭乘冲天转转，借此快速移动与攀爬。

- Every time an Overloaded, Superconduct, Swirl, or Crystallize reaction is triggered, a DMG Bonus will be gained based on the triggering Element. The DMG Bonus from these 4 reaction types have independent timers and can stack with each other. Max <color=#f39000>{2}</color> stacks. Each stack will increase DMG by {0} and each stack lasts <color=#f39000>{1}</color>s. If you have already obtained a stack before, triggering its effect again will reset the duration remaining to <color=#f39000>{1}</color>s. Complete the <color=#E56378>Plunder</color> challenge during the trial to increase the DMG Bonus gained from each stack. ｜ 每次触发超载/超导/扩散/结晶反应时，依所触发元素反应不同，可分别获取一层伤害提升效果。四种反应提升效果相互叠加且独立计时，最多可叠加<color=#f39000>{2}</color>层。每层会使伤害提升{0}。每层效果持续<color=#f39000>{1}</color>秒；若已获得该层效果，触发对应反应时刷新其持续时间至<color=#f39000>{1}</color>秒。在试炼中完成<color=#E56378>「劫掠」</color>的挑战，可以使每层提升的伤害提升进一步增加。

- Weapon Ascension Material.\nIn the years when the golden shroud covered the land, pure spring water had to be hidden away in concealed mountain streams, and the Lochknights were born in these sanctuaries.\nThe knights swear by armor of silver, to protect the spirits born from pure water, to protect their fellows who also keep faith in the one true font, resisting the omnipresent golden power that blotted out the sky and outshone the sun.\nBut that is an ancient legend... Not long after the empire collapsed and sank, the knights who resisted the usurper shed their armor, and their stories were hidden in a tangled web of stories and ballads. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n在黄金之衾覆盖国土的岁月里，纯真的泉水不得不藏匿于隐秘山涧，「纯水骑士」便是在这些避难所中诞生的。\n骑士们以白银的甲胄为誓，守护着来自纯水的精灵，守卫着同样信赖唯一源泉的乡亲，抵抗遮天蔽日的黄金之权。\n那是很久以前的传说了…在帝国崩毁沉没之后不久，抵抗僭主的骑士们也卸下甲胄，其故事隐入了庞杂的故事歌谣之中。

- A tall, straight, lavender-colored Sakura Tree with a graceful posture. The trunk is exceptionally sturdy, and the blossoms and leaves are known for their "indecisive" color, sometimes appearing redder, other times appearing bluer.\nThe Sakura Tree is known as a tree of limitless inspiration. A common motif in Inazuma's folk stories is that whenever a writer suffers from writer's block, they will walk around a tall Sakura Tree, with whose hues they share an affinity in their moment of creative indecision. In just nine steps, a creative idea will drop into their mind like a falling Sakura blossom. This is how the tall Sakura Tree earned its name of "Between Nine Steps." ｜ 浅紫红色的樱树，高大挺拔，树姿优美，树干格外粗壮，花瓣与叶片的色彩呈现出浅淡的「踯躅色」。\n樱树被誉为灵感郁集之树。在稻妻的民间佳话中，文豪们的创作思路受阻时，常常环绕高大的樱树踱步，只需九步，即可找到花瓣飘落般的细腻文思。因此，这种高大的樱树也有着「九步踯躅间」的美称。

- It was that man who gave Razor his name.\nThe simple Wolf Boy could not understand the intricacies of human language, but he knew from the look on the man's face when he produced this sound that the man was giving him a name.\n"Rae-zer."\nThe shadows cast by the trees of Wolvendom grew short, and then grew long again.\nThe man taught Razor how to swing a sword. Unwieldy though this steel claw may be, thought Razor, it was at least sharp enough to cut through tree branches.\n"Now you can protect your friends."\n"Fr-ren-dzz..."\nRazor imitated the sounds the man made, without understanding what they meant.\nSimilarly, he did not understand why the names of things were all that important in the first place. After all, he never learned the name of that man before he left. ｜ 「雷泽」这个名字，是那个男人为他取的。\n单纯的狼少年还无法理解人类的语言，却隐约从男人脸上读懂了含义——这是男人赠予自己的称呼。\n「雷，泽。」\n奔狼领的树影从长变短，又从短变长。\n男人教会了雷泽挥舞剑的方法。笨重的「铁爪子」，却锐利到连树木都能劈断。\n「今后，也要保护好你的朋友。」\n「朋，友。」\n雷泽笨拙地重复着男人吐出的音节。他还不太明白他的意思。\n就像他也不明白名字到底算不算重要的东西。因为直到那个男人离开，雷泽都未能从他口中获知他的「名字」。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Five Flushes of Fortune: Event Rules</color>\nDuring this event, you can claim the Kurious Kamera from Ji Tong.\nThis Kurious Kamera can be equipped via the Gadget tab in your Inventory, and equipping it will allow you to take certain special photographs...\nThere will be a different photo subject on each day of the event. When photographing these subjects, you will receive photographs of different colors. You have 10 sheets of film each day with which to take photos.\nCollect photos of 5 different colors (Crimson, Ultramarine, Pale Gold, Ocher, and Purple Aster) and exchange them with Ji Tong for a Fortune Trove, thus claiming the rewards within. A total of 8 Fortune Troves can be claimed during this period.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Five Flushes of Fortune: Photo Swap</color>\nDuring the event, you can swap photos with a friend.\nYou can have a total of 50 unclaimed photos at any one time. Once you exceed 50 unclaimed photos, they will be deleted from your possession in order of when they were taken, beginning with the earliest unclaimed photo.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Five Flushes of Fortune: Event Duration</color>\nThe photography event will last a total of 7 days. After the event ends, the Kurious Kamera will no longer be able to take any photos.\nThe Fortune Trove exchange will last 10 days.\nJi Tong may have other tasks that require the services of the Kurious Kamera even after the event has ended... ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【福至五彩·活动规则】</color>\n活动期间，可以从季同处领取道具：「奇特的『留影机』」。\n奇特的「留影机」可以从背包中的「小道具」分类处装备。装备后，可以进行特殊的摄影…\n活动期间，每天会有不同的指定拍摄对象。拍摄这些对象时，可随机获得一张不同颜色的「相片」。每天拥有10张底片以供拍摄。\n集齐五种颜色的相片（朱红、群青、薄金、深赭、紫苑）后，能在季同处换取「福至宝匣」，得到其中的奖品。\n活动期间，至多可以换取8个福至宝匣。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【福至五彩·相片互赠】</color>\n活动期间，可以与好友互赠双方持有的相片。\n同时最多保留50张未领取的相片。当未领取的相片超过50张时，会依照相片获得顺序，将较早获赠但尚未领取的相片销毁。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【福至五彩·活动周期】</color>\n福至五彩拍摄活动持续7天。活动结束后，奇特的「留影机」将无法再进行拍摄。\n福至宝匣兑换持续10天。\n活动结束后，季同或许有其他的任务，能让「奇特的『留影机』」发挥作用…
- Oh boy, here we go again... ｜ 又开始了…
- Don't open it, now. A surprise must look the part. ｜ 可别打开看了啊，惊喜就要有惊喜的样子。
- That's exactly what I want. ｜ 这正是我需要的。
- Reach the top of the tower and collect the Light Actuator component within %1% second(s) ｜ 在%1%秒内到达塔顶获取导光部件
- Ahh... well... how can I put this, just before you two arrived, we received an order... ｜ 这个…怎么说呢，就在二位到来之前，我们刚刚接到订单…
- That said, I really don't know how to cook Sakura Blooms... I'm not sure how chefs in Inazuma handle them. ｜ 不过，这个什么绯樱绣球我是真不知道怎么入菜…不知道稻妻那边的厨师会怎么处理。
- Yeah, he started trying to build a flying machine right after he got back from the Flower-Feather Clan. ｜ 是，差不多就是从花羽会回来之后，他开始研究用人造物飞向天空的方法…
- Lost Specters Defeated: #1#/%1% ｜ 击败迷路的飘浮灵：#1#/%1%
- Whoa, Paimon, manners... ｜ 注意点吃相…
- Ahem! Come on, let's look around. I think this place is perfect for a group photo. ｜ 咳！来吧，咱们去周围逛逛，我觉得这里肯定很适合来一张合影。
- A stall made from High-quality Otogi Wood, from which products derived from light novel plots are sold during festivals.\nYae Publishing House does not spend all that much on developing derivative products, and such things are usually selected from amongst the popular light novels of the day. As such, the things sold are always a "surprise," thus the name "kiban." ｜ 良品「御伽木」所筑的屋台，在至为热闹的祭典上出售轻小说的衍生商品。\n由于「八重堂」并不会在衍生商品上投入太多资金，制作的衍生商品大多是从热门轻小说角色中随机选取的，每次的结果都出人意料，因此，这类商品被称为「奇番」。
- Right, Paimon's been thinking about that, too. "Mary-Ann" said that your birth was a "beautiful accident." What does that mean? ｜ 对了，之前我也很在意。「玛丽安」说，「你的诞生是一个美好的意外」，这是什么意思呀？
- When used, a Creeping Barrage will be released at the current character's location that slowly expands outwards.\nThe Creeping Barrage will <color=#F39000>launch all characters it hits</color> into the air. All characters who are <color=#F39000>knocked airborne in this way</color> will lose a certain amount of Adventure Coins. ｜ 使用此道具后，将在当前角色的位置释放一道缓慢向外扩大范围的弹幕波。\n弹幕波：<color=#F39000>击飞</color>命中的所有角色。另外，所有<color=#F39000>被击飞</color>的角色将损失一定数量的冒险币。
- I apologize if I get a little excited at times. Please understand. ｜ …嗯，对不起。如果我的语气忍不住雀跃起来，还请不要在意。
- Destroy the hilichurl towers ｜ 摧毁丘丘人哨塔
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启

- Some contamination cores have attack capabilities. Pay attention to your HP when clearing them out. ｜ 一些污染核心具有攻击能力。清除这些污染核心时要留意生命值。
- Another Person's Message ｜ 另一人留言
- Because she saved me. The love I have for her is the same I have for my parents. ｜ 因为是她「拯救」了我。在我心里，我对她的敬爱，就像对爸爸妈妈一样多。
- Hmph, as if you understand the situation, Pale Floater. These Fravashi Trees are Pari that fought till the very end against the defilement that had been corrupting the land. Using the last remnants of their power, they transformed into this state that you see now. ｜ 哼，白飘飘知道什么，这些「灵谷木」乃是那些与侵害大地的污秽战斗到最后一刻的花灵，用尽最后的力量所化而成的。

- Honestly, I'm not familiar with fishing regulations. But if you merely want to go out on the water, my first suggestion would be to get yourself a proper boat. ｜ 老实说，我对钓鱼不了解。但如果您想要漂在水上的话，我的建议是…不如去弄一艘正式的船？
- Your recent feats have been doing the rounds, you know. In my brigade alone, a lot of people have been talking about the things you've achieved. I've even had several people ask me if I can introduce them to you. ｜ 你最近可是大显身手啊，我所在的佣兵团里都有不少人一直在讲你的事迹，甚至还有几个人来问我，能不能向你引见一下他们。
- I've got other things to do at the moment... ｜ 还有别的事…
- I was just trying to scare you, y'know... Didn't think you'd get me instead. ｜ 本来只是想吓吓你的我反而被吓到了哦。

- I inherited her memories. As for other things, please forgive me. I cannot speak of them yet. ｜ 我继承了她的记忆。但别的事情，请二位原谅，现在还没到说的时候。
- A Lil' Fungus based on Blitzara, who teamed up with a certain "Fried Tofu With All the Frills" and won third place in the previous tournament. It specializes in dealing Electro DMG and in decreasing opponents' DEF. It will prove a worthy spearhead in your battles. ｜ 以上次大赛并列季军「玲珑油豆腐」选手的「百雷遮罗」为原型的「小小灵蕈」，擅长以极高频率造成雷元素伤害，并降低对手的防御力，足以在进攻中扮演矛尖的角色。
- Xigu Antiques isn't open yet... ｜ 古董行还没开门…
- The cipher mentions vines, being undisturbed, and... a dream? Paimon doesn't really understand these things... but they sound familiar for some reason. ｜ 这次的暗语提到了藤蔓、无人打扰和…梦乡？这些东西都不太好理解啊…不过，倒是感觉有点耳熟。
- In Immortal Combat, new blocks will constantly appear in the marked zone at the top of the arena and drop down. You can control the blocks by <color=#FFCC33>moving them left and right</color>, <color=#FFCC33>rotating them</color>, or <color=#FFCC33>speeding up their descent</color>. When <color=#FFCC33>4</color> or more blocks of the same color are connected, they will be <color=#FFCC33>cleared</color>. ｜ 在「八奇乱斗」中，场地顶部标记区域将不断生成新的方块并下落，旅行者可以控制方块进行<color=#FFCC33>左右移动</color>、<color=#FFCC33>旋转</color>或<color=#FFCC33>加速下落</color>。当<color=#FFCC33>4</color>个及以上的同色方块相连时将触发<color=#FFCC33>消除</color>。

- "But should you boldly go forth and conquer such omens, you will receive your just reward." ｜ 「但只要挺身而出，战胜厄运，便会赢得理所应得的奖励。」
- How's about it, then? <color=#00E1FFFF>Mora Meat</color>, <color=#00E1FFFF>Butter Chicken</color>, or <color=#00E1FFFF>Pile 'Em Up</color>? Let me hear your choice. ｜ 怎么样？<color=#00E1FFFF>摩拉肉</color>，<color=#00E1FFFF>黄油鸡</color>和<color=#00E1FFFF>「堆高高」</color>，让我看看你选了什么。

- Kichiboushi ｜ 「吉法师」
- An iris that was cherished by the guardian. Unfortunately, the chance never came for it to be given to whom the guardian loved. ｜ 守护者珍视的鸢尾花。并没有机会送给倾心的人。
- Yeah, I'm sure everything will work out. ｜ 嗯，我相信不会有事的。
- Interesting. And why would we do that? ｜ 有意思，我们为什么要赔偿你？
- The Shades of Tokoyo only show up during Evernight. ｜ 「常世之灵」仅在常夜里出现。
- Sounds good! We'll take a stroll in the meantime. ｜ 嗯，我们随便逛逛！
- And the plot thickens... We'll need to keep an eye on Childe, that's for sure. ｜ 真复杂…总之，以后要对「公子」更多防备一些了吧。

- Clearbreak Surf ｜ 湛波岛
- Yes, Master! ｜ 师父！
- After many years of wind erosion, those stone spears have turned into the unique rock formations we see now. ｜ 那些岩枪经历了长年的风化，最终形成了此番别致的景象。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon wants to go visit the Amurta scholars!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hehe, when did you become such an avid student, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Well, Paimon heard that the Amurta scholars' research is all about nature.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Which means... they must have to research which animals are edible, and which ones taste the best, and... y'know that kind of thing!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon thinks it'd be really fun to help them out with their research.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>In other words, you've got a craving for some tasty, organic dishes.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>No! Paimon genuinely thinks that it's a really meaningful research topic and wants to help out!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hmm, well in that case... I think the Amurta scholars might be more interested to find out about Paimon's species and behavioral patterns.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Uh... Gee is that the time? Paimon just remembered we have something else more important to do! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我想去拜访生论派的学者们！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙怎么突然勤学好问了起来？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>因为我听说生论派的学者们主要研究的内容是自然和生态。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那么一定有研究各种动物能不能吃、好不好吃的学者吧！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我觉得帮助这样的学者进行研究，一定会非常有意思。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>你只是想吃咖喱了吧？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不，我真的觉得这是一件很有意义的事情。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那…这样的学者，一定会先对派蒙是什么物种，有什么行为习惯产生好奇吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我，我突然想起来我们好像有更要紧的事情！
- Treasures Beneath the Vines ｜ 蔓下秘宝

- A key device in the alchemy store that, with the expertise lent by Albedo and Sucrose, maintains a magnificent appearance and all the functionality of an alchemy cauldron while being more user-friendly (especially to less experienced alchemists) and more internally spacious, allowing for mass production to take place. This is the gift the Honorary Knight received in thanks for their aid in managing the alchemy store.\nIt is said that this cauldron's greatest advantage is the rate at which it can accelerate the fusion and transmutation of ingredients, thus shortening the potion manufacturing cycle. However, this also makes it unsuited as a tea-making or cooking implement. After all, you wouldn't call a bottle of highly concentrated ingredients a gourmet meal... would you? ｜ 炼金店铺中的关键器具，由阿贝多和砂糖提供技术支援，外观颇为华丽，性能与寻常炼金釜相当，但基本操作对技艺不算熟练的炼金术士而言更为友好，内部空间也较为充裕，有利于大量生产成品，是荣誉骑士协助经营炼金店铺所获的赠礼。\n据说，这尊炼金釜的最大优势在于能加快药材之间融合嬗变的速率，从而大大缩短药剂的生产周期。不过，这也使得它并不适合作为煮茶或烹饪用具使用，毕竟一瓶浓缩的食材制剂并不能被算入美食的范畴…
- In the eyes of the people, she's a stain on the Knights of Favonius... and in the eyes of the Lawrence Clan, she's a disgrace to her family. ｜ 在普通民众眼里，她是骑士团的污点，在劳伦斯家里的人眼里，她是家门不幸。
- Please, take it. Please. ｜ 请您笑纳，请您笑纳。
- A helmet steeped in obsession, just like the mind of its previous owner. Its jade ornamentation seems to come from an age more ancient still. ｜ 如同其旧主的心神一般，为「执念」所浸染的盔面。其上装饰的玉石似乎来自更古老的时代。
- She jumps over the chairs, hides under the table... then runs all around the house. I can hardly catch her. ｜ 跳过椅子，躲在桌子下面…在屋里绕啊绕，我怎么都追不上她。
- All that's to say, if you're really interested in these materials, you should pay a visit to the Children of Echoes yourself. You may well find something even better there. ｜ 总之，要是对矿石感兴趣的话，可以去回声之子问问看。说不定还能找到比这更优秀的材料呢。

- I was not... ｜ 我没有…

- Mm? ｜ 呶？
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- But what about the crimson oni, hmm? You don't know anything about us... Not our miserable history, or any of our names. Mine's Takuya, by the way. But you don't even care, do you? ｜ 但赤鬼呢？无论是我的名字，卓也，还有我的族人的名字，他们的悲惨经历，你都完全不知道，完全不关心吧。
- Everyone who's fighting, be prepared to follow my orders to the letter. ｜ 那就拜托大家听我指挥了。
- Word is that Jawad will be coming for drinks outside the <color=#00E1FFFF>tavern</color> <color=#00E1FFFF>tonight</color>. ｜ 据说哲瓦德会在<color=#00E1FFFF>晚上</color>来到<color=#00E1FFFF>酒馆外</color>喝酒。

- Call it intuition... If you want the truth, perhaps Doushin Shikanoin could shed some light. I believe there's been a break in the case. ｜ 不过是一种直觉罢了。想要「真相」，不如来问问这位鹿野院同心？他似乎已经有眉目了。

- At this altar where red leaves flutter in the wind, summer and autumn are separated into two spheres, one where Cryo is enhanced, the other where Pyro is enhanced.\nThose of profound skill who can master the trial within have a chance to obtain precious artifacts and receive help in their pursuit of that which may otherwise be untraceable. ｜ 在红叶飘扬的祭场之中，如同夏秋之分，存在着增强「冰元素」与「火元素」的领域。\n能利用各种奥妙，成功克服其中试炼者，或许就能获得珍贵的圣遗物，获得追寻本应切断的因缘的助力。
- So then why... ｜ 可为什么…
- Take it easy, Professor. I'm puzzled as well. Just going by qualifications, you're one of our most preeminent scholars. I don't know why they picked a stripling like him... ｜ 消消气，老师。我也纳闷，按资历您才是学术泰斗，怎么轮得到他一个毛头小子…
- Pah, what a horrible sight. To be as Mihir is, corroded by filth, falling from a spotless to a sinful state, yet desperate to preserve herself... Had the Elder not bade me come... ｜ 像米希尔那样即便被污秽侵蚀，从无垢堕为有罪却还是贪生的丑态，真是不忍卒睹呀。要不是前辈非让我来…
- Yay thanks, Collei! It's hard to believe someone as diligent as you could have clumsy moments too. ｜ 谢谢你柯莱！嘻嘻，真难想象像你这么认真的人，竟然也会有毛手毛脚的时候。
- I think we could turn that to our advantage. Go back to them with a proposal of our own. ｜ 我们不妨主动一些，提出我们的方案。
- Strongest fighter in Mondstadt? ｜ 「蒙德最强战力」…？

- Yes. There was a big pile of fruits next to me when I woke up. Some were sweet, and some were sour, and some were really difficult to bite into. Oh, some of them spurted juice all over my clothes when I bit them. Fortunately, I was next to a river, so I could wash my clothes there. ｜ 对呀，我一醒过来，身边就放着一大堆果子呢，有甜的有酸的，有的很难咬，还有的一咬就全是汁水，都弄到我衣服上了，还好旁边就是小河，可以直接搓洗衣服。
- You said that I betrayed the Akademiya, but you, Azar... You've betrayed all of Sumeru, betrayed its archon! ｜ 你说我背叛了教令院…可是你，阿扎尔，你是背叛了整个须弥，背叛了神明的家伙！

- Chongyun strikes the ground with his greatsword, causing a Cryo explosion in a circular AoE in front of him that deals <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color>.\nAfter a short delay, the cold air created by the Cryo explosion will coalesce into a Chonghua Frost Field, within which all Sword, Claymore and Polearm-wielding characters' weapons will be infused with <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color>.\n\n<i>"A crystal-clear ring, and all is silent. The rivers move not, and the clouds are heavy with frost. The altar gates open, and evil is banished."</i> ｜ 重云挥动巨剑猛击地面，在前方圆形范围内引发冰爆，并对敌人造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>。\n短暂延迟后，冰爆引发的寒气汇聚成重华叠霜领域，其中的单手剑、大剑、长柄武器角色获得<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素附魔</color>。\n\n<i>「琳琅振响，十方静默。江河不动，重云凝霜。如法开坛，诸邪退散。」</i>

- But the way I see it, his situation is much worse than my other self's... She just hadn't found what she wanted to do at that moment, which is why she felt lost. ｜ 但依我看，他的问题比另一个我严重得多…那时候另一个我只是没找到想做的事，才会迷茫困惑。

- Dear Traveler:\nThe system has discovered that the name chosen by this account for the character "Eons Adrift" Wanderer (Anemo) violates our Rules and Disclaimers for Name Modification. Therefore, the developers have reset this name and the item "An Appellative Stroke" has been returned to you. You can still use the item "An Appellative Stroke" to rename this character again. If you continue to act in violation of the aforementioned rules, the name of the character "Eons Adrift" Wanderer (Anemo) on this account will be reset again. Please follow and respect all corresponding rules. ｜ 亲爱的旅行者： \n系统发现当前帐号为角色「久世浮倾·流浪者(风)」重撰的「名字」，违反了游戏内的【改名规则与声明】，现在制作组已重置了该名字。同时我们已返还旅行者使用的道具「新名撰聿」，旅行者仍可使用道具「新名撰聿」进行「名字」的重撰。如旅行者后续仍出现相关违规行为，当前账号中角色「久世浮倾·流浪者(风)」的名字会被再次重置，还请旅行者遵守相应规范。

- Hmph... You know, I always thought the Akademiya's worst were just a bunch of greedy dogs, each fighting for their slice of the pie... Nope. Turns out they were a vicious pack of wolves who betrayed the whole nation. If you want my opinion... Lesser Lord Kusanali was too good to them. Those animals didn't deserve her mercy — she should've broken every single bone in their bodies! Instead, they got a nice little vacation in the rainforest... To say they got off lightly is just putting it mildly. ｜ 哼，我之前还以为，教令院里顶多是有一群自私自利的鬣狗在蝇营狗苟，结果…居然还有这么几匹喂不熟的白眼狼在作乱。依我看，那位小吉祥草王真是慈悲得有些过头了，对付这种劣兽，最好是连骨头都锤碎掉！就这么放他们去林子里歇着，真是太便宜他们了。

- Got all the mushrooms right here. ｜ 摘来的蘑菇都在这里了。
- Wait, isn't this just perfect? ｜ 对了，那现在不是正好吗？
- Is it to do with your family? ｜ 是家里的原因吗？

- Clear the Abyssal corrosion in this area ｜ 清除此处深渊的侵蚀

- No, that is inaccurate. I came here principally to protect Collei. ｜ 不，不能这么说，主要还是为了护送柯莱过来。
- Mood ｜ 心情
- Still, I wonder, Azariq. You always seem to know things we don't, and you've taught us a lot, too. I guess that's why the Matriarch favors you, eh? ｜ 不过，我也很好奇呢…阿萨里格总是知道很多我们都不知道的东西，也教了我们很多。所以芭别尔主母才格外倚仗他吧。
- Master Trainer, Masters of the Night-Wind ｜ 「烟谜主」训练大师
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Rawrrr... ｜ 呜呜…
- We were just looking for the way to the Jade Chamber. ｜ 我只是在找前往群玉阁的路。
- Looks like I'm here now, too. ｜ 大家好啊，我也来了。
- "Deal with the matter"? ｜ 处置？
- That is to say, "hang a lamp on it." ｜ 准确地说，是…挂一盏灯。
- Nakul is looking for a suitable place to study... ｜ 纳库尔想找个合适治学的场所…

- 30,000 points ｜ 30000分
- The difficulty this time has to do with the lantern rotation part. ｜ 这次的难度，是在「转灯的方式」上。
- I would go so far as to infer that this archipelago once held a human population. They were most likely visitors from elsewhere — not indigenous to the islands. ｜ 我大胆推测这座岛从前有过原住民，但比起原生人类，他们是外部来客的可能性更大。
- Ooh... Hey! What do you think this is? ｜ 咦？这是什么？
- Ally at Low HP: II ｜ 同伴生命值低·其二
- What? You can't even guarantee that? Can you at least tell us how we're supposed to help you, then? And no bad stuff, we don't do that! ｜ 什么嘛，连这都保证不了…那你总得先说说我们要怎么帮忙吧？我们可不会做坏事！
- We heard about it from Maloney. He said you were originally supposed to play the lead. ｜ 我们已经从马洛尼先生那里听说了。这部戏本来是你主演。
- Sub-Space Cabochon: In Soaring Flight ｜ 外景奇石-「飞升腾实」
- The plants here are growing pretty nicely... ｜ 这里的植物长势真不错呀…
- Yeah, mom's right! We'll always believe in you, Sis! ｜ 嗯，妈妈说得对，我们肯定是最支持你的人。
- But do not get complacent. You should expect to fend for yourself, as I am not in the habit of coming to other people's rescue. ｜ 但也不要懈怠。保持警惕，我可没有分心保护同伴的习惯。
- Lyney is putting his experience at fooling people to work... ｜ 应付这类人的经验林尼应该有不少…
- Energy Recharge Increase|{param4:P} ｜ 元素充能效率提升|{param4:P}
- Speaking of "chatting"... I once contemplated this concept in quite some depth. ｜ 说起聊天…我曾经思考过「聊天」这个词。
- Would you like to have a chat with me? ｜ 想一起聊聊天吗？
- Marechaussee Hunter ｜ 逐影猎人
- These look like what Congzi was talking about! Let's head back! ｜ 聪子要取的应该就是这个，我们回去吧。
- Hmm, well, if something bad happens, don't expect me to pick up the pieces. ｜ 呵呵，要是真出了事，我可不会帮你善后哦。
- We meet again! How have you been? ｜ 又见面了！最近好吗？
- Citlali's Bedroom ｜ 茜特菈莉的卧室
- He shouldn't be... ｜ 应该不是…
- Critical objects have not been placed. This challenge cannot be played. Exit domain? ｜ 当前未布设规则所需物件，关卡将无法游玩，是否退出？
- I only know what "Father" has told us, which is that it's something The Rooster and Regrator have been working on together. Apparently, it has to do with the Fatui's strategic plan for the future. ｜ 我只是听「父亲」说过，是由「公鸡」与「富人」两位执行官联手推动的计划，涉及到愚人众接下来的战略安排。
- So long as we can find something for the gentlemen back at the Maison to busy themselves with, we shall have succeeded. ｜ 只要能找到一点正经事，让复律庭里的那些先生们忙起来，我们的目的就达到了。
- Yes, quite lovely indeed. ｜ 是啊，今天真是个好日子。
- I'll take care of it. ｜ 放心交给我就好。

- I'm not handing it over! ｜ 我不给！
- Perhaps this is what the old aristocrats see as most important. ｜ 或许这也是旧贵族的「讲究」。
- It must've been that machine's fault... ｜ 因为那个装置吧…
- Just now... Did I really mean to choose number four? ｜ 我刚才…原本是想选四号的吗？
- Opponents' Pyro RES increased by 50%. ｜ 怪物的火元素抗性提高50%。
- This tastes amazing! I'd better not have any more, or I'll never be able to go back to my usual rations. ｜ 这道菜味道真不错！再多吃几口的话，我说不定以后就吃不下那些干粮啦。
- Plunge DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param4:F1P}
- Do you want to know her? I can introduce you to Apple for sure! ｜ #{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}想认识「苹果」吗？我可以把你介绍给她！
- About the bribery case... ｜ 「关于受贿事件…」
- Anyone who works like that is sure to have a guilty conscience. So all I had to do was put on a little show, starring the editor-in-chief of The Steambird... ｜ 他既然钻了空子，那心里自然有鬼。只要陪他演上一出大戏…
- Once upon a time, I was a very ordinary tea farmer who grew mediocre tea. ｜ 从前，我不过是个普普通通的茶农，种出的茶叶平平无奇。
- Even though the waves that flow to the harbor every day may not come from the same sea, the two of us got to meet here. What is it if not a miracle? ｜ 就连每天流到港口的浪花都未必来自同一片海域，你我在这里相遇，不是奇迹又是什么？

It appears that you could form a full ring using three of them, though what that will achieve, you cannot tell. ｜ 在探索时偶然得到的，刻画有「流泉之众」风格纹饰的黑曜石断片。看上去只要有如是三个就能够组成一个完整的环，但不知道有什么作用。

- *sigh* Yes, I'm sorry... You're right. We don't have time to panic. ｜ 嗯，抱歉，你们说的很有道理，已经没有时间自乱阵脚了。

- Healing Bonus increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>, Normal Attack DMG is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>3%</color> of the Max HP of the character equipping this weapon. Energy can be restored this way once every 0.1s. ｜ 治疗加成提升<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>；普通攻击造成的伤害增加，增加值为装备该武器的角色生命值上限的<color=#99FFFFFF>3%</color>。在施放元素爆发后的12秒内，普通攻击命中敌人时恢复0.6点元素能量，每0.1秒至多通过这种方式恢复一次元素能量。

- In "Offensive Battles," Travelers need to complete various challenges to charge ritual items, then use these to <color=#F39000>destroy the enemy camp's barrier</color>, thereby achieving victory in the martial trial. ｜ 在「进攻战」中，旅行者需要完成各种挑战为仪式道具充能，并使用仪式道具<color=#F39000>破坏敌方大营的结界</color>，从而获得演武的胜利。
- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Paimon, have you ever read "Vera's Melancholy" before?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Well, it sure sounds familiar!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> That book's pretty popular, and I've heard that the author made a tidy sum off of it...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> *sigh* Paimon would love to make lots and lots of Mora...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Hmm... It's decided, then! Paimon will write an adventure story as well!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> A tale of adventure, by Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Correct! It'll be a story in which the brave traveler defeats the dragon, saves the world...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> And then sits down with his reliable companion for ten servings of Sticky Honey Roast!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Ten!?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Uh-huh! A happy ending attracts the readers, after all!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> It's decided, then! We'll call it "Paimon's Happiness!"\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Wait, what? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙，你看过《少女薇拉的忧郁》吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>听起来很耳熟呢！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那本书还挺受欢迎的，据说作者靠它大赚了一笔…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸，我也想赚好多好多摩拉。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯...决定了！我也要去写冒险故事！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>小派蒙的冒险故事？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>对！英勇的旅行者打败了魔龙，拯救了世界…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>然后和他可靠的同伴一起吃了十份蜜酱胡萝卜煎肉的故事！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>十份？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯！结局要十全十美，大家才会来看嘛！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>就这么愉快地决定了！书名就叫做《少女派蒙的快乐》。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>呃？
- A simple yet attractive notice board adorned with graffiti featuring you, Paimon, and Little One. Mr. Qax had it placed to deter Saurian smugglers and alert passing travelers.\nThe first step in combating the Saurian poacher syndicate begins with the installation of these signs. One day, may they spread throughout all of Natlan, making Saurian and animal trafficking a crime of the past! ｜ 简约但不失美观的告示牌，其上绘有以你、派蒙与小家伙为原型的涂鸦花纹，十分显眼，是卡克斯先生为了震慑龙贩子并提醒往来的行人所设。\n对抗龙贩子犯罪集团的第一步，正是从安装有这件告示牌的地方开始。但愿有一天它能出现在纳塔的全境，让所有贩卖龙和动物的犯罪团伙再也不会出现！
- A floral scene composed of curved branches and fluffy foliage. The branches form an almost perfect rainbow arc, which is a key element in the composition of the floral courtyard, attaining a perfection in both horizontal and vertical alignments. ｜ 由弯曲枝干和蓬松枝叶组成的「花景」，枝干呈近乎完美的虹状，能为「花庭」的构图画上关键的一笔，赢得水平与垂直两个方向上的圆满。

- Ah, thank you! Who would've thought I'd get the chance to meet such impressive adventurers! Hehe, today must be my lucky day! ｜ 谢谢！嘿嘿，我运气真好，遇到了这么厉害的人。
- Well, there really isn't anything new under the sun, anyway. No matter what I say or write, it is always but a parody of others. ｜ 唉，果然这世上根本没有什么新鲜东西。不管说什么、写什么，都只能是对他者的戏仿。

- Fruits and vegetables have been tightly piled together here without any care for how they might affect one another. Perhaps the merchant in question was far too tired to quibble about such details.\nPlacing a Mist Flower within a sack is an easy solution to the problem, but the price of one Mist Flower may exceed several days' worth of a merchant's income, which makes it an unprofitable proposition. ｜ 密集堆放的果蔬袋，并不在乎果蔬之间的互相干扰，大概是商贩太过劳累，实在无暇顾及这些细节了。\n在袋中放置冰雾花的花朵似乎是个省心省力的方案，但一朵冰雾花的成本可能就超过商贩几天的收入了，实在消受不起。

- A lovely sakura tree that is marked by its arresting bellflower-blue coloration.\nTechnically, these trees are not directly related to the Thunder Sakura, but a certain adventurer once claimed that you could be hit by a "wondrous bolt" when standing near this tree, numbing you just enough to help you relieve some mental stress. As such, many artists and writers have sought such sakura trees out to experience their trademark "shock therapy." Truth be told, these sakura trees do not themselves possess the power of lightning — one would have the Electro Crystals buried in the wetland soil near these trees to thank for that. ｜ 色彩瑰丽的樱树，有着「桔梗色」的醒目特征。\n虽说这种樱树与雷樱没有直接的关联，但据某位冒险家所说，接近这种樱树时，可能遭受「奇妙的电击」，那种恰到好处的酥麻感能有效缓解压力。因此，不少文人与画家主动寻找这种樱树，以求体验「驱散愁云」的电击感。其实这种樱树根本没有释放雷元素的能力，只是个别樱树下方的湿润土壤中埋藏有电气水晶的碎片罢了。

- Initiate Rainbow Bladework and fight using an illusory sword rain, while creating the maximum number of Rain Swords.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Rainbow Bladework</color>\n·Your active character's Normal Attacks will trigger consecutive sword rain attacks, dealing <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG</color>.\n·Rain Swords will remain at the maximum number throughout the ability's duration.\n\n<i>The "Way of the Rain Cutter" is one of the esoteric secret techniques of the Guhua Sect.</i> ｜ 展开虹剑势，驾御幻影剑雨战斗，并生成最大数量的雨帘剑。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>虹剑势</color>\n·当前场上自己的角色进行普通攻击时，会产生剑雨连携攻击，造成<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素伤害</color>；\n·雨帘剑的数量将始终维持在最大数量。\n\n<i>「裁雨法」不传绝学，古华镇派秘诀之一。</i>

- As you know, diving is one of the few things I'm any good at. I spend more time among the Tidalga than I do talking to people. The underwater world is much simpler than the world of dry land. ｜ 如你所知，我为数不多的强项是潜水，我和汐藻打交道的时间比和人说话的时间还多。它们不会责问，不会流露失望，只安静地陪你一同漂流…水下的世界要比陆上简单许多。

- #{M#After carefully tending to Jeht's wounds, you get some rest together with her by the campfire.\nThough no words are spoken, you both know what must happen next.}{F#After carefully tending to Jeht's wound, you get some rest together with her by the campfire...\nJeht sleeps peacefully by your side. The mixed odors of blood, sweat, and burning poplar branches cannot fully mask the scent of spices she carries.\nLight snoring and raving nonsense intertwine in her dreams — she must truly be tired.\nEven without speaking to one another, you both know what must happen once she awakes.} ｜ #{M#你为婕德仔细包扎了伤口，伴着火光一同休息了半晌。\n在无言的默契中，你们已经决定好了下一步行动。}{F#你为婕德仔细包扎了伤口，伴着火光一同休息了半晌…\n婕德在你身边安睡了许久，血与汗的气息混合着胡杨枝燃烧的焦味，也没能掩盖她身上淡淡的香料味道。\n她的鼾声轻细，呓语荒唐…看来她真的累坏了。\n待她醒来后，你们已经达成了默契，决定好了下一步行动。}

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making an Encampment Fence: Decisive Judgment.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「阵屋围栏-『截断』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Look, that's your real home over there. It's just like Agnes described — at the breezy foothills of a mountain, upon a flowery field of grass. ｜ 看，那边就是你真正该回的家了。就和艾格妮丝说的一样，柔风拂过的山麓，在开满鲜花的草地上。
- Yes. ｜ 是。
- But Paimon thought you said, "According to the Akademiya's policies"... ｜ 可是你不是说，「按照教令院的规矩」…
- We cleanse their barbarous lands with blood, and order and civilization shall sprout after the destruction. For such ignorant savages, this is the highest mercy that can be granted them. ｜ 我们用鲜血洗净蛮荒的土地，而秩序与文明将在毁灭之后生长出来。这对那些蒙昧的族类而言，可说是无上的恩赐了。
- So... did Jeht really betray us? ｜ 所以…婕德真的背叛了我们吗？
- Let's see what Ryuuji has to say! ｜ 我们去找龙二打听一下吧！
- I already heard from the tribe that the patients have taken a turn for the better over the last few days. ｜ 族里也有传来消息，病人的情况这几天基本都好转了。
- Please stay safe, everyone. ｜ 各位千万要平安归来啊。
- We once possessed all of the High Sea, countless cities and palaces, flowers, flowing wine... and yet, fate found us all the same. ｜ 我们曾经拥有整片高海，无数的城市与宫殿，鲜花与美酒…然而，「命运」还是找上了我们。
- We'll leave you to it. ｜ 我们不多叨扰了。
- On festive occasions, one should offer words of blessing. ｜ 佳节应赠吉语。
- #Paimon's name's Paimon, and {M#he}{F#she}'s {NICKNAME}. Just call us by our names from now on! ｜ #我叫派蒙，{M#他}{F#她}叫{NICKNAME}，以后称呼我们的名字就好啦。

- Oh okay, night! You got enough blankets, yeah? Make sure you wrap up nice 'n' warm. ｜ 哦哦晚安！盖好被子啊尤其要记得盖住肚子。
- Look, Paimon Sensei's ego is so inflated, she's floating. ｜ 派蒙老师得意得飘起来了。
- Defeat Elyctra ｜ 击败「电气鞘翅」
- And those crystals are too hard and heavy... I can't collect them myself. ｜ 而且那些晶石太坚硬太重了…我一个人实在采不来。
- Well, I'll help for Xingqiu's sake. ｜ 看在行秋的面子上，我会帮忙的。
- Now's not a good time for me... ｜ 现在不太方便…

- And that's also why I tried to persuade you to stay when you asked for permission to leave. I was willing to spend however much it took... ｜ 所以迪希雅你说要走的时候，我怎么都想把你留下来，花再多的钱都行…
- Haha, that's right! Wow, I'm getting excited just thinking of being the Traveler's crewmate! ｜ 没错！一想到要是能和旅行者成为同伴，我都有点兴奋起来了！

- Alright... I'll remember that. ｜ …嗯，我会记得。

- (Hehe, someone lost Mora again!) ｜ （哈哈，又有人赔钱咯！）
- We call this a "Key Sigil." It was once heraldry used throughout Enkanomiya. It only resurfaces when the road is about to be opened. ｜ 这个叫做「键纹」，是曾经渊下宫的通行纹章。只有当通路打开之时，它才会在地上浮现。
- "Mualani, the shop owner, will be representing the People of the Springs in the upcoming Pilgrimage!" ｜ 「本店店主玛拉妮要作为代表『流泉之众』的代表参加这次的『归火圣夜巡礼』啦！」
- Atoco, my friend... Hang in there. I know you can get through this. ｜ 阿图科…朋友啊，振作起来，你一定能挺过这一关。

- Argh... ｜ 呃啊——

- Cannot perform this action in this Phase ｜ 当前阶段不允许该行动
- That doesn't sound like a festival at all. Well, not for the attending humans, anyway. It's more like a high-pressure competition. ｜ 这听起来一点都不像是节日…对来参加的人类来说，根本就是压力十足的竞赛吧？
- "But if my string is broken, I flail and plummet to oblivion." ｜ 「游丝一断浑无力，扑棱坠地懒拾捡。」
- Did you find the invoices? ｜ 您找到了货单了吗？
- Come on, puppies, we've got good food... ｜ 狗狗来这边…有很好词的喔…
- Is that so? Hmm, Paimon did get a weird feeling as well when we tried talking to them. ｜ 欸？是这样吗？我也觉得和他们说话的时候，感觉怪怪的。
- Hmmm... Just saving Mihir isn't enough to complete what Zurvan asked us to do, right? ｜ 唔…光是解救米希尔，应该还不算完成了祖尔宛交代的事情对吧？
- Is that so? Though it is strictly forbidden for some techniques to be taught to outsiders... ｜ 是这样吗？但这部分技巧按理来说是不轻易外传的…
- "Fortune slips are the manifestation of our archon's will. It is our place as mortals to respect it and do all we can." ｜ 「御神签是神明意志的体现。所以要尊重神明的意志，并且尽人所能及之力。」

- Perhaps we shall meet again someday, in a fertile land full of flowing water... ｜ 或许在未来的某天，我们还会在水土丰饶的地方再次相遇的…

- Wanderer's Troupe ｜ 流浪大地的乐团
- My mother never had those kinds of expectations, though. I've heard that she had only one wish for me, which was that I would have a happy and secure childhood. ｜ 我母亲就不一样了，我听说她对我只有一个期望，就是能开开心心地长大。

- So it's kinda like a fireside chat... ｜ 原来是个茶话会啊…
- Yes! Nara should tread carefully on the dangerous melons. <color=#00E1FFFF>First the Dendro ones, then the ordinary ones</color>! Let's start now! ｜ 好耶！那菈要小心地踩危险的瓜，<color=#00E1FFFF>先是草元素的，之后才是普通的</color>！那就马上，开始！
- Absolutely! ｜ 嗯！
- Imagine if everyone could just enjoy a nice glass of wine and have a good time while keeping their wits about them and not creating trouble for others... Now wouldn't that be a miracle? ｜ 享受美酒和生活的同时也保持理智，不给别人增加麻烦…这不是很好吗？
- If "that" isn't a fish, could it be the reason I can't "fish" it up in the first place? ｜ …难道是因为「那个」不是鱼，所以我用钓「鱼」的办法才钓不上来？

- Go find Shinobu and tell her you want an interview! ｜ ——你去找阿忍面试吧！
- The act of using huge amounts of manpower to build such a spectacle in the desert is a testament to King Deshret's tyranny. ｜ 动用大批的人力，在沙漠里建起这样的奇观，本身就是赤王暴政的明证。

- A special slip of paper that can illuminate one's fortune. Also known to a certain someone as "strips of paper."\nYou can only get one of these per day, which will cause the previous day's fortune slip to lose meaning and disappear.\nThey say that slips that portend ill luck such as "Misfortune" and "Great Misfortune" can be tied to the Fortune Slip Hanger as a prayer for a turnaround.\nRegardless, "fate" and "destiny" are things best grasped and forged in one's own hands. ｜ 昭明今日运势的特制纸签，也被某人称为「纸片儿」。\n每天只能求得一次签文，昨日的签也会因为不再具有意义而消失。\n据说，「凶」和「大凶」这类不吉祥的签条，可以结在「御签挂」上，以求转运。\n但无论如何，「命」与「运」都应该自己掌握、自己开拓吧。

- Her Excellency, the Almighty Narukami Ogosho, who promised the people of Inazuma an unchanging Eternity. ｜ 其身为御建鸣神主尊大御所大人，许稻妻人民以亘古不变之「永恒」。

- Oh, I'm so sorry! I invited you to my house, but I forgot to cook... Sorry, that's my bad. ｜ 哎呀…真是对不起！请你们到我家来，却忘了做饭招待…实在太疏忽了。
- Ever since you brought Miss Kamisato here last time, we've been having more and more people come to try our Sakura Mochi and Egg Rolls! ｜ 自从上次你带神里小姐光临本摊后，慕名来吃「绯樱饼」和「鸟蛋烧」人变多了不少，多谢啦！

- Tenebrous Papilla: Type I ｜ 深邃摹结株·I型

- ...! ｜ ————！

- I hope it will make you happy, Cyno. ｜ 可我也希望赛诺更开心一些。
- Before we can officially begin our work, we must know if it's a glass of water or a glass of Fonta we're hiding. ｜ 在正式工作之前，我们首先得知道要藏起来的究竟是一杯水还是一杯枫达啊。

- Have you collected the Mist Flowers? ｜ 你找到冰雾花了吗？
- He is a craftsman by birth and trade, and is very down-to-earth and steady. He gets things done, as well. ｜ 他是工匠出身，十分踏实可靠，也很会处理实务。

- I lead a relatively simple life when I'm not leading an army into battle. I always get out of bed at 5:05 on the dot. Then I go to the courtyard where I take five deep breaths before walking five laps around it. For breakfast, I typically eat five mouthfuls... Five is my lucky number, so I do things in fives. Do you have some objection to that? ｜ 我的生活还算简单，不用领队战斗时，我会准时在凌晨五点零五分起床，在庭院做五组深呼吸后走五圈，早饭习惯吃五口米饭…「五」是能为我带来幸运与胜利的数字，所以我会一直坚持「五」，请问你有什么异议吗？
- "The Six Great Sages"... sounds pretty powerful. ｜ 六贤者这个名字明明很厉害。
- If you can stay within the Ideal Tension Zone while fishing, this rod will shorten the time in which fish will struggle by a stable amount and increase your chances of success. This effect only works in Liyue.\n\nA long rod that stands like elegant bamboo. It is said to have been constructed and kept by a skilled hermit from Liyue, and it was first discovered on a stone tablet with the following words carved upon it: "O you who aspire, take up this rod," like a legendary sword waiting for a hero to pull it out. Of course, you only ever hear this glorious origin story from the mouths of merchants, so it may just be some rhetoric used to increase the item's value... But those who know this and still use this rod can only be those who are ready and willing to accept this pact. ｜ 钓鱼过程中，若能使张力处于最佳张力区，使用此竿可稳定缩短鱼儿挣扎时间，提高钓鱼成功率。仅璃月地区生效。\n\n如竹般高雅挺拔的长竿，据说是一位隐居璃月的高人执藏之竿，最初被发现于一面刻有「负愿者，执竿去」的石碑之上，如传说中的神剑，等待被勇者拔出。当然，如此显赫的来历，尽是从商家口中流出的，所以说不定只是些抬高身价的说辞...但话说回来，凡是知晓这些仍入手者，也都是心甘情愿、自负契约之人吧。
- I think we've got the wrong guy, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙，看来我们找错人了。
- Repair ｜ 维修
- "Refreshing Fonta, a Font of Refreshment!"\nSpecially flavored Fonta, said to use Inazuman Sakura Blooms as an ingredient. When used as the theme for a Card Back, it seems to evoke the scenery of the land of thunder and lightning... ｜ 「清爽枫达，畅饮世界！」\n特殊口味的枫达，据说以稻妻的「绯樱绣球」为原料制作而出，作为牌背的主题时，似乎能让牌手联想到雷之国度的风光…
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- What are you doing here...? ｜ 你在这里干嘛…
- Mikoshi Chiyo is gone. A fragment of a Nightmare tied to a severed horn... That is all that remains. The living must take precedent over the memory of the dead. ｜ 「御舆千代」已殁，留在这世上的不过是「噩梦」的一角残片。眼下当以生者为重，已逝之人…无需挂碍。
- I don't think it's an issue of whether or not you heard me. ｜ 这不是有没有听清的问题吧。
- Cicin Mage: Hoarfrost Wielder ｜ 萤术士·降霜的少女
- That seems to be the only possibility... ｜ 看来只有这一种可能了…
- This Fatuus is actually skilled in running away! ｜ 这个愚人众，论起逃跑来还真有两把刷子！
- Rana ｜ 拉娜
- He should be at the entrance, right? Let's go ask him! ｜ 他应该就在门口吧？我们去问问他！
- P—Paimon has never met someone like this... Let's just call her... "Bombaholic" in the future! ｜ 从，从来没见过这种人！以后就叫她…炸弹怪人了！
- This doesn't look like a forest. Paimon thinks it's more like... an underground cavern? ｜ 感觉不像是森林里的风景，总感觉有点像是…地下的洞窟？
- I'll take it from here, then! ｜ 嗯嗯，让我来吧！
- The Young Lady's Clothes ｜ 少女的衣物
- Yup. We've still got other seasonings, so we don't have to go so heavy on the salt. ｜ 没错，后边还有其他调料，不一定要放很多盐。
- We need to talk to Yae Miko. ｜ 去找八重神子吧。
- Furina ｜ 芙宁娜
- Huh... Nasejuna's still his usual self. Paimon's not sure how to feel about this. ｜ 唔…看到那先朱那还是这个样子，也不知道应不应该高兴。
- Not to worry. Knowledge is vast, it's never too late to learn. ｜ 无妨。学问甚多，何时开始都不算迟。
- He never teased timid Arashakun. When Arashakun felt scared, he would hold Arashakun's hand. He was a friend Arashakun would never forget. ｜ 他从不会因为兰沙恭胆小而故意捉弄兰沙恭，在兰沙恭觉得害怕的时候，会主动握起兰沙恭的手…是兰沙恭永不会忘记的朋友。
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Xiangling ｜ 香菱
- Loading interrupted ｜ 读取中断
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param6:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param6:F1}点
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- Employer's Orders ｜ 雇主的命令
- State your purpose, or it's off to the dungeons for the lot of you! ｜ 你们给我老实交代来意！不然就把你们全都押回警备室。
- (Add just a small bit of Slime Condensate into the drink.) ｜ （把一小块史莱姆凝液加入酒里。）
- Our champion of champions. ｜ 我们的超级冠军。
- I—I'm fine! I j—just need to catch my breath... I'm a m—merchant. I'm not used to w—working out so hard... ｜ 没…没事！就是稍微有点喘不上气…商人嘛，哪里受过这些…
- About Varesa: Eating for Strength ｜ 关于瓦雷莎自己·吃饱和力气
- A picture printed out by the Kamera. It's very clear. ｜ 「留影机」所印出的画，画面很清晰。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Alrighty, off we go! ｜ 好，我们出发！
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Things are looking up for Lumidouce Harbor, but someone will have to put in a lot of work in order for it to become a true success story. ｜ 柔灯港的前景是乐观的，但是…必须要有人为它付出足够的汗水。
- Now then. Before we start investigating our card snatcher, I have one other small task to take care of first. ｜ 不过，在调查「怪盗」之前，我还有一份小小的工作需要完成。
- Seirai Island ｜ 清籁岛
- Traveler ｜ 主角
- ...Ah, uh, sorry. Got carried away again, didn't I? Anyway, if there are any bombs... I mean, any things I can do for you, please let me know, Honorary Knight! ｜ 啊，抱歉，一不小心又入迷了！总之，如果有什么炸弹…不对，如果有什么我能为您做的事，就请随时告诉我吧，荣誉骑士大人！
- Of course, just wait until the day of our premiere. You'll witness the true power of my name in these lands! You'll be so glad I agreed to help. I can guarantee that even the standing tickets will be sold out. ｜ 那是自然，等到首映日那天，你们就尽管为「芙宁娜」这名字在枫丹的号召力而庆幸吧。我保证剧场里到时候连站票都会售罄的。
- Let me ask you this: What do you think is the meaning of art? ｜ 那我这么问吧，你们觉得艺术的意义是什么？
- ... ｜ ……
- Even after the crystal watch face was shattered and the hands lost, its former owner kept it until the end. ｜ 水晶制成的表镜已经破碎，连表针也全数脱落，但仍然不愿丢弃。
- A chance meeting with a friend in a faraway land is hard to come by, so why not join up and travel together for a time? ｜ 他乡遇故知最是难得，既然不期间相逢，不如结伴四处游历。
- ...Huh? ｜ …嗯？
- Kind warrior, all my saurians are safe and sound, and all thanks to you! ｜ 好心的勇士，我的小龙全都安然无恙，多亏有你帮忙！
- Sounds like it was worth sending that letter. ｜ 太好了，信没白送。
- Make sure you don't forget to call me when you're ready to leave! ｜ 等你准备好再次出发，一定要叫上我哟。
- Talk to the giant being ｜ 与眼前的巨物对话
- Use your Elemental Sight to follow Albedo's tracks ｜ 利用「元素视野」跟随阿贝多的足迹
- The Frozen, Rekindling Land ｜ 冷薪与重燃之地
- #{NICKNAME} ｜ #{NICKNAME}
- I have examined these Energy Cores... They are very well-preserved. Now, all that is needed is to install the Energy Block into them. ｜ 这些能量核心我已经检查过了，保存得都相当完整。接下来只要把能量块装载到里面就可以了。
- Find three lost musical scores and obtain three Vasoma Fruits. ｜ 找到三篇失落的歌谱，获得三枚恒素果。
- Speaking of which, the incident in Vimara Village is also very concerning. Can we ask other Aranara to find out who's trying to harm the children there? ｜ 这么说来，维摩庄的事情也让人很在意。能请兰那罗们帮忙调查一下，关于想要危害孩子们的家伙的事情吗？
- Hold CD|{param8:F1}s ｜ 长按冷却时间|{param8:F1}秒
- #Ahem, sorry. I'm just very happy. Thank you, the Master of the Jinni. Um, I mean, thank you, {NICKNAME}. ｜ 咳咳，没什么，我只是很高兴…谢谢你…呃，您。
- Don't be so naive! The world is complicated these days, you know. We should be prepared for the worst, if something really did happen, we might find ourselves becoming her accomplices! ｜ 不要太天真哦！这个社会可是很复杂的，先做好最坏打算，万一真有什么事，我们就成她的共犯了！
- Are you worried about their wedding? ｜ 你是在担心他们的婚事吗？
- It's best that you go and tell everyone else what we've found. ｜ 最好先回去把新消息通知营地。
- "Hehe, a game of cards, eh? I'm getting all fired up already!"\nHint: Xinyan's deck has a lot of cards with "Discard" or "Draw" effects. She can Discard extraneous cards to gain an advantage in tempo. ｜ 「说到要和你玩牌，我的热情就涌上来了！」\n【提示】辛焱的牌组包含了大量具有「弃牌」和「抓牌」效果的卡牌，能够通过舍弃多余的手牌来获取节奏上的优势。
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- The members of <color=#00E1FFFF>Swordfish II</color> are currently on standby in a <color=#00E1FFFF>valley to the southwest</color>. Ronin have been causing trouble down there lately, and we need a special operations unit to eliminate them and stabilize the rearguard. ｜ 剑鱼二番队如今正在本岛<color=#00E1FFFF>西南</color>处的山谷待命，最近有一些<color=#00E1FFFF>流浪武士</color>闹事，需要特别行动队来稳定后方。
- He treats patients around the clock and hardly ever has time to eat. ｜ 他经常不眠不休地治疗病人，就连吃饭都顾不上。
- As the Poet Plies Parts of Ether and Earth ｜ 如诗人撷取天地的片缕
- #Hehe, Paimon knew you'd be a reasonable guy! Anyway, Paimon's name is Paimon, and {M#he's}{F#she's} {NICKNAME}. And this is... ｜ #嘿嘿，我就知道你会是个通情达理的好家伙！对了，我是派蒙，{M#他}{F#她}是{NICKNAME}，还有这边的…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- The intrinsic value of the mushroom, plus labor, medical expenses for Anqa and Isan, fines for breach of contract, and... a little extra to compensate a friend. ｜ 蘑菇本身的价值…加上辛苦费、安迦和伊桑的医药费、违约金、还有…对朋友的一点小补偿。
- Yeah! We were wondering when we'd finally see it! ｜ 嗯，我们还在奇怪，什么时候才会看见你的报道呢。
- Every newspaper is plagued by reporting that is neither particularly fair, nor remotely just. Some writers allow their views to be swayed by personal connections and promises of Mora.\nIf you want to find out the truth of a situation, the best way is to go to the people directly involved. Ask your own questions, and come to your own conclusions.\nAt the very least, don't let other people's deceitful tongues serve as a substitute for your own brain. ｜ 报纸上总是存在着一些谈不上公正，也绝不算正义的报道。撰写它们的人都被人情与摩拉带偏了心。\n如果你想知道某件事的真相，最好的方法是去找相关的人，用你自己的嘴发问，用你自己的心去理解。\n至少，别让其他人的舌头代替你的头脑。
- Domain of Forgery: Scrying Shadows ｜ 炼武秘境：冥见
- Guard ｜ 卫兵
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- It's no trouble, really. We don't mind helping. ｜ 对我们来说是小事情啦，不用客气。
- Well, that's why we're here! Hehe. ｜ 所以我们就来了！嘿嘿。
- Let's go find my lady again. We'll tell her everything, and see if she's willing to lend us her support. ｜ 我们回去见一见小姐吧，把这件事从头到尾都告诉她，看看她愿不愿意帮我们的忙。
- But, how could that... Ohhh, I—I get it now! Must have just been me not being observant enough, as usual... ｜ 怎么会…我、我明白了！一、一定是我的「观察」还不够透彻…
- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Misty Dungeon: Realm of Sand" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「迷城战线·沙域篇」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励~
- Go to the hotel ｜ 前往旅馆
- These buildings and those spherical lamps — they use this style in Merusea Village, don't they? I recognize them from a picture album. ｜ 这种建筑，还有这些圆圆的小灯，都是海沫村的风格吧？我在画册上见过。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- He's real good at using lighting to film... what was it again? ｜ 他很擅长在映影中用光影来…那什么来着？
- About the fruits and vegetables... ｜ 关于蔬果…
- Speaking of which, will you be competing in the King of Invokations Grand Prix? Word is that the prizes are pretty stellar. ｜ 对了，莫娜老师没去参加那个「召唤王大奖赛」吗？听说奖品还挺丰厚的。
- (Benben has recovered substantially. Things look pretty good right now...) ｜ （奔奔似乎恢复了很多，现在看上去精神不错…）
- Not that I know how to use it, but let's see what my intuition says. ｜ 虽然不太清楚用法，姑且就凭直觉…
- Ah, alright, since you went to the trouble with these flowers... But you must stay with me, always. Someone has to make sure I remain calm, after all. ｜ 好吧，既然你都送我花了。但是…你可得一直待在我身边，保证我一直处在冷静状态。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P}+{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}+{param4:F1P}
- A group of volatile tribal warriors are searching for sparring partners in the wild, posing a threat to the safety of the surrounding areas. Go confront them and calm them down. ｜ 一群暴躁的部族战士在野外寻找着对练目标，威胁着周边区域的安全。前去和其交手，让他们冷静下来。
- Never mind that... Anyone hiding behind the scenes and harming the Saurian companions of others is pure scum. We can't just let them go! ｜ 不管怎么样…躲在幕后伤害别人的龙伙伴，都太可恶了，我们不能放过那些家伙！
- About Ganyu ｜ 关于甘雨…
- Hold to view the stage objectives ｜ 长按查看阶段目标
- Oh no... I'm one step behind... ｜ 糟了…还是慢了一步…
- The Grand Master once told me that so long as I play to my strengths and contribute to the team, I'm doing my duty. ｜ 大团长曾经告诉过我，只要发挥自己的特长，为团队贡献出力量，就算得上尽职尽责。
- I've heard tell that your group, the Marechaussee Hunters, used your exceptional ability with the sword to repel the monsters near the capital. Such a great deed deserves to be rewarded. ｜ 听说几位…「逐影猎人」，以出色的剑技驱退了王城附近的魔物，此举理应得到赏赐。
- Yes! This place is very good. We can rest. ｜ 嗯！这里很好，可以休息。
- Lacks substantiation... ｜ 缺乏论证…
- 4-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- You made quick work of that, I can tell you're an experienced traveler. I've also finished collecting a few here. ｜ 不愧是专业的旅行者，效率真高，我这边也刚收集完一些。
- Communications Office Staff ｜ 「和记厅」员工
- Formerly Kuisel's Clockwork Workshop ｜ 原奎瑟尔的发条工坊
- I don't believe it! So... all along, our histories have been false? ｜ 居然是这样！难道说我们的历史一直以来都是假的吗？
- That should keep the people here safe! ｜ 这样周围的居民也不会遇到危险了！
- Achieve victory within 5 Rounds ｜ 5回合内胜利
- So, basically... before you've done your collation thing, there's some stuff that you can't tell us even if you knew, right? ｜ 唔…总之就是在记录空间整理完成之前，有些信息就算西摩尔的确知道，也没办法告诉我们，对吧？
- Itto said he could take care of it. ｜ 既然一斗都那么说了。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Did there use to be a... temple here? ｜ 这里…本来有神殿吗？
- "Even its mistakes are great!" ｜ 「就连错误也是伟大的！」
- Narzissenkreuz ｜ 纳齐森科鲁兹
- Yes, yes, the stems and leaves are all intact. And they are still fresh... Thank you very much. ｜ 没错，没错，茎叶没有损坏，而且还很新鲜…谢谢，非常感谢。
- The junction between Liyue Harbor and the great mines of the Chasm. Work has ceased here as of late due a shift deep within the Chasm. ｜ 连接璃月港与名为层岩巨渊的巨大矿坑的中转站，近来因为层岩巨渊深处的某种变故而停止运作。
- Kanjou Commission Officer ｜ 勘定奉行役人
- Looks like the people of Mondstadt don't know anything about the place in this letter. ｜ 看来蒙德人都不知道信中所说的地方。
- Eremite Mercenary ｜ 「镀金旅团」佣兵
- Thank you. Can I take it as a compliment? ｜ 谢谢你能这样说，我可以将它视为你对我的肯定吗？
- Huh. I couldn't tell... ｜ 看不出来…
- But are there actually any fish here? ｜ 但是这里真的有鱼吗？
- Burning sand flows within this hourglass. Despite the intense heat, the sand leave no mark upon the vessel that houses it. ｜ 流淌着闪烁热砂的沙漏。流沙匆匆而去，从不留下任何烙印。
- Ask Momoyo what happened ｜ 询问百代来龙去脉
- Golden Nara, show Arabalika your skills. ｜ 金色的那菈，让兰百梨迦也见识一下你的实力。
- ... Yes, yes. That did happen, I believe. Hah, between the two of us, I guess you're the one with good memory... ｜ 好像确实有这么回事。呵呵，还是你的记性好啊…
- Let's Make A Flower Garland! ｜ 畅畅想要编花环
- Still, your steps are hurried. You seek to fix some problem or another, perhaps? ｜ 但你的脚步如此匆忙，想必是正在为解决某个问题而奔走。
- A gift from Quinn. He mentioned that Beatrice helped him prepare it. ｜ 从昆恩那里拿到的礼物。但据他说，这是由贝雅特丽奇小姐帮他准备的…
- ...Woo? Mmwoo...? ｜ …呜？呜，呜…？
- I still can't drink alcohol. ｜ 我还喝不了酒哦。
- Where did I put them, again? ｜ 我放哪了来着…
- Road Sign ｜ 路牌
- Handy Handbook of Hilichurlian ｜ 丘丘语速查手册
- Oh, interesting! So... Any idea what Alhaitham meant by all of this? ｜ 原来是这样！不过…艾尔海森写的这些是什么意思？
- Well, we can check the truth of your statements at the opera house. I hope you know what'll be coming for you if I were to find any discrepancy between the evidence and the testimony you just gave! ｜ 是不是真的，带回去审一审就知道了。如果证言和证物有出入…我保证你会后悔！
- Sanctuary of Cultivation ｜ 隐世修行之处
- Score {param2} points in Coordinated Assault: Marauding Adversary during the "Fabulous Fungus Frenzy" event ｜ 在「智巧灵蕈大竞逐」活动中，「协同攻势·掠袭强敌」的战果评分达到{param2}
- Where's the toy? ｜ 找不到玩具…
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Foamy Reef ｜ 远礁浮沫
- I'm very grateful to her. I've always dreamed of being a director, but I never had the chance until I came here. ｜ 我很感激她。因为直到进入这里，我才有机会成为真正的「导演」。
- Would you like to see a magic trick? Now, let me place this ordinary cloth on top of the dish. Count down with me — three, two, one! Tada! Where'd the food go? ｜ 想看魔术吗？来吧，看我把布盖在上面，你跟着我一起念——三、二、一！食物消失咯！
- It's approved, Honorary Knight and Paimon! There was nothing wrong with the content of the package! ｜ 结果确认了，荣誉骑士，派蒙！包裹里的财物没有任何问题！
- I can do this all day. ｜ 我还能打一整天。
- The thought of me gives him no succor, so let it lie forgotten beneath the waters. ｜ 我的思念已是对他无益之事，就让这份思念永远停留在水底吧。
- Oh, a grand prize! Sounds like it could be really valuable! ｜ 豪华礼物！听、听上去就很值钱！
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- (Who in their right mind would have any interest in this?) ｜ （怎么会有人对这玩意儿感兴趣？）
- Voltage Charge ｜ 电压冲锋
- Let's put the <color=#00E1FFFF>last part</color> back and see. ｜ 先把<color=#00E1FFFF>最后的部件</color>放回去，再看看情况吧。
- Wok-fried vegetarian food. A stir-fried selection of three ingredients hailing from Liyue. Though the methodology is simple, it brings out the intense, innate flavors of the ingredients, and does not fade in brilliance when compared to some high-class delicacy. ｜ 宽油炒制的素食。选取璃月当地盛产的三种食材煎炸翻炒。虽然做法朴素，却充分调动了食材本身的浓郁鲜味，丝毫不输玉盘珍馐。
- A Song That Knows Grace ｜ 弦歌知雅意
- Ooh, look at you, Big Brother Kito, you've got two guesses in a row! ｜ 木户哥竟然连续有两个猜想，真是…太刺激了！
- Wait! Remember... Don't put off until tomorrow what you haven't finished today. ｜ 等等！…如果你有没做完的事情，就不要留到第二天了。
- Wait, so you're really just gonna make us work while you slack off!? ｜ 你真就无所事事啊！
- Ohh... fizzled out... ｜ 玩过头了…
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Songe de la plus haute tour." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「深塔萦梦」。

- The king of the Riftwolves. The Golden Wolflord's attacks can apply stacks of the "Corrosion" status, which will cause all characters in the party to continuously lose HP. In combat, the Wolflord will summon Rifthound Skulls to provide it with a Ward. It can also enter the Elemental Devourer state, which will decrease its Geo RES and increase its offensive capabilities. Attack the Rifthound Skulls with <color=#FFE14BFF>Geo DMG</color> to destroy the Golden Wolflord's Ward swiftly. ｜ 兽境群狼之王。黄金王兽的攻击会施加可叠加的「侵蚀」状态，使队伍中所有角色持续损失生命值。在战斗中，黄金王兽会召唤「兽境犬首」，为自己赋予护罩并进入「嗜魔」状态，岩元素抗性降低的同时提高攻击能力。对兽境犬首进行<color=#FFE14BFF>岩元素攻击</color>以快速破除黄金王兽的护罩。

- This object has long been the subject of Akademiya Researcher Tirzad's research. Its etchings and craftsmanship indicate that it is a relic of King Deshret's civilization. It seems to have the power to command devices within ruins associated with King Deshret... ｜ 教令院学者提尔扎德多年来的研究对象，从纹样与工艺来看是赤王文明的造物。似乎隐藏着催动赤王遗迹机关的权能…
- Oh, but if you're looking to talk about poetry, I'm all ears. ｜ 哦，当然，想要交流诗歌的话，我也奉陪哟。
- (Huh? Is Barbara winking at me?) ｜ （嗯？芭芭拉在对我眨眼？）
- After tasting Kuki Shinobu's very own Roasted Lavender Melon, the Arataki Gang all wept and exclaimed that they never knew that Lavender Melons could be so delicious when roasted.\nAnd the flavor, too, was most different from that which had been produced by any other method they had ever tried. Could it be that high-class culinary exams also taught people how to cook Lavender Melons a certain way?\nFaced with such a question, Shinobu put the melon she was grilling down before slowly telling a story.\nAt that time, she had gone to far-off Liyue to study law, and would visit this place known as Wanmin Restaurant in her free time.\nThe food there was incredibly diverse and made in unique ways, with ingenious ideas that surprised her, despite the fact that she had already obtained a high-level culinary license at the time.\nFrom slivers of stir-fried meat immersed in sauce to boiled cabbage with the fragrance of chicken soup... Indeed, the world was wide and full of wonders.\nAnd though one might be acquainted with every profession and be certified highly in every one, it is never wise to rest on one's laurels. Indeed, it is only by daring to try and make breakthroughs that one can surpass the limits set down by those who came before.\nThe Arataki Gang did not understand this in full, but they cheered all the same, for there was no harm in that — and their cheers certainly did the melons' flavor little harm.\nSeeing how they greatly enjoyed their meals, Shinobu kept the ending of the story to herself.\nBack then, the sous chef of Wanmin Restaurant had heard her say these words, and had urged Chef Mao to bring out the Salt and Pepper Slime...\nSuch food, she knew, would never appear in any culinary exam anywhere in the world.\nNor would the Arataki Gang want to learn that Shinobu had slathered slime ooze onto Lavender Melons as sauce before grilling them... ｜ 尝过久岐忍亲手烤制的堇瓜后，「荒泷派」众人纷纷落泪感叹：这堇瓜，竟然也能烤出如此美味！\n而且这味道和之前试过的所有烤法都大相径庭，难不成在高级烹饪师考试里，还有专门教人怎么烤堇瓜的？\n久岐忍放下手里正烤着的堇瓜，缓缓述说起了一段往事。\n当初她远赴璃月，学习律法。而在闲时，常去一间名为「万民堂」的饭馆。\n馆内菜式各异，手法新奇，构思精巧，令当时早已考取高级烹饪师执照的她也颇感惊讶。\n酱炒肉丝，却有鱼香之味。水煮白菜，却有鸡汤之鲜…可见世界之大，无奇不有。\n百行百业，就算考得了高级证书，也不能囿于一地固步自封。须得多做尝试，勇于突破，才能不被前人定下的考评限制。\n「荒泷派」一众听得似懂非懂，但也不妨碍他们连声叫好，更不妨碍这堇瓜的美味。\n看着他们大快朵颐的样子，久岐忍将故事的结尾默默留在了心底。\n当时「万民堂」的后厨听她所言，如获知己，硬是要卯师傅端上一份椒盐史莱姆…\n这种料理，恐怕在全天下的厨师考试里都不会出现。\n至于后来久岐忍将堇瓜裹上史莱姆粘液烤制一事，就更是此刻的「荒泷派」打死也不会想要知道的事实了。
- Traveler, what're we gonna do? Should we really help this guy? ｜ 怎么办，旅行者，我们真的要帮忙吗？
- Ei: Friendly ｜ 影·友好
- To defeat scattered opponents efficiently, it is crucial to assign a target to each team member appropriately.\nSail the Waverider to the Mooring Points, board the floating platforms with wind currents, and defeat the opponents quickly to complete challenges. ｜ 若是想在短时间内击败彼此之间距离较远的敌人，准确分配每个团队成员的目标，就是重中之重了…\n驾驶「浪船」前往各个停泊点后，利用风场登上空中的平台，尽快击败敌人，即可完成挑战。
- Iktomisaurus ｜ 暝视龙
- Wowee! This is great! Some of it I'll shallow fry, some of it I'll deep fry with mushrooms— ooh, and I wonder how well it goes with Slime Condensate... ｜ 哇，有这么多，一部分用来煎，一部分配上蘑菇炒，还有些和史莱姆凝液试试看…

- ...I know for a fact that I should have died over a decade ago. The fact that I've been around to see Ayu grow up is already a great blessing from Rex Lapis. ｜ …反正我这条命，十几年前就该交代了。能活到现在，看见阿雩长大，都算是岩王爷保佑！

- The Sunsettias that that traveling merchant sells are incredibly expensive. That's two days' worth of food money gone down the drain — best not to buy from him in the future... ｜ 那个旅行商人卖的日落果好贵，两天饭钱又砸进去了，以后千万不要再买他的货了…
- Timmie seems to have a bone to pick with you over some matter. Perhaps Sister Grace might know a way to help resolve things between you two... ｜ 提米正因为某件事而与你赌着气。葛瑞丝修女也许知道能与提米和解的方法…
- Argh! Ugh! Aranara names are so difficult! ｜ 啊啊，可恶，兰那罗的名词好难记喔！
- Meetings in Outrealm: Series I ｜ 异世相逢·第一辑
- The moment you wield a blade, you realize that different lives carry different weights. Some people have an air of renown and distinction, yet grovel and plead for their lives when faced with death — their outward demeanor nothing more than a hollow facade. Others appear unremarkable, yet carry a heavy burden within. Despite the factors that differentiate us in life... death awaits us all — the great and final equalizer. Cruel, you say? I merely state the truth. ｜ 当你刺出手中的利刃，你会意识到生命有不同的分量。有的人看似荣耀等身，却不过是一具无聊的空壳，临终前最后的思考仍是求饶与苟活。有的人外表平平无奇，灵魂却意外地沉重。即使如此，死亡对于每个人都是平等的。残酷？我只不过说了现实。
- If both Onikabuto unleash their attacks at the same time, your Onikabuto will be knocked down without dealing DMG to the opponent. Take note of the attack timings, and should your plans change, <color=#FFE14BFF>cancel charging</color> to avoid unnecessary <color=#FFE14BFF>Stamina expenditure</color>. ｜ 如果两只鬼兜虫同时发起攻击，我方将被撞倒，无法对对手造成伤害。注意发动攻击的时机，如果改变决策，可以<color=#FFE14BFF>取消蓄力</color>，避免无谓的<color=#FFE14BFF>体力消耗</color>。
- I noticed that too... If that's their plan, they're underestimating us a little. Every serious offender claims they're someone else who just so happens to be due for release today... And they're expecting us to go along with that? ｜ 我们也注意到了这一点，不过，您不觉得这有些小瞧我们吗？重案犯咬定自己应该是今天出狱的犯人，就要我们放人？
- Are you really still thinking of joining the Fatui? They're not good people, you know. ｜ 你怎么还真在考虑加入「愚人众」呀？他们可不是什么好人哦。

- *sigh* I guess we're done for... ｜ 唉…这次算是栽了…

- It's okay, don't worry about us! ｜ 你放心去忙吧！

- You know what? I actually think that's why she told me about that technique and allowed me to make changes to the net... ｜ 我想，她也是因为这个原因，才愿意把那道术式给我，让我来改造这张网的吧…
- In any case, all you need to know is that there is no greater honor than being under the protection of the Fatui. ｜ 反正，你们只需要知道，接受愚人众的庇护，是无上的荣耀就行了。

- You could say that. ｜ 算是吧。
- Maybe it's hard to understand from me just describing it... I happen to have a small case open. Why don't you get some personal experience in? ｜ 但这么说你应该也弄不清楚…我这里刚好有个小事件，不如你先亲身感受一下侦探的工作吧。

- Instructor's Cap ｜ 教官的帽子
- Wake Yakov up ｜ 唤醒雅科夫

- What a nice guy... Let's go ask some other people. ｜ 感觉他很热情呢…我们再去问问下一个人吧。
- Sad? ｜ 悲哀？
- Your two VIPs... You don't mean us, right? ｜ 两位贵宾…该不会是指我们吧？
- So formal... ｜ 好正式…
- She doesn't want to see you anymore... Every tendril of her consciousness is avoiding you. ｜ 她不会想要见你了，每一缕有关她的意识都在回避你。
- Ah, it's you! I just got here. My calligraphy is actually in great demand. I need to pick up my pace if I want to assist all those people. ｜ 是你啊，我才刚过来不久。要我帮忙写字的人还挺多的，我得抓紧点时间。
- Also, there are a few things I need to explain to you. ｜ 另外，还有一些事情需要和两位解释。
- #Nonono, Paimon is—! ...Hold on, she got it completely right! Look, {NICKNAME}, she introduced Paimon correctly! ｜ #不对！…欸？居然说对了。你看，{NICKNAME}，她居然这都知道！
- 甲斐田裕子 ｜ 甲斐田裕子
- ...Yes, sorry to bother the both of you. ｜ …嗯，实在抱歉要麻烦你们。

### Part 077

- Juza sent me here with a message. He says preparations are now underway. If you give me the all-clear, I'll head straight over. ｜ 重佐让我带句话，说他们那边已经开始准备了。这边没事的话，我也就先过去了。
- Onward and Upward (I) ｜ 如日方升的旅程·其之一
- Well there's plenty to go around, so dig in! I can't say I've got the culinary skills of my chef friend, but I promise you'll at least eat your fill! ｜ 我准备了很多，大家一起吃吧。手艺一般，没法跟我那开餐馆的厨师朋友比，但填饱肚子是绰绰有余。
- Yes. In my highly professional opinion, yes! ｜ 没错，我是这么认为的！
- Mountain Shaper ｜ 理水叠山真君

- Namecard style.\nOne day, our encounter at this moment shall shine like a star of reminiscence in our hearts. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n总有一天，此刻的相逢，将会成为值得眷恋的思念。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- About Rosaria ｜ 关于罗莎莉亚…
- Sounds like you're not too close with the Radicals. ｜ 听起来，激进派与你们交情不深。
- Statue of The Seven ｜ 七天神像
- Oh, come on, that's just called trying your luck! Paimon doesn't have to learn that! ｜ 根本是碰运气吧！这种东西有什么必要学啦！
- Zhiyi came from a poor family and his parents died when he was very young. But he was a gifted student and a fast learner. ｜ 知易出身寒门，父母过世很早。但他天赋出众，学什么都很快。
- About Jirou's whereabouts... ｜ 关于二郎的下落…
- Once I started to realize that, I got restless. I couldn't stop thinking about the people and the things I'd left behind... ｜ 我意识到这件事之后，就心神不宁，一直回想起被我扔在稻妻的人和事…
- (This Cater sounds... mysterious. And maybe Lanoire is just too young? She hasn't been very clear about herself at all. Maybe this Cater knows more?) ｜ （这个卡特哥哥听起来还挺神秘的…而且莉诺尔是因为年纪太小了吗？感觉她都说不清自己的事…也许她的哥哥比较清楚吧？）
- After switching to Life Points, you cannot place any enemies. Confirm to switch? ｜ 切换至生命点后，将不可布设敌人，是否切换
- #Thanks a bunch, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #就拜托你了，{NICKNAME}！
- *cough* It's hard to explain to an outsider... My great-grandfather was the youngest child of his generation, as was my grandfather, and then my father before me... ｜ 咳咳…这件事得从很久以前说起，我的曾祖父是他们那辈最小的，而我的祖父又是他们那一辈最小的，我的父亲…
- Oh, so you're hungry too! ｜ 原来先生您还饿着肚子。
- This is wonderful news! But, um... ｜ 那就是大喜事啊，不过…
- Lowest ｜ 极低
- Direct Strike ｜ 直击强敌
- Kazuha has had his eye on you from the moment you arrived. ｜ 从你到来开始，万叶就特别关注你。
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- Aha, that's among my research topics! Unfortunately, I haven't made much progress so far. ｜ 啊哈，这就是我正在研究的课题之一，不过没什么进展哪。
- A research log excerpt with plenty of crinkles. The handwriting is still very much legible. ｜ 满是折痕的研究日志内页，字迹依旧清晰可见。
- I understand. Thank you for your help, Yashiro Commissioner! ｜ 我明白，社奉行大人肯帮忙就行！
- Haha... I think I can sympathize with them... ｜ 哈哈…我好像可以理解他们…
- You hand Arama all of the flowers. ｜ 将收集到的花朵都交给了兰罗摩。
- No matter how daunting the situation, no matter how scared she might feel, she's always the first person to stand up and face it head-on! ｜ 无论遇到什么困难，无论她心中有多恐惧或不情愿，她都会比任何人先站起来…

- Payam ｜ 派安
- Well, a child who loves painting came to ask me if I could make paints as shiny as gems and as bright as the sun. ｜ 之前，有个喜欢画画的孩子来问过我，能不能做出像宝石一样闪耀，像太阳一样璀璨的颜料。
- At first, I thought that they were all just making excuses for their lack of ability. But now that even you, the legendary top-rated adventurer whom the Guild recommended so strongly to me, also encountered this issue... ｜ #一开始我还怀疑，是他们能力不足，为自己找的借口。但既然协会推荐的顶级冒险家，传说中的{NICKNAME}也遇到了这样的问题…

- After blocks are cleared, the blocks above the blocks that were cleared will drop down. If the blocks that drop trigger another block clear, a <color=#FFCC33>Chain Clear</color> will be triggered.\nChain Clears will increase the rattan figure's ATK and energy gained, and will also strengthen the effect of any <color=#FFCC33>deployed obstacles</color>. ｜ 当触发消除后，处于被消除方块顶部的方块会立刻下落，若下落的方块再次触发消除则将触发<color=#FFCC33>连锁消除</color>效果。\n连锁消除将提升藤人的攻击力与获取的能量，同时使<color=#FFCC33>设置阻碍</color>时的效果增强。
- ...Traveler! Hi! Hold up a second... ｜ 哎，旅行者，旅行者，请稍等一下…
- Just call me Ms. Bai. This is my mill... Or, more accurately, this is the mill that I oversee. ｜ 叫我小白就好，这是我的磨坊…嘿嘿，准确来说，是我管理的磨坊。
- Haven't you taken this joke a bit too far? You're right, I did let a lot of assumptions get to my head when I first started to talk to you about the case. I'll make sure to correct my behavior... ｜ 你们这玩笑开得也太过了吧？确实，我之前的发言是有一点不严谨，这点我会好好检讨的…
- #{NICKNAME}, let's each play a round of Lil' Fungi's Fun-Tastic Fiesta with Turenna, and then we'll go see Bongo-Head! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我们分别和蒂蕾娜再玩一局「小小灵蕈大幻戏」，就去看看「咚咚小圆帽」吧！
- Don't worry. Just watch closely. ｜ 没问题，你看好了。
- That said, I'd sure like to spectate and see how things play out... Oh wait, I almost forgot — I'm supposed to be one of the ones doing the fighting. ｜ 不过，观察这场挑战的结果，也算是一种有趣的体验。哦，差点忘了，这次我也是参与挑战的一员。
- Just let Mr. Garcia explain all this to Mr. Ahangar. ｜ 就让加尔恰先生给阿汉格尔先生讲解去吧。
- About Rex Lapis' death... ｜ 关于岩王帝君的死…
- But when I asked him if he was here to take part in the Irodori Festival, he shifted his gaze away, and he tried to divert the conversation. ｜ 但当被问到是不是来参加光华容彩祭的时候，他却目光游移、言辞闪烁起来…
- Huh? ｜ 欸？
- ... ｜ ……
- Don't you worry, I love it here. ｜ 放心，我很喜欢这里。
- The submerged wreckage of a once-proud ship. Countless mysterious creatures now dwell within what should have been the vessel's silent final resting place.\nIf you can eliminate the monsters within, you will be granted access to materials that can enlighten you as to the nature of talents and their advancement. ｜ 沉没的船舶遗迹，原本应当空无一物的终末之地，如今盘踞着无数神秘的奇异生命体。\n能够消灭其中的魔物的话，或许能获得令人参悟天赋成长的物资吧。
- "Guard" ｜ 「看守」
- Thank you so much. These should do. Now to send them off to the carpenter... Oh. Right! I need to collect rent as well... ｜ 谢谢你，这些木材就够了，我这就拿去给木匠…对了，还得去收房租才行…
- Good thing you didn't fall asleep. ｜ 还好你没有睡着。
- ...At least, I always used to lose to her at hide-and-seek when we were kids. ｜ …毕竟从小时候起，我玩捉迷藏就没有赢过她。
- Youko & Hitotsume Kozou ｜ 狐妖&独眼小僧
- Currency of the realm. Used within the Serenitea Pot to exchange for various items. ｜ 洞天宝钱。可在壶灵处交换各类物品。
- Or do certain tones and pitches form sounds that reverberate inside us, creating a resonance with our feelings? ｜ 是特定的音色与音高组合成的声响，通过听觉影响心理，产生情感的共鸣？
- A rough-and-ready laurel wreath that seems as precious as a king's golden crown. ｜ 粗略编成的草环。对一些人而言，就像王者的金冠一样贵重吧。
- That... stands to reason. ｜ 倒也…合乎情理。
- Mmm, good. Now continue resting while I fire up another bowl of medicine for you. ｜ 你再休息一下吧，我去重新熬一碗药汤给你。
- Looks like we need a few rules laid down just for you, Paimon. ｜ 看来应该给派蒙也立一些规矩。

- Hm, wise choice. Alright, let's go! ｜ 哼，很好。走吧！
- Book of Revealing ｜ 「揭示之书」
- "Alright, alright. I was having a hard time with my latest manuscript anyway... I suppose I can humor you for a few rounds!"\nHint: Mona's deck can switch characters via Fast Actions and create Summons to quickly trigger Elemental Reactions. ｜ 「好吧好吧，正好写不出稿子…那就暂时陪你玩几局牌吧！」\n【提示】莫娜的牌组能够通过「快速行动」切换角色，和生成「召唤物」，快速地引发元素反应。
- Elemental creatures who protect themselves from incoming attack with their durable shell. Find an opportune moment to land a blow to their <color=#FFE14BFF>elemental core</color>. They are able to create <color=#FFE14BFF>Geo constructs</color> in fights and restore their health when they feel threatened. You must be able to efficiently destroy these constructs if you want to defeat these creatures. ｜ 用惰性的方壳保护自己与战斗的强大元素魔物。抓住<color=#FFE14BFF>元素核心</color>暴露在外的时机，才能有效攻击。会利用创造出的<color=#FFE14BFF>岩元素物件</color>进行战斗，及在危急时恢复生命。如果不能高效地摧毁这些创造物的话，就无法击败…
- Why that'd be Mr. Nacker, of course. Across the entire Institute, there's no one better suited than him to deal with the Central Laboratory ruins. ｜ 当然是纳克先生。整个科学院里除了他之外，再也没有更适合处理「中央实验室」废墟的人了。
- Very impressive! That should be the last one. With this, the array sealing The Chasm has dissipated, and we can explore the area underground. ｜ 好厉害…不愧是前辈！这应该就是最后一座了，封锁层岩巨渊的阵法应该已经失效了。我们随时可以下去探索啦。
- Okay. ｜ 我知道了。
- Butterfly Wings ｜ 蝴蝶翅膀
- At the sea? No, no... I'm an officer of the law, from the Akademiya. Everyone calls me Master Adel. ｜ 看海？不不。我可是从教令院来的执法者，大家都喊我阿迪尔大人。
- I've seen people come in from the outside. Once, there was someone who came to the island, lost their way in the fog, and injured themselves in a fall as a result. ｜ 我见过外面来的人了。之前，有人到了我们岛上，在雾里迷路，结果摔伤了。

- The notebook does mention a few locations. ｜ 不过笔记上好像提到了一些地点。
- Huh, so there's that sort of story too. No wonder Ioroi panicked when he saw that picture of Kichiboushi. ｜ 还有这样的故事啊。难怪五百藏看到吉法师相片的时候，吓得不轻。

- ...However, I have plenty of Mora left, so crossing the desert to Natlan sounds nice, too... ｜ …不过，现在经费还很充足，或许穿越沙漠去纳塔看看也不错…
- Only one conclusion remains, and thus it must be true — that the strange occurrences that you experienced must be related to Tsurumi Island itself! ｜ 那就只能导向一个结论，而这个结论就是事实：你们遇到的「异常现象」，与鹤观有深刻的联系！

- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Huh? You were the one that brought Chasca back to the tribe? ｜ 欸？当初是你带回恰斯卡的吗？
- They've been sealed for so long... All they want to do is see the outside world. ｜ 他们都陪吾辈被封印了…不知道多久岁月，现在就想看看外面的世界。

- Thanks for everything! I'm good to go now. Get in touch next time you're in Springvale and let's get a drink! ｜ 谢谢你！那么我先出发了，以后来清泉镇记得来找我，我们好好喝一杯。
- It looked like it had been cut in half by something huge... ｜ 看起来像被某种巨大的东西切断的…
- One summer night, the oft-mumbling and bumbling "grandpa" suddenly calmed down and seemed to become more lucid. He even noticed Isak hiding in the distance. ｜ 夏季的某个夜晚，一直嘀嘀咕咕，动作夸张的「爷爷」忽然安静了下来，甚至发现了躲藏在远处的伊萨克。

- Thank you for indulging everyone. It meant a lot to them. ｜ 感谢你的配合，你真的很慷慨。
- Well, this place looks familiar... ｜ 看起来还挺熟悉的…
- An ancient dish, long recorded throughout history. As the milky white soup slides down the throat, you can only wish you had two stomachs. Eat a pot of this in winter, and you'll wish you were still eating it the following spring. ｜ 记载于手记上的古老菜肴。奶白的汤水滑入喉头，鲜美至极，让人恨不得长出两个胃来。冬天吃上这么一锅，怕是来年春天仍觉意犹未尽。

- Yellow Supervisor ｜ 黄色的监督人
- 2D Closing Cutscene \nCloud Retainer: In times gone by, one quarreled oft with Guizhong concerning mechanical principles. We each had our ideals, and neither would yield.\nCloud Retainer: Under the pretext of a social gathering, one invited the impartial Rex Lapis to judge the quality of our creations...\nCloud Retainer: But Rex Lapis declared that Guizhong's Obscuro Vulpes Mechanism was superior, hmph...\nCloud Retainer: Though one was too proud to acknowledge it, in one's heart, one knew that Guizhong was indeed the superior talent in the mechanical arts...\nCloud Retainer: As for the story between Guizhong and Streetward Rambler, that begins with a certain bell.\nCloud Retainer: In Guizhong's opinion, while mechanisms were no substitute for human composers, they were yet capable of producing simple but fine melodies.\nCloud Retainer: But Streetward Rambler believed music to be an expression of the soul, an emotional enterprise that could never hope to be replicated by machinery.\nCloud Retainer: They argued endlessly, until one asked Rex Lapis to intercede. He confiscated the bell, and designated it for ceremonial use.\nCloud Retainer: Thereafter, one would often find them convening in the mountains, discussing music, mechanics, and all the affairs of the mortal world.\nCloud Retainer: But these good times were not to last. War broke out between the gods, and soon engulfed the Guili Plains.\nCloud Retainer: Guizhong was overpowered by the enemy, and fell in battle. When Streetward Rambler and I arrived at the scene at long last, all that remained among the ruins... was her lifeless body.\nCloud Retainer: After this, at Streetward Rambler's request, Rex Lapis granted her the Cleansing Bell for safekeeping.\nCloud Retainer: To honor our friend's memory, one made a few finishing touches to her ballistic device...\nCloud Retainer: Many Lantern Rites have passed since then... many greetings and goodbyes.\nCloud Retainer: Upon what do you gaze? The Guili Plains?\nStreetward Rambler: No, it's... everything. We think of human life as like a lantern that's lit one minute and extinguished the next, but are we adepti so different? Perhaps, as dust settles after a storm, we too must one day return to the world below. ｜ （2D播片）\n留云：旧时，本仙常因机关术与归终争吵，我俩各执一词，互不相让。\n留云：本仙曾以聚会为由，邀请最为公正的岩王帝君，一评两种机关的高下…\n留云：帝君却说，归终的「翳狐机关」要略胜于我，哼…\n留云：虽然难以启齿，但本仙心里清楚，归终在机关学方面确实高我一筹…\n\n留云：至于归终和歌尘浪市真君的故事，则要从一个铃铛说起。\n留云：归终认为，机关术虽不能完全替代人力谱曲，其成品却足以比拟简单创作。\n留云：歌尘浪市则认为，音乐是灵魂之响，是有感而发之物，绝无可能由机关自发生成。\n留云：二人争执不休，我只得请帝君出面。他收走铃铛，用于操办各项典仪。\n留云：自那以后，我见她们常到山中聚会，探讨雅乐、机关术与人间种种。\n\n留云：但好景不长。后来，魔神交战，归离原战火迭起。\n留云：归终不敌来者，于战中仙逝。等本仙与歌尘赶至，残垣中…唯余故友神骸。\n留云：此后，应歌尘浪市要求，岩王帝君将涤尘铃转交她保管。\n留云：本仙也遵循着故友之念，对她那「归终机」略作迭进，以此怀缅…\n\n留云：霄灯几番起落，人聚人散。\n留云：你在看什么？归离原吗？\n歌尘：在看这片山水。人死如灯灭，仙人亦然，或许终有一日，我们都要尘埃落地，回到红尘中去。

- But then... wet dirt covered Nara's dreams, and new plants grew in their memories. They were dried up and reborn generation after generation... That is the kind of place we want to go. ｜ 但是后来…湿湿的土掩埋了那菈的梦，他们的记忆生出了新的草木，一代又一代地干枯又复生…我们要去的，就是这样的地方呀。

- ...Hmm? ｜ …哦？
- All these years, come rain or storm, the Crux Fleet has never suffered a delay. If it were anyone else, I might've set sail already. ｜ 过去连暴风雨都没法让「南十字船队」耽搁，这次我可是给足了你们面子啊。
- Didn't you say that you would help me? Then please, help me find those two sword-wielding children, and bring me their swords. I... I think their swords may be related to me somehow. ｜ 你不是说要帮我吗？那你帮我去找一找那两个持刀的小孩，把他们的刀带来，我…我想看一看他们的刀，那或许是跟我有关的东西。

- A hand-woven square carpet with excellent quality and great stain resistance. It can be found at the Weary Inn. Its exterior may appear somewhat rough, but that is intentional on the part of the innkeeper. From their perspective, the main guests are weary competitors or travelers, and an all-too-luxurious rug might add to their already leaden psychological burden, making relaxation difficult. A slightly rougher handwoven carpet, by contrast, not only allows them to use it without said pressure but also creates a homey, comforting atmosphere. ｜ 方正的手织地毯，具有极佳的质量和很强的抗污损能力，可见于倦意之屋内。这种地毯的外表看起来有些粗糙，而这正是某任店主刻意为之的——在店主看来，入住这间旅馆的主要是疲惫的选手或旅人，外表看起来过于贵重的地毯可能会增加他们原本就很重的心理负担，令他们无法好好休息。而稍微粗糙一些的手织地毯，不仅可以让他们卸下心理负担随意使用，更能打造一种像是在家中一样的感觉…
- ...! ｜ ……！
- Before the advent of modern writing utensils, information was recorded on stone slabs such as this. The law was no different. ｜ 早在还没有纸笔的时代，人们用刻画石板的方法记录一切，律法也不例外。
- You can still reach even higher and see even farther, but you can't do that just by standing here. ｜ 说了要让你摸得更高，看得更远，只是站在地上肯定实现不了吧。
- Are you... Alrani? ｜ 你是…爱拉尼？
- What I'd intended was to pretend to drown, then sneak back onto shore while they weren't looking, and find a way to rescue my wife... ｜ 我本来想假装落水，趁他们背过身悄悄上岸，想办法把我老婆救回来。
- Anyone else who comes into this domain in the future will take one look at the ruins before them and conclude that this place was abandoned years ago. ｜ 要是之后有人进入秘境，看到眼前逐渐崩塌的景象，一定会以为此处早已被遗弃。
- ...The decision was mine, and mine alone. They had nothing to do with it. If you have any concerns, gentlemen, then please direct them to me. ｜ …这一切都是我一个人的决定，跟他们没有关系。科伦汀，阿莫瑞…还有马洛尼，你们有什么问题，都来找我吧。

- Monsters infest both flanks of the valley around the Children of Echoes. The relevant personnel are currently organizing rescue operations, with Kachina among their number. - What do you want the frog for? ｜ 拿青蛙做什么？
