- Ah, look at the time... My apologies, but I have other things to attend to. I'll leave you with these two bottles of Butterfly Dew, and I look forward to seeing you again. ｜ 啊，不好意思，时间不早了，我还有一件急事要办。这两瓶收好，期待以后有机会再见！
- A legend holds that Rex Lapis laid down sturdy rocks like these on a treacherous road in Mt. Tianheng to pose an obstacle to his foes. A great general under the command of a rival god passed by, saw the rocks in the road, and scoffed: "These dainty rocks are no match for my fists." He then ordered his troops to continue their advance. To his surprise, the wheels of his chariot failed to crush these hardy rocks, and it lost control and overturned. The general fell some way down the mountain, then fled. This rock was named "Dainty Fists" in tribute to the prideful words that preceded his fall. ｜ 传说帝君在天衡山的险路布下这种顽石，阻挡来犯之敌。某位魔神麾下的大将率军经过，见路中石，曰「纤纤而不若吾之拳」，勒令部下继续前行。不料车轮无法碾碎这种顽石，失控倾覆，这位大将坠落山间，狼狈败走。而他的狂言成就了这种顽石「纤拳石」的雅称。
- ...I should leave now. ｜ …我也该走了。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Instead of having everyone ride a flamestrider at once, everyone will take turns with mine, and the person with the fastest time wins. ｜ 那就是所有人都驾驶我的驰轮车，在相同的赛道上行驶数圈，最后用时最短的人获胜。

- A more striking blue paper frog model that can be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nXudi reveals that this model series was based on a certain superstar competitor in the Rainsong Pond jumping contest. This frog displayed great jumping prowess during the competition, leaving a deep impression on Xudi. As such, he decided to make a somewhat larger model to match the frog's excellent skills — in Xudi's memory, at least, this one once leaped far higher than any other. ｜ 看起来颇为亮眼的蔚蓝色纸蛙模型，可以摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n据许迪透露，这款模型的原型是雨歌塘弹跳竞赛中的某位明星选手。这位纸蛙曾在竞赛中展现出强大的跳跃能力，给许迪留下了深刻的印象。正因如此，他特意将这个模型制作得稍大，以符合这位纸蛙曾经展现出的强大实力——至少在他的记忆中，这位纸蛙曾经跳得比所有纸蛙都高。
- You have seen that which I speak of. ｜ 我说的，你都看到了。

- If you see a messenger from the Scions of the Canopy, feel free to ask them about the latest battle situation. ｜ 你们之后遇到了其他悬木人的讯使，都可以向他们了解现阶段各地的情况。
- A simple, large bedroom that balances warmth and sophistication. For exhausted people, the bed means a quick entry into dreamland, and those who wake in the morning will enter just as swiftly into work mode.\nMany Fontainians treat interior design as a key factor in sleep, and stable sleep is key to one's work-rest cycle. From this perspective, bedroom design is indeed critical. ｜ 布局简单大方的卧室，平衡了温馨与干练的观感，对于疲惫之人而言，躺在这个房间的床上即可迅速入睡，而早间醒来之人则能迅速清醒，早早进入工作状态。\n许多枫丹人将房间布局视为影响睡眠的重要因素，而稳定的睡眠正是一个人规律作息的关键。这样看来，卧室的陈设的确相当重要。

- I went to see the Naganohara Fireworks Show with my parents when I was still a child. I will never forget the spectacular sights that night. ｜ 我还是小孩子的时候，跟随父母一起去了「长野原烟花会」，当时绚烂的光彩令我永生难忘。
- The Mausoleum's Depths ｜ 赤王陵深处
- Obtain 10 Character Cards ｜ 获得10张角色牌
- "The value of language is not limited to words. A unified language helps to govern thoughts. Language is the bottom line, rules, weapons, and violence. By making our language unique, we can open up a special path to the relative completion of minds.\nGoverning thoughts may appear meaningless to some, but to others, it has a very significant meaning. Individuals' pursuit of uniqueness gives rise to various languages and media. People are controlled by language under many circumstances."\nAs Alhaitham flipped through these pages, reaching the end of the book and its back cover, he realized that an intricate ornament had been underneath the tome this whole time.\nOf course, he knew what it was — a Vision, the proof of one's power. However, this item did not mean much to him.\nA believer might have perceived this divine item to be a thing most lofty, but to him, it was no more than a useful tool.\nAlhaitham was out on a research trip when he was given the Vision.\nHe didn't plan to dwell too much on it. It belonged to him, after all, so what difference would it make if he checked on it tomorrow, as opposed to today?\nAnd just like the knowledge he has acquired, what he has obtained shall always remain in his possession. ｜ 「语言的价值不可仅仅留存在字面。借由语言的一致性，人们统御思维。语言即是底线、规则、武器与暴力。通过令语言与众不同，我们终于能够另辟蹊径抵达思想上的相对完全。\n而统御思想固然对一部分人来说没有意义，却对绝大部分人意义非凡。个体追求的差异决定了我们掌握不同语言并使用不同媒介。人在诸多时刻受语言控制。」\n艾尔海森将印着这些话的纸张翻过去。书看到结尾了，再翻就是封底。他察觉到书本下压着一件发光的精巧装饰。\n他自然知道这是什么——证明力量的「神之眼」。但对他来说未必能有那么崇高的意义。\n神迹降临在信仰者身上更显崇高，至于对他，不过是件有点用处的辅助品而已。\n得到神之眼那一刻，艾尔海森正在外出做课题的路上。\n他不打算花太多时间打量他的神之眼。既然是属于他的东西，什么时候查看都一样。\n就像已学会的知识一样，到手的东西跑不了。
- Harness the abilities of a Yumkasaurus or companion from the Scions of the Canopy to move quickly and reach the destination within the time limit, while looking out for Tune-Up Devices and doing your best to complete Tune-Up Goals. ｜ 运用「悬木人」部族伙伴或匿叶龙的能力，快速移动，在限定时间内抵达终点，并留意挑战中的砥砺装置，尽可能完成砥砺目标。

- A saurian with a hard, bony crest and a powerful body suited to dashing around volcanic landscapes.\nAccording to legend, the Tatankasaurus's ancestors were so large they could use their horns to move mountains, but they lacked the agility of their smaller, modern relatives. Perhaps the great power that Tatankasaurs still possess is a gift passed down through their bloodline. ｜ 拥有坚硬的冠骨和强大身躯力量，能够在火山四周的原野上飞速疾驰的龙。\n传说中，原本的突角龙具有堪称庞大的形体，甚至可以用角顶着山峰进行移动，只不过行动远不如当今这样灵敏。或许如今突角龙身躯里所具备的那种力量，也是一种血脉之中的遗留。

- Defeating opponents in combat will grant Fayz Tinctures that will accumulate up to a certain point where they can be used to enter Time Dilation mode. You can accumulate up to 3 uses of the Fayz Potion at any one time. ｜ 在战斗中击败敌人可以获得溢神剂量，当溢神剂量累计到一定值时，可以使用溢神剂进入「时停超感」的状态。溢神剂的可使用次数最多累计3次。

- A mechanical device which is exceedingly complex to operate, it can open and close the paths that lead from the abandoned production zone in various directions.\nWhen activated, the arrowhead-equipped Core Gear Drivetrain and Gear Drivetrain will turn. <color=#FFE14BFF>Operate the device when the arrows are pointing in opposing directions to cause the device to stop spinning</color>, upon which the path indicated by the Core Gear Drivetrain's arrow will open. ｜ 操作极其复杂的机械装置，控制废弃生产区通向各方向连通路的开启与关闭。\n启动后，带有箭头的「核心齿轮传动器」与「齿轮传动器」会转动。在它们的<color=#FFE14BFF>箭头相对时进行操作使之停止转动</color>的话，「核心齿轮传动器」指示的连通路将会开启。

- As the saying goes, you never truly know someone until you meet them in person, and at long last, I finally have the great honor of meeting you today. My name is Yun Jin, and I am humbled to be the director of the Yun-Han Opera Troupe. We have been performing at Heyu Tea House as of late, and we'd be honored to have you attend a performance sometime. ｜ 有道是闻名不如见面，今天终于有缘与你相会，实属荣幸。我姓云，单名一个堇字，不才正是云翰社当家主事的人。我们戏社最近挂靠在和裕茶馆，日后还请多多赏光，常来听戏。

- No thanks to those Sangonomiya hooligans, the guards who are supposed to maintain order now have their hands full. A few days earlier, while I was {0}, I ran into a group of hilichurls. If they were just some ordinary hilichurls, they would not be worth mentioning, but they seem to be quite organized. Their leader was especially tall and his body was covered in lightning. If this continues, Inazuma will be overrun with these beasts! I hope that the war will be over soon, so that the soldiers can return home, while the Commission can spend more time protecting us locals. ｜ 因为珊瑚宫宵小之徒的缘故，本应保卫治安的番众似乎也抽不出手了。前些天，我{0}的时候，瞥见一群丘丘人。如果仅仅是一般的丘丘人的话，倒不值一提。但它们似乎有一定的组织性，其中还有一个特别高大、浑身冒着闪电的首领。念及长此以往，稻妻恐怕魔物遍地，便不禁期盼战事早日平复，兵士们能早日卸甲归还，奉行的大人们也能拨冗为居民的安泰想想办法。

Then I looked a little closer. And there was nowhere for me to go at all. ｜ 那时我看着破败的房屋，一时间有些手足无措。总觉得茫茫天地，看似哪里都能去，仔细想想，又哪里都去不了。

- Of course. I'll head out right now. Do you still intend to... ｜ 好，我即刻动身。所以火神大人你仍然要…
- Diluc avoids talking about the past.\n"If only Diluc were still a member of the Knights..."\nAfter a few drinks, senior knights will say words to this effect with a sigh.\nThey refer to events from a long time ago, back when Diluc's father, Master Crepus, was still the owner of the winery. Master Crepus' wish was for his son to become the most esteemed knight of all and safeguard Mondstadt, the City of Freedom.\nAs per his father's wishes, Diluc trained rigorously to make himself worthy of the Ragnvindr name. Sure enough, he passed the Knights of Favonius' trials, swore the oath of protection to Mondstadt, and entered their ranks. Before long, he received an early promotion which saw him become the youngest-ever Cavalry Captain.\nOver the course of his missions and patrols, the denizens of Mondstadt gradually came to know this young and passionate Cavalry Captain.\nNo matter what the missions demanded from him, he always maintained his composure and his passion. No matter how big the challenge before him, his boundless courage always led him to the front line. The praise he received from his comrades and citizens spurred him on.\nBut the words of praise he valued most of all were:\n"Good job. Now, that's my son."\nHis father's words fueled the fire inside his heart and served as his greatest motivation.\nHis faith was an unquenchable fire that burned strong and bright inside him.\nDiluc was so young back then. ｜ 迪卢克老爷不喜欢谈论过去的事情。\n「假如迪卢克老爷还在骑士团，那该有多好。」\n资历够老的骑士若喝了酒，便会如此感慨。\n那是很久以前的事了。迪卢克的父亲，前代酒庄主人克利普斯老爷盼望儿子能成为最优秀的骑士，守卫自由之邦蒙德。\n遵循父亲愿望不断历练的迪卢克，始终依照莱艮芬德家家规严格锻炼自己。完成骑士团的考验，许下守护蒙德的誓言后，他顺利成为骑士，又因表现活跃提前晋升为最年轻的骑兵队长。\n借由无数次任务与巡查，蒙德人认识了年轻热情的骑兵队长迪卢克。\n无论任务多么严苛，骑士的风度与热忱永不会褪色；无论挑战多么艰巨，也如利剑般活跃在最前线。骑士同侪与蒙德民众的笑容和嘉许，令红发少年坚持进取。\n但最为重要的，还是——\n「做得很好，不愧是我的儿子。」\n父亲克利普斯的赞扬点燃了迪卢克胸腔中不灭的赤焰，激励他继续迈进。\n「信念」在他的心中炽热燃烧，滚烫而恒久。\n——从前的迪卢克，正是这样的少年。
- Lyney said that the opera house is on Erinnyes, so let's go ride the aquabus! ｜ 记得林尼说歌剧院是在伊黎耶岛，我们还是坐巡轨船去吧！

### Part 078

- It's called "The Divine Damsel of Devastation." ｜ 其名为，《神女劈观》。
- Recipe ｜ 食谱
- Perhaps...? ｜ 或许？
- A photo of you and your travel companions; a memento of a land where humans and saurians coexist. Though our paths may eventually diverge, the memories we create together shall never fade. ｜ 与共同旅行的伙伴的合影，是在这片人龙共同生活的国度的纪念。在某个时期同行的伙伴们终究要踏上各自的道路，不过，曾经一同度过的时光并未因此褪去应有的色彩。
- Blood Blossom Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 血梅香持续时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Please follow me. ｜ 请您跟上我。
- Hehe, let's talk about that later. Anyway, this is the Tonatiuh we've been looking for. Our adventure's been a great success! ｜ 嘿嘿，这个之后再说，总之这里就是我们要找的天蛇船了，可以说是大成功！
- 5·5·1 ｜ 5·5·1
- A naturally-standing woodcarving torso that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving." It's painted blue and reminds people of a forest stream.\nWith its swinging hands, it resembles the lively and energetic Aranara in fairy tales who may appear anywhere in the forest. ｜ 自然站立的木刻躯干，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。以颜料涂制成蓝色，让人联想起林中的溪流。\n双手处于摆动的姿态，与童话中的兰那罗一样，活泼好动，可能会在森林中的任何一个角落出现。
- ...Unfortunately, my cousin could not give me a definitive answer on this, despite scouring the family library. ｜ 真惭愧，家姐反复查阅了家中古籍，也不敢打包票。
- ♪! ｜ ♪！
- We will need some special materials to ensure this device functions smoothly within the Mikage Furnace. ｜ 为了让这个装置能在「御影炉心」里头顺利运转，我需要一些特殊的材料。
- Rush DMG|{param1:F1P} DEF ｜ 突进伤害|{param1:F1P}防御力
- R—Really? Then we are indebted to you. Travelers are so kind these days... ｜ 是，是这样吗？那就多谢你了。现在的旅行者可真热心啊…
- I know. Not long ago, I saw a Nara passing by here, <color=#00E1FFFF>going to Gandharva Ville</color>. And he had it with him. ｜ 我知道。不久之前，看到一个那菈，从这里路过，<color=#00E1FFFF>去了化城郭</color>。他就带着。
- About the Pilgrimage... ｜ 关于归火圣夜巡礼…
- Heart of Comradeship ｜ 故人之心
- Look like lots of crawling bugs. Yuck. ｜ 好像很多虫在爬，呸。
- There's nothing particularly new about bio-alchemy. There are already people researching that. ｜ 那个啊，那个已经有人研究了，算不上什么与众不同的切入点…
- Cool! ｜ 哦哦！
- An obsidian ring with engraved patterns styled like those of the Collective of Plenty. It is an ancient medium by which the tribe established contact with the deep night. Perhaps its strength can allow you to cross the boundary between this place and a certain other location... ｜ 刻画有「沃陆之邦」风格纹饰的黑曜石环，是部族与深沉夜晚建立联系所用的古老媒介，或许可以凭借它的力量跨越某处的边界…
- In fairness to them, they haven't experienced it yet. Ignorance among the uninitiated is only to be expected. ｜ 毕竟他们还没有亲身体验过，说出这么没水平的话也不奇怪。
- Uh... Are you okay, Lady? ｜ 唔…阿姨怎么了？
- Farewell, Adventurer, and thank you for supporting the Adventurers' Guild. ｜ 再见，感谢您对协会做出的贡献，冒险家。
- An alchemical ingredient modified specially for use by the Knights of Favonius's Alchemy shop in concocting potions. In Alchemy, it primarily provides a medium amount of <color=#F39000>Constitution</color> efficacy. ｜ 专为西风骑士团的炼金店铺炼制药剂改良的药材，炼金时主要提供中量<color=#F39000>生命</color>功效。
- Gather 200 items in "A Path of Value: Jade Field." ｜ 在「贵本之道-『玄此玉田』」中收获200个采集物。
- Fine... Ask away. ｜ 好吧…您问？
- Our timing was not ideal, but never mind. Let's pass the time at Tomoki's stall. ｜ 我们来的时机不巧，不过没关系，我们去智树的摊位打发时间吧。
- Abyss Mage Emery ｜ 深渊法师·厄末瑞
- Darn it! Come on, we're getting out of here! ｜ 蹽了蹽了，麻溜的！
- "...once you get used to it, mushrooms actually don't taste too bad. It might be best to relocate to a spot where mushrooms might be found and to make camp there..." ｜ 「…如果习惯的话，蘑菇的味道还不错…继续往生着蘑菇的地方前进，接下来就去那边扎营好了…」
- But she has to instruct new students during the day, so we can only talk at night. ｜ 不过她白天还要去指导新生工作，所以只能等晚上再说了。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Go to Stormterror's Lair ｜ 前往风龙废墟
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Of course! Why, we made quite the haul on this voyage! ｜ 当然开心，这次出海可赚了不少！
- Fine, fine. You be a good host now, Rana. Don't let our guests down. ｜ 好啦好啦，知道了。拉娜，你要好好承担向导的职责，不要让两位小客人失望。
- I've said everything I can, given the Yashiro Commission's stance. Interfering too much with other Commissions' domestic issues will only create trouble. ｜ 能说的，我都已经直说了。社奉行立场如此，过分介入其他奉行的家事恐怕会引起问题。
- Photograph the Large Pneumousia Relay Station and Antoine Roger Aircraft ｜ 记录大型芒荒中继站与安东·罗杰飞行器
- Forget it now, please forget that I ever said anything! Ah, wait, but it'd also be bad if you were to forget it... ｜ 赶紧忘掉，赶紧忘掉！啊，不对，忘掉也不行…
- Help Endora capture Oceanid Creatures ｜ 帮助嫣朵拉捕获纯水动物
- Gold Gild and Emerald ｜ 鎏金与青宝石
- Experienced adventurers plan their route before scaling a mountain or cliff face. Stopping at suitable points along the way lets you gather your wits and recover stamina. ｜ 冒险家攀登高山、岩壁时，常常会规划好前进的路线。\n如果有适合的落脚点，就可以稍作休整，恢复体力。
- Thank you! These ingredients are still usable, but we cannot delay any further... I'm going to get started with the cooking now. ｜ 多谢阁下！这些食材还可以用，但不能再拖下去了…我现在就开始烹饪。
- Frostarm Lawachurls, training? That's not fair to the weak!\nStay within the <color=#FFCC33>Aura</color> in the ring until you have fully absorbed its power, after which your ATK will be greatly increased, while hits with Normal and Charged Attacks will unleash intense shockwaves! ｜ 丘丘霜铠王这种强者进行锻炼，是对弱者的不公平！\n在擂台上的<color=#FFCC33>光环</color>中滞留直到将其中的力量内化，将使攻击力获得大幅提升，并在普通攻击与重击攻击命中时释放猛烈的冲击！
- There's also Raef and Fodil, they helped me unload cargo... ｜ 还有里夫和福迪尔，上次他们俩还帮我卸过货呢…
- Stellar Reunion: Domains Unlocked ｜ 星之归还·秘境开放
- Suppression Specialist Mek - Pneuma ｜ 压制特化型机关·芒
- "Attack where the enemy is weak, emerge where the enemy is blind"... ｜ 「击其懈怠，出其空虚」…
- ♫~ ｜ ♫~
- #Hey {NICKNAME}, can I borrow your shoulders for a second? You can give me a boost and I'll pull one of them down! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，可以借用一下你的肩膀吗？我想站在你肩膀上摘一盏下来！
- How do you like it here? ｜ 在这里还习惯吗？
- Thank Barbatos! Wait a minute... ｜ 嘿嘿，要不要感谢「风神的眷顾」呀？
- My job is to ensure that everyone can eat as much as they want while ensuring that there's no waste. ｜ 要确保大家都能想吃多少就吃多少，同时还不可以浪费食物。这就是我的工作内容啦。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Slashing DMG|{param2:P} ｜ 斩击伤害|{param2:P}
- I'd love too, but my mind is restless... ｜ 非常乐意，但我有些心神不宁…
- Let's do something together! We could go on a hike, climb some trees, pet some cats, walk some puppies... I'm honestly down with whatever. ｜ 一起玩吧！爬山、爬树、逗猫、遛狗…什么都好。
- About me...? ｜ 我自己…？
- I suppose you're right... They are monsters, after all. ｜ 也是，毕竟是魔物。
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Wood ｜ 洞天百宝·木材购买获取
- You guys are finally back, eh? Jiawei didn't come? ｜ 你们终于回来了，欸？嘉玮没来吗?
- I don't know why he started working for Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. To be honest, I find their director to be quite peculiar. ｜ 不知道他什么时候去了往生堂，说实话，我觉得那里的堂主是个很古怪的人。
- Square, west! ｜ 广场，西！
- On this mountain? Well, I can only say that it's more dangerous than any other place in Mondstadt. ｜ 雪山的情况？我只能说，这里的环境比蒙德任何地方都要凶险。
- Hey, Ixlel! We've found the bits and bobs you need! ｜ 喂，伊蕾尔！我们已经把你要的零件找齐啦！
- The story goes like this: A long, long time ago, on the other side of the Mondstadt bridge, there were two Mitachurls who wielded axes...\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: Your Support Zone starts with 1 "Timmie" card.</color>\nHint: Use Elemental Reactions to deal greater DMG to your opponents! ｜ 故事是这样的，很久很久以前，在蒙德的大桥另一边，有两个用斧头的丘丘人暴徒…\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】我方支援区初始存在一张「提米」。</color>\n【提示】运用元素反应，对敌人造成大量伤害吧！
- I suspect that those behind this have already taken steps to hinder an investigation from this angle — but that does prove that this Vacher person is a key witness in the incident. ｜ 我想可能幕后黑手早就做了手脚，怕人们调查。不过这也侧面证明了，瓦谢应该的确是关键证人吧。
- I shouldn't just sit here waiting for her to come back. Professor Aisha was so determined to explore those secrets, so I should go take a look, too. ｜ 我不该只是等待的，既然是艾莎老师无论如何都要去探寻的秘密，我也要去看一看。
- Paimon doesn't quite agree... but Paimon cares more about the result than the process, okay? So, what do you grow in the nursery here? Is it tasty? ｜ 虽然很想反驳…反正我就是比起过程，更在意结果啦！所以，这里的苗圃是种什么的呀？是好吃的吗？
- No Records ｜ 暂无存档
- Mr. Sonny... You see, we only got into this business because we heard there was Mora to be made, and since the higher-ups didn't agree, we figured... We figured we could just earn the money first, and then turn all of the profits over, yeah, that's exactly it! ｜ 桑尼先生…您想，我们也只是想着这门生意很有赚头，上边又不同意，才想着…想着先赚一笔，将收入交给组织，嗯！
- Empty and forgotten. An ideal place to hide people. ｜ 空无一人的医院，刚好能用来藏失踪者。
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}
- Talk to Bennett ｜ 与班尼特对话
- Tyrant's Fang ｜ 横行霸者的利齿
- Go to the site where the auction is being held ｜ 前往拍卖会现场
- The holiday is deeply connected to the founding of Fontaine as well as its unique laws and trials. It's one of the most important festivals for this nation. ｜ 这个日子和枫丹的成立、以及其特有的「律法」与「审判」息息相关，也是枫丹最重要的节日之一。
- It would be like a human growing up alongside those creatures that go "Meow-meow" and "Woof-woof"... ｜ 在人类眼中就像…自小就一直陪着他们成长的…歌声是「喵喵」和「汪汪」的生灵。
- Destroy all Summons. (Affects both you and your opponent!) ｜ 消灭所有「召唤物」。（不分敌我！）

- Ha.. Haha... Hahahaha! ｜ 哈…哈哈…哈哈——
- These Are a Few of My... ｜ 这是我喜爱的事物中…
- According to intelligence, the target has the following special traits: \nInvulnerability to Anemo DMG \n\nAdditionally, the target has the following weakness: \nHydro RES decreased ｜ 根据调查，目标具有如下特性：\n·风元素伤害无效\n\n此外，目标具有以下弱点：\n·水元素抗性降低
- Shenhe ｜ 申鹤
- You already have Summon(s) on the field. Creating more will refresh their Usage(s) ｜ 召唤物已存在，再次创建可刷新可用次数
- Unlocks at Ascension Phase 2 ｜ 突破等级「2」阶后开启
- Veteran, Corps of Thirty ｜ 「三十人团」老兵
- Pale Mist... ｜ 失色的迷雾…
- ... ｜ ……
- However, there wasn't any way of getting more useful information on that Domain from the outside. Not for lack of trying by the Guild, but still. ｜ 不过…虽然协会也已经帮忙四处调查，但几乎没有从外界找到更多有价值的信息。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making an Athelwood Metal Buckler.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「柽木坚铁圆盾」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- The world cannot render judgments based on a desire for revenge. That will only lead to a cycle of revenge, as well as the destruction of order and civilized society. ｜ 现实不能以纯粹的报应主义进行裁决。那将会陷入复仇的循环，「规则」将不复存在、「社会」将不复存在。
- After a Pinball triggers an Overloaded reaction with the bar, it will gain the <color=#F39000>Detonate</color> effect: Upon hitting a brick, a blast that <color=#F39000>deals AoE DMG</color> to surrounding bricks will occur. ｜ 「弹球」与弹板发生超载反应后，将附加破坏效果<color=#F39000>「爆轰」</color>：命中节奏方块时，将发生爆炸，对<color=#F39000>一定范围内</color>的节奏方块<color=#F39000>造成伤害</color>。
- Has everything been going well? ｜ 工作顺利吗？
- Complete Ice in the Miso on Unending Refinement and achieve a {param2} point score ｜ 成功通过「冰块转转味噌汤」百炼难度且最高得分达到{param2}
- What're you blockheads doing just idling about? The second Captain Malinovskyi isn't here, all you bums do is slack off! ｜ 这群游手好闲的蠢货！趁着马林诺夫斯基队长不在，一天到晚就想着偷懒！
- Alright, tell me then. How should I use this fertilizer? ｜ 好了，你快跟我说说，这肥料该怎么用啊？
- Your reasoning is solid. ｜ 思路很清楚嘛。
- Food ｜ 食物
- See you. Farewell... outlander... ｜ 再见。外来者…再见。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- You mean, you don't even know if you're one of the good guys? ｜ 也就是说，你根本不知道自己是好人还是坏人？
- Speaking of, are the Pari and Aranara related in any way? ｜ 说起来，花灵和兰那罗有关系吗？
- You may have to find the Imaging Conches that the Fatui have taken to various different places to help Yakov regain his senses... ｜ 为了使雅科夫恢复理智，说不定就要找到被愚人众带到其他地方的影像海螺…
- Windtrace, the classic game that hands down Mondstadt's history, is once again being held!\nPlayers shall be split into two sides: the Rebels, members of the ancient resistance, and a Hunter sent by the ancient aristocracy, who will then have a contest of wits in the Contested Zones.\nThe Hunter's task is to capture all the Rebels, while the Rebels must constantly move and hide to avoid the Hunter until the danger has passed.\nTake part in this game to obtain Windtrace Coins and unlock all manner of rewards! ｜ 承载着蒙德历史的经典游戏「风行迷踪」已再次开放！ \n双方玩家将分别扮演反抗组织的「游侠」，与旧贵族的「猎手」，在「周旋之地」展开较量。\n猎手的任务是捕获所有游侠，而游侠需要不断藏匿与转移，躲避猎手，坚持到危险时间结束。 \n参与游戏即可获取「迷踪币」，解锁多种奖励！
- Superlative Superstrength Duration|{param12:F1}s ｜ 乱神之怪力持续时间|{param12:F1}秒
- Keep up the good work. ｜ 辛苦了。
- When the Hypostasis revives, it will have 2 layers of defensive barriers ｜ 无相元素进行复苏时，将出现2层保护屏障
- Well, you go have a word with him. I'll talk to Jill. ｜ 那你去和那个叔叔说一声吧，我也和小吉说一下。
- Huh? Are you kidding me, compadre? ...Ohh wait, I get it. The food smells so dang good, now everyone's dying to go first! Well, guess I only got my own good taste to blame. Go on, dive in, I'll wait till last! ｜ 哦？连挚友也…哦哦，一定是太香了对不对？行，既然你们都这么说的话，本大爷就最后一个吃吧！
- A manufacturing machine with fully upgraded weapons and armor. When characters enter and maintain the Nightsoul's Blessing state, the Secret Source Automaton: Firepower Enhanced will start progressing through its Adaptive Countermeasures. Once those are complete, it will start preparing its Boltsphere Cannon. During this time, the Secret Source Automaton: Firepower Enhanced will start up its Accretion Mechanism to dig into Solid Phlogiston and collect phlogiston. The Accretion Mechanism will generate an energy field. If you wish to destroy the Mechanism and interrupt the charging of the Boltsphere Cannon, <color=#FFCC33>you must first climb the Solid Phlogiston and enter the energy field.</color> ｜ 武备和装甲全面升级后的制造用机械体。在角色进入和维持「夜魂加持」状态时，「秘源机兵·火力升级套件」会积累「应战对策」的进度，进度积累满后，将开始准备「球状雷炮」，过程中，「秘源机兵·火力升级套件」会启动「汲聚械」开掘固态燃素并汲取燃素。「汲聚械」自身会产生力场，如果想要破坏「汲聚械」以打断「球状雷炮」的蓄能，<color=#FFCC33>就得先攀上固态燃素进入力场内才行。</color>
- Please find me Pure Pinecones. It's a miraculous fruit born of this world. ｜ 请为下人寻来纯洁松果，那是此片天地结出的神奇果实。
- But before that, I would like to administer the matra lie detector test. ｜ 不过在那之前，我希望你接受风纪官的「测谎」调查。
- It seems like everything that happens here gets recorded in the form of a play. ｜ 好像这里发生的所有事，会被以「剧目」的形式记录下来。
- I came here today to check and sure enough, I have made great gains on all the futures I bought! ｜ 不管买入什么期货，今天过来一看，全都是大赚特赚！
- Not that he even paid us the deposit in the first place, I mean! ｜ 更何况，那个混帐连定金都没付呢！气死我了！
- I'll leave it to you then, Traveler. After you finish delivering the dessert, we'll meet back here. ｜ 那这件事就拜托你了，旅行者。你把点心送过去之后，我们再回来这里碰头吧。
- You still have a retry, you know. ｜ 你还有一次复跳的机会。
- Um, but we don't know where the rest are even now, do we? ｜ 唔，不过剩下的大灵光在哪里，我们都还不知道呢！
- Discuss the situation with Paimon ｜ 和派蒙整理情报
- I am currently unwilling to deal with any business. I am also incapable of it. ｜ 不愿意处理事务，亦是因为无法处理任何事务。
- Well, luckily I made some progress on my end. Leyla's parents told me that he made a new friend recently, and apparently, he's been out of the house for days at a time. ｜ 我倒是有些进展，勒拉的父母告诉我，勒拉前阵子认识了一个朋友，经常一出门就好几天不回来。
- Chain Breaker ｜ 碎链
- You do you have a point though — swapping out one kind of bug for another won't necessarily improve my odds of winning... ｜ 不过你的分析也有道理，换一种虫子也不一定就能赢…
- Royal Pocket Watch ｜ 宗室时计
- Nothing left...? ｜ 一下子…？
- Hey, pick on someone your own size! ｜ 有本事冲我来！
- So let's just chalk it up to some unknown natural Aphid behavior for now. ｜ 所以暂时就先把它当作蜜虫的某种未知习性吧。
- Mm, a better question to ask might be, what do I do to make this coin happy to work with me, and show me whichever side I wish? ｜ 你应该这样问，我是怎么算计这枚幸运硬币，才让它愿意合作，我让它哪面向上就哪面向上的？
- Lightning will strike randomly in the area. ｜ 场景中会随机降下落雷。
- There are not treasures... Perhaps this campfire can really fulfill wishes? ｜ 并没有宝藏出现呢…嘿嘿，难道这堆篝火真的是用来「实现心愿」的吗？
- Aah! Help me! ｜ 啊——救命啊——
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P}+{param4:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}+{param4:F1P}

- Formed in areas rich in Phlogiston, these red, scalelike crystals are blazing-hot to the touch.\nThese are commonly found around the Great Volcano of Tollan, possibly due to periodic volcanic eruptions infusing the surrounding rocks with Phlogiston. Legend has it that a brave warrior once fought a dragon and cleaved scales from the beast's neck, and when the scales fell to the ground, they turned into Dracolite. ｜ 沉积在富含燃素的区域，逐渐形成的红色鳞状晶石，蕴含极高的热量。\n多出现在图兰大火山的区域，或许是由于火山的间歇喷发，使周围的岩层之中也富含燃素的关系。传说中，勇猛的战士与龙角斗，拔下了敌手颈下的鳞片，那鳞片落在地上，化作了如今名为琉鳞石的矿物。

If a block with this effect is not cleared in the current block-fall, it will cause up to 8 surrounding non-red regular blocks to turn red. ｜ 我方当前下落方块组内的方块转变为红色方块，并使这些方块获得<color=#ef5534>「朱赤」</color>。\n<color=#ef5534>「朱赤」</color>：携带此效果的方块若在本次下落内被消除，则提升本次消除结束后获得的能量与对敌方造成的伤害。若未在本次下落内被消除，则使其周边至多8个非红色普通方块转变为红色方块。

- But this method has its merits, too. It avoids any contamination so that we can extract the purest Scorpion venom. ｜ 但这样也有好处，可以尽可能避免污染，取到更纯净的蝎毒液。
- A flower blossom known as "Wealth" which grows from the Ley Lines in response to someone's desires. Perhaps the treasures within it can satisfy a person's monetary desires, for now... ｜ 名为「藏金」的花蕾。回应着某人的渴望而从地脉衍出，其中的馈藏，也许能暂时满足人心之财欲…
- Blooming Illumination ｜ 「盛放之光」

- Dawning Dew ｜ 晨曦清露
- My daughter was born with a chronic disease, so she has a relatively weak heart and lungs. Even slightly strenuous exercise can cause her to faint and prove to be a life-threatening risk. ｜ 我的女儿，出生起就患有一种顽疾。她的心肺比一般人虚弱，稍微剧烈的运动就可能导致晕厥，甚至面临生命危险。
- People tell me that if I just spoke more softly, or was more polite, or acted more deferentially, others may find it easier to forgive me, but the only reason they think that way is because they've never been branded a pariah before. There is no easy path to redemption when you're a social pariah. I'm more inclined to stop tiptoeing around everyone all the time and just get out there and make them respect me the old-fashioned way! As in, we square off and if they win, I humbly accept my punishment, but if they lose, they must acquiesce to my demands... Such as... Well, I mean, if I want to buy a loaf of bread, take my darn money, for crying out loud! ｜ 有人劝过我低声下气，谨言慎行，说这样也许能获得谅解，但他们会这么想，只是因为他们没当过真正的「罪人」。…「罪人」是不会轻易被原谅的，那还不如洒脱一点，上门复仇，堂堂正正地去较量。要是赢了我，我听凭处置，可要是输了，就得满足我的要求。比如…唉，至少也要好好地把东西卖给我吧。
- But it turns out that's still no match for the taste of extinct boar. ｜ 果然还是敌不过已经灭绝的野猪肉的味道。

- The windmills are spinning faster than usual today. Hey, do you think if an animal put a propeller on its back and started running... do you think the propeller would make it run faster? Or even, fly? ｜ 今天城里的风车，转得好快。欸，你说，如果在小动物背上，也装一个像风车一样的东西，会让它们跑得更快呢，还是会飞起来呢？

- Then, let's increase the difficulty. The next "tower" will be five layers tall. Now then, give it a shot. ｜ 那么现在来加大难度，把「塔」的高度追加到五层…你们再来试试？
- Craven trespassers... the majestic one's dark curse... is inescapable... ｜ …懦弱的入侵者…陛下的漆黑诅咒…无处可逃…
- It was never that impressive, but at least back in the day it was a lively village and home to several families. ｜ 以前虽然也很不起眼，但至少也是个有十多户人家的小村子。
- So that's why the war has been going unusually well... But risky secret weapons are not the answer. We must put a stop to it immediately. ｜ 难怪最近战局异常顺利…但这绝非正道，必须尽快禁止。
- Yeah! That's formed by Kapatcir and the little thunderbirds as they play and fly in circles! ｜ 那、那是，卡帕奇莉和小雷鸟在玩的时候，绕着圈子飞形成的！
- She's doing really well. ｜ 她很好。
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- Now that Paimon thinks carefully about what Basima has said, it makes a lot of sense, does it not...? Pet people are usually patient and reasonable... ｜ 不过仔细一想，拜希麦小姐说的有点道理呢…养宠物的人好像都比较有耐心，和他们讲道理也更容易…
- When there's no work to do, I'll carry out new research on such questions as how to expand a ship's cabin capacity without compromising the structural integrity of the hull... ｜ 没什么工作的时候呢，就一直在做新的研究。比如如何在不影响船壳结构强度的情况下扩大船舱容量…之类的问题。
- Hmm... Yeah, that sort of makes sense. That makes you an artist too, Yoimiya! Fireworks are your art. ｜ 唔…我好像又能理解了。果然宵宫也是艺术家，烟花艺术家。
- Come on, please hurry and snap a photo for me. Once Xavier sees the beauty of Sumeru, there's no way he'll stay in Inazuma! ｜ 来，请您快些给我拍一张画片吧。等泽维尔见识到须弥的风光，他肯定不会再待在稻妻了。
- About Varesa ｜ 关于瓦雷莎…
- Kachina is incredibly gentle and kind. From everything she says, it's clear she's always thinking about others. She has so many great qualities, but she's constantly overlooked and ridiculed because she doesn't stand up for herself. *sigh* I know she can handle herself, it's just... I worry about her lack of confidence. More often than not, she ends up believing the awful things people say about her. So, I've made it my personal mission to encourage her and share her strengths with all the people around me. I'm sure one day, everyone will see her in a new light! ｜ 卡齐娜说话会考虑很多，性格又很温和善良。明明很出色，却因为不争辩而被周围的人看轻。唉，我从不怀疑她的实力，唯一担心的，是她不够自信，容易听信那些抨击她的话…所以，除了鼓励她，我还要把她的优点告诉其他人。相信总有一天，大家会做出改变的！
- Come on, I've already sent them off. So anyway, how did you guys get here? ｜ 哎呀，台面上的话就不用讲了，你们怎么会到这儿的？
- This riddle doesn't look very difficult! ｜ 这谜语看上去不难啊！
- "Knowing their peril, the people prayed to The Soteria." ｜ 「臣民知其危险，向救世的主宰祈祷。」
- P·A·I·M·O·N ｜ P·A·I·M·O·N
- So you are an adventurer after all, and quite the experienced one at that! You were able to dispose of such powerful monsters so easily... there really always is a bigger fish. ｜ 原来是冒险家前辈！真是人外有人啊，这么难缠的魔物，你们一下子就解决了。
- It's even more impressive when you see it up close... ｜ 超近距离看感觉更震撼了…
- Don't let them escape! We shall keep Navia here with us! ｜ 别让他们跑了！今天一定要把娜维娅留下！

- Ah... He left... ｜ 啊…他走掉了…
- Ugh, too salty... ｜ 盐多…

- I hope we'll be of help to her. ｜ 希望能帮到她。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Summary</color>\nDuring the event period, Travelers will receive a sword with a mysterious power, and will complete various challenges in the Dragonspine region, obtaining Essence that can be exchanged for materials in the Event Shop.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 and complete "For a Tomorrow Without Tears" to access the quest "Traveler Observation Report." Complete "Traveler Observation Report" to take part in the event "The Chalk Prince and the Dragon."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Shop</color>\nDuring the event, you can exchange Glimmering Essence, Warm Essence, and Miraculous Essence for precious materials in the Event Shop. When the Event Shop closes, any remaining Essence in your possession will automatically disappear, and the relevant Event Shop page(s) will also close. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n活动期间，旅行者可以获取有神奇力量的剑，并在「龙脊雪山」地区完成各种挑战，获取精粹，换取活动商店中的物资。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20并完成「为了没有眼泪的明天」后，可以进行「旅行者观察报告」任务。完成「旅行者观察报告」以参与「白垩与黑龙」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动商店】</color>\n在活动持续期间，可以在活动商店中，用「微光精粹」、「温暖精粹」与「奇迹精粹」兑换珍贵的物资。活动商店结束后，持有的上述三种精粹会自动消失，同时相关活动商店页签将关闭。

- When the active character's HP is less than 50%, they gain a 2% DMG Bonus for 10s after hitting an opponent. This effect can stack up to 10 times, and each character in the party will have their own independent stacks and durations. Each time the stack count or duration of this effect resets, there is a 50% chance to release an Energy Blast. An Energy Blast can be triggered once every 10s. ｜ 当前场上角色的生命值低于50%时，普通攻击与重击命中敌人后的10秒内，造成的伤害提高2%。该效果至多叠加10次，该效果对队伍中不同角色有独立的持续时间与叠加次数。该效果叠加或持续时间刷新时，有50%的概率释放能量冲击。每10秒至多触发一次能量冲击。

- Plunge DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param4:F1P}
- "I've read in the novels that every great detective has an assistant, just like every katsudon has a pork cutlet."\nAt the Police Station, the new recruit Uesugi approached Heizou with a big smile on his face.\n"So, Heizou, what do you think? Can I be your assistant? I'm very clever."\nHeizou eyed this chirpy young man up with a grin, then rubbed his chin and replied,\n"My intuition tells me that you are not that clever."\n"Huh? May... maybe your intuition is wrong."\nThe sentence Uesugi just uttered seemed to have some magic to it as if it were a closing joke made at the end of a comedy. On hearing that, his nearby senior colleagues all laughed like a supportive audience.\nThe clever Uesugi immediately realized that he had said something inappropriate, so he tried to patch his statement up.\n"What I meant is... we can't just rely solely on intuition in our line of work!"\nUnexpectedly, everyone laughed even harder this time. Uesugi, not comprehending what had happened, thought to himself that maybe he should really consider being a comedian.\nAt that moment, Heizou brushed his shoulder as if to remove the awkwardness along with the dust.\n"I was just joking. Actually, my intuition tells me that you, Uesugi, are going to be an excellent Doushin."\n"And so, I suggest that you find your own assistant should you have the time."\nNo sooner had Heizou finished his sentence than he had run away like the wind, leaving a still-baffled Uesigi and his guffawing colleagues behind.\n...\n"You've still got a long way to go before you can be Doushin Shikanoin's assistant."\n"I was just trying to help since I noticed that he has no assistant..."\n"Of course he does. He mentioned his assistant many times."\n"What?! Has he?"\n"Didn't you hear him say 'my intuition tells me' multiple times?"\n"Huh?! Are you saying... that his assistant is... his intuition?!"\n"Exactly! That guy can solve cases merely with his intuition. Isn't that wild?" ｜ 「我看小说里面写，每一位大侦探都有助手，就像每一份炸猪排饭都有猪排。」\n奉行所里，新人上杉堆着满脸的笑容凑近平藏，\n「所以，平藏前辈，你看我怎么样？我做你的助手好不好？我很机灵的。」\n平藏笑嘻嘻地打量这位开朗的新人，摸摸下巴回答：\n「直觉告诉我，你好像不太机灵。」\n「啊？会不会…是平藏前辈的直觉出错了。」\n上杉的这句话好像有魔力，就像喜剧最终幕的结束词那样，话音一落，四下几位老资历的同僚便捧场似地噗嗤出来。\n机灵的上杉立刻明白自己说错话了，赶紧找补道：\n「我是说…干我们这一行，当然不能光看直觉嘛！」\n没想到这次大家笑得更欢了，上杉不明白笑点在哪，只是忽然觉得自己也许真该去当喜剧演员。\n这时平藏伸手掸了掸他的肩膀，像是把灰尘和尴尬一同掸去了。\n「刚才是开玩笑的啦，直觉告诉我，我们的新人上杉会成为一名优秀的同心呢！」\n「所以，有时间不如给自己找一位助手吧！」\n话音没落下，平藏就像风一样地跑远了，光留下摸不着头脑的上杉和哄笑着的同僚们。\n……\n「你小子就这水平，还想当鹿野院同心的助手。」\n「我是看平藏前辈没有助手，想帮帮忙嘛…」\n「当然有助手了，明明他都说了很多次了。」\n「欸？！有吗？」\n「不是说了很多次『直觉告诉我』吗？」\n「哈？！难道说…他的助手是…直觉？！」\n「没错，那家伙是依靠直觉就能破案的可怕角色啊。」

- It's kinda hard to believe what you just told me... First, let me make something clear: Most of us desert-dwellers might not be the scholarly type, but we do have basic common sense... ｜ 让我相信你们说的这种事，实在有点…先说好，我们这些沙漠子民可能大多都不怎么学识渊博，但基本的常识还是有的…
- We better hurry back to Vimara Village and see what's going on! ｜ 抓紧回维摩庄吧！
- The halls of death do not welcome the deluge of living things.\nWalk through the winding corridors to clean up the overpopulating Fungi and slimes, along with those hilichurls who should not have occupied the place to start with. Perhaps such offerings will lead to unexpected rewards? ｜ 死亡的厅堂不欢迎活物泛滥。\n穿越蛇行的长廊，清理其中增生的蕈兽、史莱姆与鸠占鹊巢的丘丘人，或许能够获得意想不到的赏赐？

- Floating towers manned by monsters may appear along your course. <color=#FFE14BFF>More Wavesplitter Insignias will appear along the course if you defeat the monsters</color>. ｜ 航道附近可能出现魔物们的「漂浮哨塔」。<color=#FFE14BFF>击败哨塔上的魔物后，航道上将出现更多「破浪纹章」</color>。
- Amina, there's been another delivery. ｜ 阿米娜，又有人送东西过来了。
- Whew, glad that's settled! Let's get back to the <color=#00E1FFFF>tavern</color> — You think Huffman is back yet? ｜ 麻烦也解决了，我们快回<color=#00E1FFFF>酒馆</color>吧！不知道霍夫曼回来了没？
- Brandishes her greatsword, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> to nearby opponents and creating a Lightfall Sword that follows her around for a duration of up to 7s.\nWhile present, the Lightfall Sword increases Eula's resistance to interruption. When Eula's own Normal Attack, Elemental Skill, and Elemental Burst deal DMG to opponents, they will charge the Lightfall Sword, which can gain an energy stack once every 0.1s.\nOnce its duration ends, the Lightfall Sword will descend and explode violently, dealing Physical DMG to nearby opponents.\nThis DMG scales on the number of energy stacks the Lightfall Sword has accumulated.\nIf Eula leaves the field, the Lightfall Sword will explode immediately.\n\n<i>It is easy to sink. But even so, she desires to freeze this oncoming tide.</i> ｜ 猛烈挥舞大剑，对周围的敌人造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>，并创造一柄跟随自己，至多持续存在7秒的光降之剑。\n在持续期间内，光降之剑会提高优菈自己的抗打断能力，并在优菈自己的普通攻击、元素战技或元素爆发对敌人造成伤害时，为光降之剑积蓄能量。每0.1秒只能积攒一层能量。\n持续时间结束后，光降之剑会降下并猛烈爆发，对周围的敌人造成物理伤害。\n此伤害受益于光降之剑积蓄的能量层数。\n优菈退场时，光降之剑会立即爆发。\n\n<i>沉沦是件很容易的事情。尽管如此，她仍想要冻结住这股潮流。</i>

- A dish that needs true skill to make. The plump and juicy lucky duck is irresistible as soon as it's out of the pot. Add fragrant gravy and a touch of rosy gloss, and this can be said to be the perfect combination of color, flavor, and shape, every bite a veritable flood of flavor with an enduring aftertaste. ｜ 实至名归的功夫菜。饱满丰腴的福禄鸭一出锅，便足以令人按捺不住。最后浇下香浓的芡汁，再添上一抹红润油亮，可谓是集色香味形于一体。此番应是一箸入口，三春不忘。

- A gift from Shiki Taishou — a replica that possesses sentience. With the departure of Kamuna Harunosuke, the replicas scattered throughout the Mystic Onmyou Chamber would deteriorate over time, becoming nothing but fragments of memories and Charm Magic. However, it is precisely because this is so that "Shiki Koshou" is most rare and valuable indeed. It may well be the last remaining replica that can maintain constant remote contact with Shiki Taishou as a mark of the latter's deep attachment to his friends. ｜ 「式大将」所赠的礼物，极具灵性的「拓本」。随着惟神晴之介辞去，散落在「诀箓阴阳寮」中的「拓本」日益衰损，逐渐沦为记忆与符法之力的碎片。但也正是因此，「式小将」可谓吉光片羽。它或许是唯一还能与「式大将」时刻保持联系的拓本，承载着式大将对挚友的珍重情谊。
- Well now, if I did tell you, I'd have another competitor in this world, now wouldn't I? ｜ 嘿嘿，如果把这些渠道都讲出来，那我不是要平添很多竞争对手嘛。

- Consuming Pots are special Holding Pots created by the organizer. It will constantly move and when in motion, it will touch other Holding Pots and store them within itself. Pots thus consumed will not grant you any points. A Consuming Pot needs to be hit multiple times consecutively to be destroyed. After it is hit 3 times in a row, it will grow smaller. Each hit will award <color=#f39000>5 points</color>. Each time a Consuming Pot shrinks, you will gain <color=#f39000>20 points</color>, and destroying it completely will award <color=#f39000>100 points</color>. ｜ 「吞壶」是主办方设置的特殊容壶，会在台上不断移动，移动时，「吞壶」会将碰到的其他容壶纳入壶内。当「吞壶」纳入其他容壶时，被纳入的容壶不会给予游玩者积分。需要连续击中多次，方能击碎「吞壶」。当「吞壶」被连续击中三次后，其壶身会变小。每次击中可得<color=#f39000>5分</color>，每次使其壶身变小可得<color=#f39000>20分</color>，彻底击破后可获得<color=#f39000>100分</color>。

- Well, this isn't a secret anymore. It must be the talk of the town by now. ｜ 如今，这件事已经不再是秘密了，恐怕街头巷尾都在讨论这件事吧。
- It's Kumar, my younger brother, that I'm talking about here. Now, it's pretty much a fact that the Dendro Archon has cured everyone suffering from Eleazar, Kumar being one of them. ｜ 是库马，也就是我的弟弟…众所周知，草神大人治愈了所有的魔鳞病患者，我的弟弟就是其中之一。

- Thank you for your help! This should be enough to fill my stomach... ｜ 多谢您，这些东西就够我填饱肚子了…
- A tail feather ornament whose luster has long faded. The patterns on it are said to have been etched by the hand of a skilled artisan from long ago. ｜ 已褪去华光的尾翎装饰，其上的纹路据说出自久远之前的巧匠之手。
- A handy meal-in-a-pouch that can transform most foods into instantly absorbable nutritional matter, this unique tool was designed by an alchemist attached to the Knights of Favonius. Despite the alchemist's insistence that it can greatly increase the efficiency of nutritional intake, most knights aren't too keen to put their food in it... ｜ 西风骑士团的某位炼金术士设计的特殊道具，能将大部分美食转化为能瞬间摄入的「营养物质」。尽管对这位炼金术士而言，这种做法无疑能大大提高营养补充的效率，但愿意使用它的骑士似乎不多…

- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Ann's Quiescent Residence." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「安逸的静水」。

- A young Tepetlisaurus bearing the name "Cunning," distinguished by the white scarf tied to its tail. It has an adorable yet mischievous temperament. Upon arriving in the vast and open Realm Within, Aguara often embarks on adventures using its adept burrowing skills, forging bonds with the other lively creatures, such as the Flying Squirrels.\nIt is said that in Natlan, names hold special power. Perhaps Aguara has evaded past calamities under the protection of its name, "Cunning." May the name we bestowed upon this little one safeguard its journey ahead... ｜ 拥有「狡猾」的名字，尾部系有白色丝巾的幼嵴锋龙，性格可爱且顽皮。在来到空间开阔的壶中洞天后，阿瓜拉经常依靠着娴熟的挖掘技巧各处冒险，与飞鼯等一众好动的动物们相处得十分融洽。\n据说在纳塔，名字有着特殊的力量。阿瓜拉或许正是借助「狡猾」的名字的保护，才躲过了那些灾祸。但愿我们为小家伙准备的名字，也能保护它接下来的旅程吧…
- Genta ｜ 元太

- A woven scroll from the Flower-Feather Clan. It seems like it consists of what were originally two separate stories from different eras that were then merged together at some unknown time. ｜ 花羽会传承的织卷，原本似乎是两篇来自不同时代的故事，不知何时被混淆在了一起。

- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Game Mode Summary</color>\nIn a corner of the Theater Lobby, vibrant colors have emerged on a once-blank canvas. When someone touches the canvas, it transports them to different domains, based upon their different experiences...\nExplore the worlds within the painting with specific companions, and perhaps precious memories may be painted into peerless pictures.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 35, and complete and finalize a combat performance in Act 6 or higher of the Imaginarium Theater to participate in Envisaged Echoes challenges.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge Requirements</color>\nEach Envisaged Echoes challenge corresponds to a designated character. To participate in the challenge stages, this character must be Lv. 90, and their Friendship Level must be at least 8.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Unlocking Stages</color>\nUnlocking challenge stages for 1 character requires 2 Keys of Echoes. Challenging the same stages later will not require any more Keys.\nTravelers will initially get 2 Keys. During each season of the Imaginarium Theater, you can claim more Keys by fulfilling the requirements during performances.\nYou can have up to 4 Keys of Echoes at once, and will not be able to claim more Keys while at the limit.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Rewards</color>\nObtain the cosmetic Echo reward for a character after completing the corresponding Envisaged Echoes challenges. You can equip Echoes you have already earned through the character's Outfit page. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【玩法简介】</color>\n在剧演准备间的角落里，原本空白的画布上突然浮现出了绚丽的色彩。触碰画布之时，根据触碰者的经历不同，似乎能将人传送到不同的秘境…\n与特定的同伴一起探索画中世界，或许能将珍贵的回忆绘制成独一无二的图景。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等级达到35级，并在任意一期「幻想真境剧诗」中完成6幕或以上的战斗演出并结算，即可参与「绘想游迹」挑战玩法。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战限制】</color>\n每个「绘想游迹」挑战关卡的主题都对应一位特定的角色，该角色的等级达到90级，且角色好感度等级达到8级时，才能参与该关卡的挑战。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【关卡解锁】</color>\n消耗2把游迹钥匙，可以解锁1个角色的挑战关卡，后续挑战同一关卡时，将不会再次消耗钥匙。\n旅行者初始可获得2把游迹钥匙。在每期「幻想真境剧诗」的演出中达成指定条件时，可以领取游迹钥匙。\n至多同时持有4把游迹钥匙，钥匙数量达到上限时，将暂时无法获取新的钥匙。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战奖励】</color>\n完成「绘想游迹」挑战关卡后，将获得对应角色的游迹外观奖励。已获得的游迹外观，可以前往角色-装扮页面进行装备。

- Today's my lucky day! ｜ 今天是幸运日…
- A meal after some honest work always tastes especially great. And the Ragout was... Well, it had a real "homey" feel, eh? ｜ 劳动之后的料理总是格外美味呢！而且塔塞斯杂烩该怎么说呢，很有家庭的味道？

- Hmm, this guy really has it all figured out. Not only is he thorough, he's really passionate as well! ｜ 唔，这个人考虑的事情还挺多呢，看来是个慎重的选手，但也不缺少热情！
- More About Mona: II ｜ 想要了解莫娜·其二
- Recently, Mona's teacher, an old but highly skilled female astrologist, has entrusted a very important task to her.\nHer teacher has an erstwhile rival-friend in Mondstadt, and she wanted Mona to retrieve a highly confidential box from that person's successor.\n"If you dare look inside that box... Well, you'll see."\nThat was the warning Mona received before departing.\nTo Mona's surprise, this successor was none other than the Spark Knight, Klee.\nThe box was still extant, but due to Klee's actions and a series of accidents... Mona unwittingly unraveled the enigma behind the box.\n"I—I'm done for. The thing inside this was the dark history of her youth... she will kill me if I go back like this..."\nMona was thus forced to stay in Mondstadt, beginning a bitterly frugal but bountifully fulfilling existence. ｜ 最近，莫娜的师父，一位年老且法力高强的女术士，向她交代了一项重要的任务。\n师父在蒙德有一位亦敌亦友的故人。她要莫娜从那位故人的继承者手中取回一只绝密宝箱。\n「如果胆敢窥探箱子里的东西，你就看着办吧。」\n出发前，莫娜收到了这样的警告。\n令莫娜意外的是，那位故人的继承者，居然是蒙德城的「火花骑士」可莉。\n箱子虽然还在，但经由可莉之手，以及一系列「意外」…莫娜在不知情的情况下，清楚地看到了箱中奥秘。\n「完、完蛋了。这里面居然是少女时代的日记。就这样回去的话，一定会被老太婆宰了…」\n莫娜只得留在蒙德，开始度过下一段清苦却丰富的生活。

- Gadget ｜ 小道具

- But through our local customs, the pioneering spirit of the firecrackers has been passed down to this very day. ｜ 但先民手持「爆竹」艰苦垦荒的精神被延续下来，作为一种习俗流传在民间。
- But you were sooo suspicious of them just a while ago... ｜ 明明之前还在怀疑他们…
- Foresight brings victory. ｜ 谨慎为上。
- She did not deceive me, and I was very happy. My elder siblings treated me well, and later, many younger ones came along — and I treated them just as my elder siblings treated me. ｜ 妈妈没有骗我，我很高兴。哥哥姐姐们对我都很好。后来，又有了许许多多的弟弟妹妹。于是，我也学着哥哥姐姐那样对他们。
- Pele Nui of the People of the Springs seems to have encountered some trouble... ｜ 「流泉之众」的佩蕾·努伊似乎遇见了一些小麻烦…
- Sure. Just come to me when you have the time. ｜ 也行，等你有空的时候，随时跟我说就好。
- Begin Transmutation ｜ 开始炼金
- Warriors of Natlan — heed the call of life. ｜ 纳塔的勇士们，聆听生命的呼喊吧。
- Alas, after that, he never rose from his sickbed again... ｜ 然而他再也没能从病榻上站起来…
- We got the third Vasoma Fruit! According to Araja, three Vasoma Fruits should be enough, right? ｜ 第三颗恒素果到手！按照兰拉迦之前说的，记得是三个就够了吧？
- A shrine in the style of the Grand Narukami Shrine, made using scarlet Yumemiru Wood. It is much taller and more solemn than your average shrine. Just standing next to it, you can feel the errant thoughts in your heart start to fade away.\nOf course, the weight of a shrine in the peoples' hearts has nothing to do with their size. This type of shrine is far older than the ones that can be seen in Inazuma City today. It is said that the latter type, which is simpler to make, was created as the Shogunate's response to the Raiden Shogun's order to rationalize material usage, but this narrative has never been sanctioned or endorsed by the authorities. ｜ 鸣神大社式样的神龛，由明红的梦见木所制，相较于普通的神龛而言，更为高大庄严。在这种神龛前伫立片刻，心中的杂念就会悄然消散。\n当然，神龛在民众心目中的分量与其尺寸无关。这种神龛的历史比稻妻城内常见的神龛更为久远，据说后者是幕府遵循雷电将军合理分配资源的要求，对神社神龛简化结构与工艺后的产物，但这种说法并未得到过官方的证实。
- Jinwu: Safety Technician, The Chasm ｜ 层岩巨渊安全技术员·瑾武
- Sharkan ｜ 沙坎
- We shall stop here. Thank you for your help thus far... meow, meow... ｜ 今天就先到这里吧，谢谢汝等帮忙…喵喵…
- ? ｜ ？
- I have no idea what you're talking about. ｜ 我完全不明白啊。
- Yes. This is a priceless item as far as the Akademiya is concerned. I can't just let you touch it... Wait. Who were you talking to just now? ｜ 嗯，这可是很珍贵的东西，是教令院的财产，可不能让你们乱动…不过，你在跟谁说话来着？
- So Miss Librarian, got any books to recommend? ｜ 那么图书管理员小姐，有什么你推荐的书吗？
- Oh? You two are interested in Lesser Lord Kusanali? ｜ 哦？难道说，你们对小吉祥草王大人感兴趣吗？
- Yes ｜ 是
- W—Well then, never mind about next year's Lantern Rite... ｜ 不、不过，明年的海灯节就算了…
- So, just what kind of flower was the Windblume from Old Mondstadt? ｜ 旧蒙德的风之花到底会是哪种花呢？
- Hirotatsu ｜ 宏达
- Where has that idea come from? ｜ 怎么会突然想到这个？
- Sure, go ahead. I'll a—a—ATCHOO! Answer as best I can. ｜ 你说吧，只要是我…阿嚏！知道的事。

---
### Part 079

- Well... Paimon kind of gets it. The place you mentioned is your home, and your awesome Onikabuto— they're all taken care of by your grandfather, so they're big and strong, right? ｜ 唔…我好像明白了。那个什么本阵其实就是你家，你那些厉害的鬼兜虫，都是你的爷爷帮你照顾的，所以才很大很强？
- Catch 5 Glaze Medaka within the challenge time limit ｜ 在挑战时限内钓获5条琉璃花鳉
- You push the door, but the door pushes back. You were hoping that it would open its heart to you, but the lock rejected you. ｜ 你用力推了推门，门也用力推了推你，你希望它能够敞开怀抱，但门闩发出了拒绝的声音。
- Of course. I'm sure she just got caught up in something. Still, let me know when you find her. ｜ 没问题，我觉得她或许是被什么事给绊住了。总之你们快去吧，事情解决了给我送个话。
- Indeed, using "tracing the wind's footsteps" as a metaphor for setting off on a journey is a very Mondstadt-like expression. ｜ 嗯，用「寻觅风的脚步」来作为踏上旅途的比喻，确实很有蒙德的风味。
- It blows my mind... So much free space for building and designing! It's like a sketchbook that'll never run out of pages. ｜ 真不可思议，居然有那么多自由空间可供设计，简直像是一本永远用不完的草稿本。

- I'll take good care of him. ｜ 我会好好照顾凯亚的。

- Secret Source Automaton: Configuration Device ｜ 秘源机兵·构型械
- Oh, I'm not after your patronage. ｜ 不是在招揽生意啦。
- Ahem... actually, he did seem to be investigating a case. ｜ 咳咳…其实他好像确实是在查案。
- Um... "Pierogi"? ｜ 唔…「奶油饺子」？
- There was nothing embarrassing or shameful about it. ｜ 又不是什么值得遮掩的话题。
- Wowowow, this is delicious too, and this, and that... Ahhh, I'm too stuffed to eat another bite! ｜ 呜哇，这个也好吃，那个也好吃…实在是吃不下了！
- In any case, would you like to have a go? The initial test involves the simultaneous smashing of these stone pillars. ｜ 怎么样，你要试试吗，只要能同时打碎这些石柱，就算是通过初步的考核了。
- About the Gate of Injury... ｜ 关于伤门…
- Furina? You managed to get an invite to the drinks reception, too? ｜ 芙宁娜？你也被邀请来酒会了吗？
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Arapacati looks strange. Is anything troubling you? ｜ 兰帕卡提的样子好奇怪。有什么烦恼的事情吗？
- A package that has been left on the ground. It's not very heavy; the sound of something clattering inside can be heard when picking it up. It must contain many small objects. ｜ 遗落在地上的包裹，入手没多少重量。拿起来的时候能听见哗啦的响声，里面似乎装着很多零碎的小东西。
- Plunge DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param9:F1P}
- I've got toys for adults too, if you'd like. ｜ …还有一些，是大人的玩具。
- Yeah, we'll talk more when I have more time... ｜ 嗯，等我稍微闲一点了，我们再聊…
- Well, before Inazuma we spent some time in Liyue. They have lots of supernatural beings there, like the adepti. ｜ 来稻妻之前，我们去过璃月。璃月有很多仙人哦。
- One of The Four Winds of Mondstadt: Dvalin, the Dragon of the East.\nWith the passage of long years and amid boundless darkness, even the purest gem will become dulled by dust, and even the noble dragon might be corrupted and cankered by hatred.\nBut never forget that dust can be wiped away, and the power of doubt and poison can be shattered.\n\n<i>"Fly freely in the sky.</i>\n<i>"Just like you did in those days when we met, when I walked upon this land and sang the songs of the wind,</i>\n<i>"And you soared on high, looking down on the world from above.</i>\n<i>"Today, the sky is no longer swept by wind and snow. The green grass grows all over the earth, and it is beautiful.</i>\n<i>"If you too could walk the earth and listen to the songs of shepherds and the scattered sound of wind chimes in the distance, if you could have tasted wine as sweet as honey, you would understand.</i>\n<i>"How wonderful it would have been if you were as I, witnessing your noble, beautiful form as you soared through the blue sky.</i>\n<i>"Then you would know that this sky and this earth are both things worth fighting for."</i> ｜ 蒙德的「四风守护」之一，东风之龙特瓦林。\n在漫长的岁月与无边的黑暗中，清澈的宝石也会蒙尘而变得黯淡，高傲的龙也会被侵蚀而充满了忿恨。\n不过，要记住，尘埃能被轻易拭去，疑惧与毒也能被粉碎。\n\n<i>「自由地在深空中翱翔吧。</i>\n<i>「就如当年你我相遇时，我行走在大地上，唱着风的歌曲；</i>\n<i>「你则在大气稀薄的高天上，俯瞰世界。</i>\n<i>「如今的天空中没有风雪，大地上充满了绿草，会很美丽吧。</i>\n<i>「如果你也在地面上行走过，听过牧歌和风铃在远方错落的歌，尝过蜜一样甜的酒，就会明白吧。</i>\n<i>「如果你曾是我，看见过你在蓝蓝的天上滑翔的孤高模样，见识过你的美丽身姿就好了。</i>\n<i>「如此，你就会明白，这样的天空与大地，是值得为之奋战的。」</i>
- Let's go back and tell Neko... ｜ 我们回去告诉寝子吧。

- Great. Thanks a lot. ｜ 那就好，辛苦您了。

- Ilyas also said that he wanted to tell us the truth at Gandharva Ville, but he didn't have the courage. ｜ 还有伊利亚斯，他说他在化城郭的时候，曾经想把真相告诉我们，但没有勇气开口。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Duration</color>\n{0} – {1}\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nTravelers with Adventure Rank 16 or above.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nEveryone in Liyue Harbor is getting ready for the biggest celebration of the year — Lantern Rite! Though something seems out of the ordinary this year...\n\n(During Lantern Rite, storyline quests will be unlocked each day.) ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动时间】</color>\n{0}~{1}\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶16及以上\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n璃月港全境都在筹备一年之中最重要的节日——「海灯节」。似乎有什么不同寻常的事情将要发生…\n\n（海灯节活动期间内，剧情任务每日逐步开放。）

- Elemental Burst DMG dealt by all party members will be increased by 20%. ｜ 队伍中所有角色的元素爆发造成的伤害提升20%
- Dehya's Max HP is increased by 20%, and she deals bonus DMG based on her Max HP when using the following attacks:\n·<color=#FFD780FF>Molten Inferno</color>'s DMG will be increased by 3.6% of her Max HP.\n·<color=#FFD780FF>Leonine Bite</color>'s DMG will be increased by 6% of her Max HP. ｜ 迪希雅的生命值上限提升20%；此外，基于生命值上限，迪希雅的以下攻击造成的伤害提高：\n·<color=#FFD780FF>熔铁流狱</color>伤害提高值：生命值上限的3.6%；\n·<color=#FFD780FF>炎啸狮子咬</color>伤害提高值：生命值上限的6%。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Look into Paimon's eyes!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Something the matter?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Kaeya said that people's eyes will betray them.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> He can tell if someone is telling the truth or not just by looking into their eyes.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Huh...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon loves Fisherman's Toast!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> That should be the truth. Haha, well, that's also because you love everything that can be eaten.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Hehe.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Speaking of looking into people's eyes... I remember one gaze that left a particularly deep impression on me.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Whose gaze was that?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> A Ruin Guard's. Really made me want to poke its eye out... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>看我的眼睛！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>怎么了？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>听凯亚说，人的眼睛会出卖自己。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>他只看眼睛就知道，那人说的是不是真话。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我喜欢渔人吐司！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>应该是真话。因为你只要是吃的，好像什么都喜欢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嘿嘿。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>说起来，上一个见过的，眼神充满热情的是——\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>是？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>遗迹守卫。让人很想戳下去…
- But didn't Chiori say she was able to make the dress from what was left of the original deposit? ｜ 咦？但昨天千织好像说订金的钱够用呀。
- Oh, right! I never told you about Bluey, did I... How about this? You tell me more about "Ray-more-young Golems," and I'll tell you about Bluey! ｜ 对喔，我好像还没给大山讲过阿蓝的事情…这样吧，你再给我讲一讲「累牡蛎牙」的魔像，我就给你讲阿蓝的故事好啦！

- We just came to have a chat, and then all of a sudden, these guys were threatening you! ｜ 我们来陪你聊聊天，没想到刚来就看见这几个坏家伙威胁你。

- "I hope that my colors may abide in your memory always." ｜ 「我希望你的记忆里也会有我的颜色。」

- Have you been to Natlan? ｜ 你去过纳塔？

- I had no idea that you'd purchased such an enormous plot of land... And it's amazing what you've done with the place. You must have put a lot of time and thought into it. ｜ 没想到你购置了如此广袤的土地，还能将它打理得井井有条，想必花费了不少心思。
- Oh, you think so? Well, you definitely have a knack for it. I've actually been looking out for someone with your talent. ｜ 哎呀，居然是这样？那您真是太有天赋了，实不相瞒，我一直在找这样的人选。

- You polish off the entire bottle in a single great swig, and experience the unique sweetness of Fonta with a fleeting sense of satisfaction, but it seems as if something is not quite right. ｜ 你一口喝完瓶中的枫达，确实感受到了枫达独有的甜味，还有短暂的满足感，但似乎有哪里不太对。

- Oh, come on... The ninja's actions have been discovered by the enemy, and large numbers of them surround him on every side. The ninja believes that it's time to go. ｜ 我的天…忍者的行动被敌人察觉了，大量的敌人从四面八方向忍者包围了过来，忍者觉得自己该撤退了。

- Don't go thinking this is over! Our superiors are gonna hear of this when we get back to Gandharva Ville! ｜ 你们别以为这件事就这么算了，等我们回了化城郭，一定会把情况上报的！
- I haven't battled in ages. Guess I'm out of practice... ｜ 太久没斗虫，果然还是生疏了…
- Oh! And the beast is silent! Is my dream so grand that even a dragon finds it difficult to consume? ｜ 恶龙为何一言不发？是我的梦想太过伟大让它一时之间难以消化？
- A valuable Ornamental Fish that may be kept as a pet in the Molten Lava Pool.\nDespite the name it has been given, this creature is not actually a fish, but a medium-sized amphibian. It has a rather unique appearance with a distinctive flat head that bears a striking resemblance to a fist blade, giving it the look of being constantly ready for fierce battles with its natural enemies. In fact, they are gentle in nature and not aggressive in the slightest. The real purpose of their formidable-looking "blades" is to reduce water resistance when swimming through rivers. Thanks to their special head structure, they can navigate swiftly against the flow of turbulent currents, earning them the name "Rapidfighting Fish."\nThis subspecies of Rapidfighting Fish, living as they do in liquid Phlogiston, possess exceptionally tough skins that are particularly resilient to high temperatures, earning them the moniker "the fish that can't be grilled." Of course, most fishing enthusiasts who get their hands on a Magma Rapidfighting Fish tend to treat them as precious ornamental fish, nurturing them with loving care rather than sending them to the kitchen... ｜ 珍贵的观赏鱼，可被饲养于「熔流岩池」中。\n名中带鱼却不属鱼的中型两栖生物，外形独特，有着拳刃般别致的扁平头部，似乎随时能与天敌激烈战斗。实际上，它们天性温和，并不好斗，这种头部构造只是为了减少在河中游动时的水流阻力。得益于这种头部构造，它们能够破开湍急的逆流，在各个水域自如地穿梭，因而获称「斗士急流鱼」。\n生活在液态燃素中的斗士急流鱼亚种有着格外坚韧的表皮，耐受高温的能力尤为出色，被誉为「无法做成烤鱼的鱼」。当然，大部分钓鱼爱好者钓获了炽岩斗士急流鱼后，都会将它们当成珍贵的观赏鱼用心饲养，而不是送进厨房…
- With progress like this, who knows when we'll be fit for battle. I suppose all we can do for now is wait for the drillmaster's next visit and ask him for more tips. ｜ 按这个进度，不知道我们什么时候才能上战场。只能等下次教官来的时候，再向他请教一下了。

- #Color: {FIREWORK_REFORM#1}\nSize: ×{FIREWORK_REFORM#3}\nHeight: {FIREWORK_REFORM#2}\nRotation: {FIREWORK_REFORM#5}°\n\nA firework commissioned by a merchant who often traveled between Liyue and Mondstadt. This firework is said to be a token of gratitude for a certain bartender, for it was after being deeply struck by her words that the merchant stopped their excessive drinking and made a great fortune. ｜ #色彩 {FIREWORK_REFORM#1}\n大小 ×{FIREWORK_REFORM#3}\n高度 {FIREWORK_REFORM#2}\n旋转 {FIREWORK_REFORM#5}°\n\n曾在璃月与蒙德之间频繁来往的商人委托工匠制作的烟花，据说是为了对某位特别的酒保表示感谢——被那位酒保的话语震撼后，商人不再贪杯，并因此斩获了大量业绩。

- I try my best to play it cool when making new friends, but... hehe... Sometimes people pull me aside and tell me I'm too enthusiastic, to the point of being a little overwhelming. So, now, I try to tone it down a bit at the beginning, and let them warm up to me first...\nOh, and please tell me if I'm ever too much, okay? Don't worry about hurting my feelings. You could even write me an anonymous note, if you want. I promise I'll make it right! ｜ 虽然我尽量会用大家都能接受的方式交朋友，但…呵呵…有时候也会有人委婉地告诉我，我太热情了，反而不好招架…所以，现在我在刚认识新朋友时都会收敛一点，熟了再热起来…\n哦，如果你跟我相处过程中有任何不愉快的地方，请不要犹豫，也不要有心理顾虑，直接告诉我！不想当面说，写个匿名纸条也可以哦？我一定会改正的！

- Our problem has been solved. ｜ 问题已经被解决了。

- While exploring the ruin, Navia fell into water containing Primordial Seawater... ｜ 在探索遗迹的过程中，娜维娅坠入混有原始胎海水的海中…

- No river awaits, and the lotus leaves do not exist for us. The pond has never seen victory's laurel, nor a princess. ｜ 没有河流在等待，荷叶并非为我们而存在。池塘从来没有桂冠与公主。
- Anyway, we've already got one key, so all we need to do is find the remaining two. ｜ 总而言之，现在我们已经得到一把钥匙了，看来只要再弄到另外两把就好了。
- Speaking of which, didn't you complain about being exhausted and not discovering anything so far? How are you this motivated now? ｜ 说起来，提尔扎德刚才不是还抱怨好累，到现在都没什么收获之类的…怎么现在又突然这么有干劲了？
- Nilou wanted to write to everyone, but she wasn't sure where the letters should be sent, so she asked us to come find everyone personally. ｜ 妮露想给大家写信，但不确定信件送到哪里才好，就委托我们来找大家。
- In order to help Leyla find his spirit, Citlali plans to get more info from within the tribe, but how successful was she...? ｜ 为了帮助勒拉寻回他的灵性，茜特菈莉计划去族内打探更多消息，不知道她的成果如何了…
- You need not be so humble, Honored Adeptus. Among all the kites, yours was quite literally a cut above the rest. Please accept this prize. You deserve it. ｜ 仙家不必客气。在众多风筝里，您的风筝无出其右，实属仙巧。奖品理应由您收下。

- I exercised my own judgment in the matter. ｜ 我当然有我的判断。

- A small flower-shaped insignia. If you listen carefully, you can almost hear a flute playing and voices singing. ｜ 小小的花形徽章。侧耳细听的话，仿佛能听到悠扬的笛声和清新的歌唱声。
- If "Auguste" could be considered a poison, we wouldn't have even sold half a bottle back then. Edgar fell unconscious because Kirya forced him to drink perfume... it just happened to be "Auguste"! ｜ 如果它真算毒药，当年连上架都上不了。艾德加现在昏迷，都是基里亚强灌给他害的！

- An ordinary model mine cart loaded with all manner of ore. It can be placed on a "Good Shelf" for display.\nEven though this design prizes simplicity, its stable design gives it a steadying aura, as if it will grant the ore safe passage no matter how treacherous the terrain. ｜ 平平无奇的矿车模型，其内满载着各种矿石，可被摆放在「好架子」上进行展示。\n虽然这个模型的造型颇为简单，但得益于四平八稳的外形，总有一种独特的稳定感，似乎无论穿过怎样的地形，都能将矿石安全地运送到站。
- I'll try to break it open. ｜ 我来破开。

- With enough experience... ｜ 要有足够的见识…
- If you're heading to Jueyun Karst, please bring me back a bunch of Qingxin. Just one bunch is enough. Travel expenses...? Ah, I almost forgot. During the effective period of our contract, travel expenses are to be paid for by yourself. Sorry to bother you. ｜ 你若去往「绝云间」，便替我采来一束「清心」吧。一束就好。此行的旅费…啊，差些忘了，「契约」生效期间，旅费由你代为垫付。那就有劳了。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>End Phase:</color> For each one of your characters downed during this Round, all of your remaining character(s) will gain 2 Shield points (Can stack, max 4 points) and permanently deal +1 DMG (Can stack, max +2 DMG). ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>结束阶段：</color>本回合每倒下一个我方角色，所有我方剩余角色就获得2点护盾（可叠加到4点），并且造成的伤害永久+1（可叠加到+2）。
- Mm-hmm, thanks! You really remind me of my brother. He's always reminding me to do stuff too, hehe. ｜ 嗯，谢谢你！你说话好像我哥哥哦，他也总是这样叮嘱我，嘿嘿。
- Through countless melancholy moments, the clouds are now at last clear. Gazing ahead, she will surely make the right decisions. ｜ 纵有千般愁绪，此刻也云开雾散。展望前方，她一定会做出正确的决断。
- Huh... Honestly, you two... ｜ 呵…真是的。
- Got it! Let's hurry! ｜ 知道了！我们赶快去吧！

- So we're actually inside the wine barrel? ｜ 我们其实在酒桶里？
- And all those who pass the test will receive a small blessing from Madame Mage... ｜ 而通过了考验的朋友，会得到魔女小姐送上的一份小小的祝福…

- I like this girl's humor... Her vagaries are most amusing. ｜ 我喜欢这女孩的幽默感…若有似无的。

- Receiving a Gift: III ｜ 收到赠礼·其三
- · The Elemental Node in this challenge will apply a Pyro buff to nearby opponents at intervals. Hydro attacks can remove this buff effectively through the Vaporize reaction and deal more DMG using the Ley Line Disorder here. ｜ ·挑战中的「元素试炼仪」将间歇性使周围的敌人获得火元素增幅效果，强化敌人。水元素攻击可以通过触发蒸发反应，解除敌人的火元素增幅效果，并利用地脉异常的效果造成更多伤害。
- Let's go to Xinyue Kiosk. ｜ 走，去新月轩。
- And now, I have finally seized the chance to collaborate! It took me much trekking across the land to petition Yujing Terrace and contact the Knights of Favonius, but eventually... ｜ 这不，终于让我逮到机会，本堂主不惜亲自出马，又是拜托玉京台又是联系西风骑士团，好一番东奔西走…
- This place is reserved, so scram. ｜ 这场子有人包了，别来凑热闹。
- Quest Use - Overpowered Atomic Energy Orb (All) ｜ 任务用-超量原子能量球(全)
- They came here to fight against monsters from the Abyss... ｜ 他们是来对抗深渊魔物的…
- Truly... Well, it's not unexpected. The northerners from the snowlands have long tried to push into our lands. The treacherous amongst our number fell prey to their words and turned against us. ｜ 这样吗…这并不奇怪，因为从雪国而来的北方人一直在渗透我们的领地，许多叛徒听信了他们的诱惑，转而与我们为敌。

- Eula will never admit that she actually cares about him. ｜ 在「嘴硬」这一点上，优菈也不输呢。

- Nilotpala Lotuses can be found all over the rainforest, but it often grows right here around Gandharva Ville. ｜ 月莲在雨林分布很广，化城郭附近也是主要生长区。

- Some greedy merchants and mercenaries try to hawk "antiques" of unknown origin in Port Ormos at exorbitant prices, but their goods are nothing more than secondhand trash. Hmph, I bust their scams whenever I catch sight of one. My skill in antiques appraisal is probably second only to the gods of the Seven. ｜ 有些黑心商贩和佣兵常常混进奥摩斯港，拿着不知从哪弄来的「古董」高价兜售，其实全是些用坏用旧的破烂！哼，我见一次就拆穿一次。论「鉴古」，除了「尘世七执政」，我还没觉得自己能差过谁的。
- #Finally, we're here! Amazing, Nara {NICKNAME} is. Take the Kusava out, yes, right here. ｜ #终于到啦！很厉害，那菈{NICKNAME}。拿出「苦舍桓」吧，就在这里。
- Hey, cut the attitude! We're supposed to be on the same side! ｜ 你这家伙怎么一副事不关己的样子呀，你跟我们也是一伙的吧？
- You have a point. ｜ 你说的有道理。
- I can't think of anything else. ｜ 想不到什么好办法了。
- No, never mind. It's a very long story, no doubt... Either way, I have something to ask of you. ｜ 不，先不管是什么原理，肯定是非常复杂的原理…总之，我有件事要拜托你。
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」
- Hey, c'mon, a bit slower, will you? These old bones can't keep up with your pace... ｜ 哎哟，慢点儿，慢点儿！我这把老骨头，可跟不上你的速度…

- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。

- This is my duty, not hers. ｜ 这是我的职责，不是斯露莎的。
- Alright, get ready, everyone. Time to purge the Abyssal energy from this place. ｜ 直接开始吧，各位准备好，把深渊的力量赶走。
- A mechanism like that exists? Why haven't I heard of it before...? ｜ 真有这种机关吗，怎么从来没听过…
- Araji? Isn't that someone you mentioned? An Aranara who lived in the past? ｜ 兰拉吉？难道不是之前说的那个，以前的兰那罗吗…
- Speaking of the fragments, are there really clues to them around here? Paimon doesn't see anything... ｜ 话说回来，这里真的有碎片的线索吗？一点头绪也没有…
- So the Sage's gift wasn't an "elixir that can cure all injuries," but rather the hot spring here? ｜ 所以「盗火贤者」的馈赠，根本就不是「治疗一切创伤的秘药」，而是这里的温泉？
- I was scammed by Ningguang previously and ended up without a single Mora to my name. ｜ 我，立本，上次着了凝光的道。亏得一穷二白。
- Go to collect ｜ 前往采集
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Oh, it's someone we know? Hmm, that doesn't narrow it down much — we know lots of people in Mondstadt... ｜ 熟人？我们在蒙德城有好多熟人…
- The weather's not bad. Let's get some sun! Hehe, after all, it's excellent for your health. ｜ 天气不错，多晒晒太阳，对身体也好。
- Is that so... Nice! I'll keep working at it, then! ｜ 是这样吗…好嘞！那我要继续努力了！

- Let me adjust my deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- But I can't be the only one being cured by Guoba and Yuegui! I want everyone to bear witness to their cuteness for themselves! ｜ 不能只有我被锅巴和月桂治愈！我要让大家都见证锅巴和月桂的可爱！
- ...It could have been an underground palace in the distant past. ｜ …这里在古代或许是一处凹陷的地宫。

- Follow Last Rotation ｜ 跟随旋转
- Hmm... I don't know if she likes the snacks I made for her... If possible, I'd really like to meet her myself. ｜ 嗯…不知她喜不喜欢我为她准备的点心呢…如果有机会的话，还是希望能亲自见她一面啊。
- Now that I have had much time to think on it, I fear he must have learned of Remus's plans somehow, and thus was able to set up such an inescapable trap and lure me in, step by step... ｜ 如今想来，他恐怕不知从何处早就窃知了雷穆斯的计划，才能一步步引诱我，布下如此天罗地网吧。
- This could very well have something to do with the Defiled Statue. We should go as well. ｜ 很可能与「污秽逆位神像」有关，我们也去看看。
- Let's head back to where the others are. ｜ 我们先回到大家身边吧。
- It will be your name from now on. ｜ 这个就是你的名字啦。
- Your bunks are right over there. Follow me. ｜ 你们的床位在那边，我带你们过去。
- If that's the case, then why don't we make her a nice meal? The act of eating together will express our intentions perfectly! ｜ 既然如此，不如就给她做一份好吃的东西吧！大家一起吃饭的话，「心意」自然就能传达到啦！

- <i><color=#FFffff90>It's so dark!</color></i> ｜ <i><color=#FFffff90>好黑啊！</color></i>
- People pass to and fro beneath the Stone Gate, and the scent of Dandelion Wine drifts in the air alongside laughter and cheer. The wending water and wafting winds greet the start of a poetic adventure with friends. ｜ 石门之下人来人往，蒲公英酒的香气与人们的欢声笑语飘荡在空中。循着流水与清风，开启一段和朋友们的诗歌之旅。
- Who are you again? ｜ 你们是？
- Ah, um... No, it's nothing! Don't you worry about a thing! ｜ 啊，不…不是，没什么！请您不要在意！
- Obtained from Limited-Time Event ｜ 限时活动获取
- Haha, not at all. I'm well aware that you're friends of his. Actually, I'm here to pass along a message from him... ｜ 呵呵不会的，我很清楚你们是那维莱特大人的朋友。这次我过来也是为了给那维莱特大人传话…
- A prism that can bend light.\nIn the darkness, these prisms can spread thin light into a wider area. Perhaps this is due to this quirk that these prisms can grant a measure of peace to those whose hearts are oft shrouded in darkness. ｜ 能够偏转光线的棱镜。\n在黑暗中，棱镜可以将细微的光明散布到更大的范围里。或许也是因为这样的特性，这种棱镜对于内心常常被黑暗笼罩的人，有着令他们稍稍安心的力量。
- Ah, you'd like to learn the art of the sword? Let me see... Alright — here, take this. It's a bamboo blade I just made. With these, we can practice sparring without having to worry about getting injured. ｜ 想学剑道的话…我想想，拿着这个吧，这是我刚刚做好的竹刀。用这个切磋的话，我们就都不会受伤了。
- ...I think you've perhaps misunderstood my philosophy, but that's okay. I can answer your question, but there's somewhere I need to show you first. ｜ …阁下对我的理念好像有些误解，没关系，我可以回答阁下的疑问，只是希望阁下能随我去一个地方。
- No. This has to do with my convictions! Using visual attraction to sell fruit is just a cheap trick. I would never do that. ｜ 不，这是我的信念与底线。靠外形吸引眼球终究是投机取巧的行为，我是绝对不会做的。

- That is a major discount... ｜ 忽然便宜了好多！
- Psst! Over here... ｜ 过来一下…

- Complete the boat handling challenge ｜ 完成舰船驾驶挑战
- You're really good at taking care of people... Even though you're so short, you still talk and act like an older sister. ｜ 好会照顾人啊，明明个子这么小，讲话做事像个姐姐一样。
- I imagine this must have taken Baishi completely by surprise. ｜ 这样的安排，应该完全超出百识的预料了吧。

- I once tried to use my Vision to create a plant species that could grow without any nourishment. Unfortunately, my attempts were entirely unsuccessful. It just goes to show, even with the power of a Vision, there's still a limit to what is possible. You can't defy the laws of nature. ｜ 我曾想借助神之眼，创造一株无需汲取营养也能生长的植物。很遗憾，尝试以失败告终。看来哪怕有了神之眼的力量，有些超出自然规则以外的事情还是无法实现的。

- Monster attack!!! ｜ 有魔物！
- Maybe only a small number of people who attend the event will ever actually encounter a scam artist. ｜ 可能到时候来参加活动的人有很多，可真会遇上骗子的大概没几个。
- Yes. It's painfully obvious. ｜ 并非我们的揣测。
- About marine life... ｜ 关于海洋生物…
- Mountain Shaper ｜ 理水叠山真君

- *sigh* Anyway, I have to go fix those cracks for them. ｜ 唉，总之我先去帮他们重新整修了坏掉的部分。
- They tasked me with protecting the evacuees, and at the very least, to ensure that they left the city. As we speak, a rescue team from the Flower-Feather Clan is on their way... ｜ 他们让我保护那些撤离的人，至少要让他们离开这座城，「花羽会」的救援就在路上…
- Yes... I've been in charge of greeting the people coming here for fortune slips for a while now, and I have heard all sorts of wishes from all manner of people. ｜ 嗯…我一直负责接待前来神社求签的人，也听闻了不少世人的愿望。

- Believe me, I'll reward you for your help... As long as you trust me. ｜ 请相信我，我一定会好好报答你的…只要你相信我。
- Oh! That's right! So you can't fail again! ｜ 喔喔！没错没错，所以你绝对不会再失败了！

- That's it? Doesn't quite compare to the scale described in the legend. ｜ 就只有这样吗？远远比不上传说中的规模啊。
- Hahah! To think that we were able to get this done without the Captain's help... I can't wait to see how shocked she'll be at our progress! ｜ 哼哼，这次的订单完全没有依赖大姐头就办成了，等她回来，也一定会惊讶于我们的成长吧！
- "Dragon of the East" Dvalin ｜ 东风之龙·特瓦林
- If she wasn't so busy with work, you can bet she'd come back here and chew us both out in person! ｜ 要不是她那边也全是麻烦事，指不定要来说我们一趟！
- If you're still up for a little more fun, why not pick another region to go treasure-hunting? ｜ 如果你还没玩够的话，就换个地区继续寻宝吧。
- Well, I don't know why he changed his mind so suddenly, but... ｜ 唔，虽然不知道为什么爸爸突然改变了主意…但是…
- What gift could I get you, Sister Sorush? ｜ 斯露莎姐姐想要什么谢礼呢？
- Ugh, what to do... Wait, do you need ore? What would you say to going over there and grabbing it all first? ｜ 怎么办…那个，你需要矿石吗？要不要去那个地方看看，先把它们采走？
- But now I've run into you, which is just my luck... Or maybe I've incited the wrath of the Turnfire, and this is the price I have to pay. But I don't understand, what did I do wrong? ｜ 可我有点不走运，居然你们也在这，难道是我做了什么错事，回火来向我索要代价了吗？
- I just got a minor fracture, so I had to rest at Bimarstan for a while. ｜ 问题不大，只是有点骨折，在「健康之家」休息了一段时间。
- When within this mysterious dark mud, characters will continuously lose HP and their mobility will be affected. Your Lumenstone Adjuvant's energy will also slowly drain under such circumstances. ｜ 处在这种神秘的「黑泥」中时，角色会持续损失生命值，行动能力也会受到影响。「流明石触媒」中储存的能量，在这种情况下也会渐渐流失。
- Don't tell me... This one is broken too!? ｜ 怎么这台也坏了！
- That's quite a lot of trust you're putting in us. ｜ 你还真信任我们啊。
- That said, Paimon couldn't have imagined that the "friend" you always spoke about was ... Well, "monster" seems a bit rude, and "thing" might be pretty offensive... That's right, your friend's so blue! No wonder you call her Bluey! ｜ 不过真想不到，小茂一直说的「朋友」原来是这样的…说「怪物」、「东西」感觉太冒犯了…呃，小茂的朋友真的好蓝！难怪叫阿蓝！
- I'd also guess there are many others here who are more or less like her. Let's let the guards take care of them for now, and keep pushing forward. ｜ 这里的人可能或多或少都会有这种情况，先交给看守来照看吧，我们继续行进。
- He's been taking advantage of Sabzeruz Festival fever to plan a film based on various historical documents and folklore, using the latest Fontainian technology. ｜ 最近他趁着「花神诞祭」的热潮，根据各种历史文献和民间传说，结合枫丹的新技术，设计了一部映影。

- Ugh, don't even ask. Just the thought of it makes my blood boil! First, the Shogun's Army goes out and steals everyone's precious Visions — which, already a heinous crime, right? I mean, think about it... the more powerful the Vision, the higher up on the statue it should go, that would make sense, right? But nooo, some class-A jerk in the Tenryou Commission thought it'd be funny to put my Vision right at the very bottom! Ugh... - Navia's original intention behind combining a gun with an umbrella was quite simple: she just didn't want to carry too much around, as this would affect her ability to conduct other business.\nIt rains often in Fontaine, and the rain gives way to merciless sun, so umbrellas are a must when going outdoors. And it would not do for the Demoiselle of the Spina to go without a gun, for surely none would think it an ornament in her hands.\nHer sharpshooting skills are born of much practice, with her principle being that any stance will do so long as you hit your shots — even propping your barrel atop a Blubberbeast is fine.\nClorinde, trained in the art of Marechaussee Hunter marksmanship, tends to shake her head at this, even as words of affirmation tumble out of her mouth. "I find your optimism regarding battle is quite admirable."\nNavia takes that as praise. She met Clorinde when she was a (self-proclaimed) big girl of something over ten years, and is thus quite used to the latter's mannerisms. Yes, those are accurate words of praise, indeed!\nOptimism is indeed a rare psychological quality not to be undervalued. Many are those who intentionally seek to cultivate such a characteristic, yet prove unable to smile amidst life's struggles, while Navia appears to have been born with this ability. To her, there are only two types of trouble in this world: The solvable, and the unsolvable. Immediate action is the panacea to problems that can be eliminated, and as for those problems beyond one's power to change, then change yourself and learn acceptance.\nApart from optimism, Navia finds tolerance to be a value that brings real improvement to one's quality of life, and it is a virtue that extends to the Spina. Why, look at all the varied business ventures, and the people of all sorts — indeed, even a Tent Tortoise calls the place home!\nIt is said that this creature was a friend of Callas's named Consigliere, roughly meaning "Counselor." Navia has also taken counsel with it in the past, finding it patient, quiet, and long-lived — just the sort of person you'd confide in. One day, Charlotte happened upon Navia babbling away to Consigliere, and out came her Kamera. The next thing anyone knew, many would come to speak to the Tent Tortoise on the picture's account. Navia herself would seek it out less from then on.\n"Others should have a chance to chat with Monsieur Consigliere too," she would say with a straight face. ｜ 娜维娅把枪和伞融为一体的初衷十分简单：她不想手里拿着太多东西，会影响她做别的事情。\n枫丹多雨水，雨过天晴后的太阳又总是毒辣，所以出门一定要带伞。枪对刺玫会的大小姐来说也是必不可少的，没人会觉得枪在娜维娅手中只是装饰吧？\n她的枪法算是吃百家饭学来的，她的原则是只要能打中目标就算把枪管架在膨膨兽身上也无所谓。\n受过训练、继承了逐影猎人枪术的克洛琳德对此连连摇头，嘴上却做出了肯定的评价：「你能如此乐观地对待战场，我很欣赏。」\n娜维娅就当她是在夸自己了。她在刚长成十几岁的大姑娘（自认为）时就认识了克洛琳德，早习惯了她说话的方式。真是恰如其分的赞美！娜维娅想。\n乐观的确是不可多得的心理素质，很多人即使刻意培养，也无法习惯用笑容面对生活中的困难，娜维娅却天生就有这样的能力。在她看来，世间的问题不过两种，能解决的和不能解决的。遇到可以消灭的麻烦就立即付诸行动，如果实在没有办法，就转变自己的状态去接受吧。\n除了乐观以外，娜维娅觉得包容也是非常有助于改善生活质量的优点。这个优点继承自刺玫会。你看，刺玫会不仅生意范围广，就连成员也形形色色，甚至还有只不知来自何方的玳龟呢！\n据说这只玳龟是卡雷斯先生的朋友，名叫康思戈，大意为「参谋」。娜维娅也和它聊过几次。它既有耐心，又很安静，还长寿，是绝佳的倾诉对象。不过在某一天娜维娅对着它絮絮叨叨的时候，夏洛蒂路过并举起了相机，以致于很多人在看过画片后都去烦那只玳龟了。在那之后，娜维娅便很少去找它了。\n「也要给其他人与康思戈先生聊天的机会。」娜维娅正色道。
- The main thing I've gotta do is keep reckless outsiders from disturbing the Iktomisaurs. Get on their bad side and their tempers are no joke, I'll tell you that. ｜ 主要是别让鲁莽的外人去打扰暝视龙们就好。龙要是闹起脾气来，可不是说着玩的。

- Peculiar fishes that look like a heart from the side, which are said to be related to bass. Their dorsal and ventral fins are comprised of flexible bones that are as slender as feathers, hence why researchers proposed the name "Heartfeather Bass."\n"Blazing Heartfeather Bass" have a unique coloration that shines like sunlight, making them extremely eye-catching in the water. This is said to be a special self-defense strategy which causes other fish that rely on their vision to mistake them for unknown burning objects, keeping potential predators away as a result. Contrary to their flaming appearance, they actually maintain a low body temperature and have a relatively modest food intake. Sometimes, they even go out of their way to stay in the shallows just to get some sunshine. ｜ 侧面样貌呈心形的奇特鱼类，据说与鲈鱼有着一定的亲缘关系，又因羽毛般细长软骨构成的背鳍和腹鳍，被学者们形象地命名为「心羽鲈」。\n得名「烘烘心羽鲈」的这种鱼类有着阳光般独特的色彩，在水中尤为醒目。相传这是一种另辟蹊径的自我保护方法，部分依赖视觉的鱼类会将它们看成「水中燃烧的不明物体」，避而远之。不过，与火热的外表恰恰相反的是，这类心羽鲈的体温较低，摄入的食物又相当之少，有时还会刻意待在浅水区域，晒晒太阳。

- "Coming, coming! Here's your Stir-Fried Filet! And your Mora Meat. And Fried Radish Balls, as you ordered."\nIn Liyue, there's a place called Chihu Rock, and there stands a restaurant known as Wanmin Restaurant.\nOne must remain focused if they want to keep moving forward on the bustling streets of Liyue.\nUnsuspecting newcomers to this place are often lured away by wonderful culinary aromas or lead to peek inside stores by curious sounds.\nXiangling, who is both chef and waitress at the restaurant, delivers steaming, delicious dishes to the tables.\n"Sit anywhere you'd like. I can make whatever you want, even if it's not on the menu!"\nThe workers at Wanmin Restaurant can recognize a regular, if not by their face, then by the first sentence out of their mouths.\nA customer that orders without needing a menu has been at least a few times before. However, if they ask "Is Xiangling the chef today?" then they're definitely a regular. ｜ 「来了来了，爆炒肉片一份！这是你的，『摩拉肉』。还有你的，秘制炸萝卜丸子。」\n璃月有块地方叫「吃虎岩」，「吃虎岩」有个饭馆叫「万民堂」。\n在这条人来人往的街道上，必须保持万分专注才能一心向前。\n初来乍到的旅人稍有不慎，就会被菜肴香气勾出馋虫，又或者按捺不下对这嗓音的好奇，探头望向店里。\n而香菱，「万民堂」的跑堂兼大厨，正往客桌上摆放热气腾腾的美食。\n「空着的位置可以随意坐。有什么想吃的，菜谱上没有我也能做！」\n对「万民堂」店员来说，平日判断来客是否「万民堂」熟客的办法，除了认脸，便是听他的第一句话。\n不用菜谱直接点菜的，一定来过不止一次；要是问出「今天香菱下厨吗」，就保准是个老道的饕客。

### Part 080

- Traveler ｜ 主角

- Recently, there's uneasiness in the air. So I'm praying to Barbatos. ｜ 最近蒙德城的风里带上了不安的气息，所以我在向巴巴托斯大人祈祷。

- A huge vine that has morphed into a monster through the conduction of high-voltage currents through the Ley Lines.\nElectricity surges constantly from its canopy like the unending rage of the earth itself.\nKshahrewar researchers once submitted that a complex circuit matrix might be set up around this creature to carry electrical energy to the city for use there. This plan was stridently opposed by scholars from Spantamad, who sacrificed 10 Shroomboars to drive home the point about the dangers of utilizing electricity. ｜ 汲取了地脉中传导的高压电流的巨大藤蔓形成的魔物。\n从树冠中源源不断释放出电力，如同发泄着大地的愤怒。\n曾经有妙论派的学者提出，如果围绕掣电树建立起一套复杂的电路矩阵，便能够将其中的电能输送到城市里使用。这一计划遭到了素论派学者的激烈反对，为此他们不惜牺牲了十头蕈猪以证明使用电力的危险性。

- For 10s after using <color=#FFD780FF>Hiyoku: Twin Blades</color>, a simplified automaton doll, "Kinu," will be summoned next to your active character every 3s. Kinu will attack nearby opponents, dealing <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color> equivalent to 170% of Tamoto's DMG. DMG dealt this way is considered Elemental Skill DMG.\nKinu will leave the field after 1 attack or after lasting 3s. ｜ 施放<color=#FFD780FF>二刀之形·比翼</color>后的10秒内，每3秒都将在当前场上自己的角色身边唤出一名简易自动制御人形「绢」。绢将对附近的敌人发起攻击，造成相当于袖170%的<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素范围伤害</color>，通过这种方式造成的伤害视为元素战技伤害。\n绢将在进行一次攻击或存在3秒后退场。
