- This deck box, which contains Cyno's Genius Invokation TCG deck, is his favorite physical possession.\nThe exterior of this deck box is wrapped with multiple layers of high-quality leather, and every seam has been carefully handled. As long as the rope fixed on the leather remains tightly tied, the entire deck box will be completely sealed, and not even a drop of water can get through. The interior is padded with silk, which can minimize the bending of card corners. According to the shop owner, the silk used was all imported from Liyue and made from top-quality Silk Flowers. This deck box even comes with a tough leather strap, so the buyer can easily affix the box to any part of their body. The surface of the deck box is even engraved with the Genius Invokation TCG emblem and the name of one who purchased it.\nCyno has put his strongest deck in this box. He believes that as long as he gets to duel with this deck, he will be nothing short of invincible.\nOf course, the next thing to do is to find a couple players who are willing to play against him.\nHmm... Would that Forest Watcher be available at the moment? ｜ 装有一套「七圣召唤」卡组的卡套是赛诺最为心爱之物。\n这个卡套的外部用多层上好的皮革包裹，每一条接缝都被小心地处理，只要捆紧皮革上的绳子，整个卡套就会完全密封，连一滴水也无法渗透进去。而内部则由丝绸铺垫，能最大程度地避免卡牌边角发生弯折，据店主说，这些都是从璃月进口，由霓裳花织就的上好丝绸。而这个卡套甚至还附带了一条坚韧的皮带，购买者可以很方便的将这个卡套固定在身上的任何位置。卡套的表面甚至还镌刻着「七圣召唤」的徽记和购买者的名字。\n赛诺将自己所构筑的最强卡组放在了这个卡套之中。赛诺相信，只要和这套卡组并肩作战，他就能战无不胜。\n接下来要做的，就是找几位愿意和他对决的牌友了。\n…也许，那位巡林官会有些空闲？

- Hold the Forward Button to instruct the onikabuto to charge up, and when you stop charging, it will dash forward. A complete charge will allow it to dash forward <color=#FFCC33>2 tiles</color>.\nIf, on completion of a dash, the Onikabuto's end point <color=#FFCC33>coincides perfectly with its opponent's position</color> and it hits them, it can perform a <color=#FFCC33>Piercing Strike</color>, dealing greater DMG. ｜ 长按前进按钮，可以指挥鬼兜虫蓄力，结束蓄力时，将突进较远距离，蓄力完全时，可以突进<color=#FFCC33>两个砖块</color>的距离。\n若完成突进时，鬼兜虫<color=#FFCC33>恰好抵达对手的位置</color>，击中了对手，即可施放一次<color=#FFCC33>「刺挑」</color>，造成更高的伤害。

- A stickleback with a fierce appearance and a manner to match. It will fight anyone and anything under the sea for food — a veritable and much-feared robber in red. Its fiery-red coloration seems to have much to do with Pyro, for while they cannot quite become flame generators, they do have some control over high temperatures. They can convert energy from their food and focus it on their dangerous snouts, making them underwater scoundrels indeed.\n"Need to drill wood to make a flame? This is your best friend." — Angler's Atlas, Akai Maou Chapter ｜ 外表凶恶、表里如一的凶猛棘鱼，为了争抢食物它们不忌讳攻击任何水下生物，是令人生畏的赤色悍匪。与生俱来的火红表皮似乎与火元素有着千丝万缕的联系，虽然没能让它们直接变成烈焰发生器，却仍然赋予了掌控高温的能力。它们能够转化食物中的能量，并将其集中在危险的尖吻上，这让它们成为不折不扣的水底混蛋。\n「钻木取火好帮手。」——《野钓手册·赤魔王篇》

- You should have a rest here. ｜ 你还是在这里休息一下比较好。

- Who are you? ｜ 你是？
- I once got injured when I was in this severely dangerous place and I got knocked unconscious. I really thought that was going to be the end of me. ｜ 我曾经在重重险境中受伤陷入过昏迷，本以为要完蛋了。
- Elder, Scions of the Canopy ｜ 悬木人长老
- Well, I just suddenly feel that what we went through just now is quite similar to our experience from that other year: it wasn't always smooth sailing, but we still made it in the end. ｜ 唔，就是突然觉得，这几天的经历和当年还挺像的吧，吵吵闹闹又磕磕碰碰的，不过好歹也还是把问题解决了。
- Joining your team would be like debuting on stage just before the curtains close. ｜ 让我加入你们的队伍，就像是邀我加入甫一登场就要谢幕的演出。
- Xavier, who is researching the Mikage Furnace, seems to have had some new idea... ｜ 研究着「御影炉心」的泽维尔似乎有什么新想法…
- Opposing sides establishing trust in cooperation... Now that's what I call, reliable plot development! ｜ 起初互有矛盾的双方，在并肩作战的过程中建立了信赖…这种展开真是百听不厌啊。
- Sunk the Waverider no more than 5 times ｜ 「浪船」损毁不超过5次
- Well, I wouldn't say so. On the contrary, those who drink coffee are dying to unburden themselves to a companion — if they were to get hold of you, you'd be here all day. ｜ 那倒不是，喝咖啡的人大多想有个说话的伴，而且表达欲旺盛着呢，您要是被他们拉着了，一时半会就脱不开身了。
- Oh no! My child! ｜ 天哪！我的孩子！
- Well, how about this, then? I'll move to the city and earn loads of Mora... and that'll give you the Mora to stay here and protect the village! ｜ 那这样吧！我负责到城里去，赚很多很多摩拉回来，然后你就有钱在家守护村子了，怎么样？
- Gamblers always place their bets on the next dice roll... But the bankers always have the last laugh, and they never touch a single die. ｜ 赌徒永远会把希望寄托在下一颗骰子上…但最后赚钱的，当然是从来不碰骰子的庄家。

- Wow, that's going to be quite the story. How about I give you a short introduction instead? ｜ 那可就说来话长了…我就给你简短介绍一下吧。
- By the way, I've been hoping to show you around the Grand Narukami Shrine when we get the chance. ｜ 说起来，我一直在想，有空得带你去鸣神大社看看。
- "From This Day On, We Shall Delight in New Life Together." ｜ 「自此以后，我们将共飨新生。」

A friend told me recently that she heard one nearby while she was {0}. - This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Magick Without Tears." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「欢荣的奇秘」。
- Some people work hard all day so that their families can have a hot meal on the table at night. ｜ 有人终日辛勤劳作，为的是一家人能在夜晚吃上热腾腾的饭菜。

- You would live on in a different fashion, in the admiration, memories... in the eyes of others. ｜ 就这样借助他人的憧憬与纪念，评价与凝视…以另一种方式活在众人中间。

- But... I'm not so sprightly anymore. ｜ 只是现在…恐怕有心无力啊。

- Tartaglia ｜ 达达利亚
- Yikes, thanks for the reminder! I would've forgotten all about it! ｜ 哦哦，多谢提醒，差点就忘记了！
- I only took one day off, but look how much dust has gathered. This is what I mean when I say cleaning is a daily chore. ｜ 才休息了一天，居然就积累了这么多灰尘，所以我才说每天都要打扫一遍才行。
- Hehe. Come on now, cut it with the nonsense. Give it up, or else! We're not leaving empty-handed... ｜ 嘿嘿…少废话，把宝贝交出来！兄弟们跟着你这么久，可不能白跑一趟！
- Then, we will banish the bad bugs gnawing on the Varuna Contraption's roots and heal it. ｜ 然后一起赶走啃噬法留纳神机的根的坏虫，治好法留纳神机。
- End of the Golden Realm ｜ 黄金邦国的结末
- So basically, every time we run into you, we have to go Temari-hunting... ｜ 所以只要碰见你，无论如何都要找手鞠对吧…
- About the bandit camp... ｜ 关于流寇营地…
- #Did you hear that, {NICKNAME} ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你听到了吗？
- I'm not really concerned about any of that. ｜ 不是很关心这个。
- No one wanted that kind of accident to happen. ｜ 发生那种意外，大家都不想的。
- Berrypuff ｜ 「呜呜葡萄」
- Battle-Hardened Tatankasaurus ｜ 历经百战的突角龙
- Witch's Flower of Blaze ｜ 魔女的炎之花
- Paimon's "Food Fund" ｜ 派蒙的「伙食小金库」
- On hit, Normal or Charged Attacks have a 50% chance to deal an additional <color=#99FFFFFF>300%</color> ATK DMG to opponents within a small AoE. Can only occur once every 15s. ｜ 普通攻击和重击命中时，有50%的概率对小范围内的敌人造成<color=#99FFFFFF>300%</color>攻击力的额外伤害。该效果每15秒只能触发一次。
- Aha! Well, at least one of you gets it! ｜ 哦——！果然还是你懂行嘛！
- Heavy Hit Taken: II ｜ 重受击·其二
- Reach the destination within the time limit. ｜ 在限定时间内抵达终点。
- The active character <color=#f39001>receives more DMG</color>; when they receive healing, call down <color=#f39001>Thunderstrikes</color> on nearby opponents that deal Electro DMG ｜ 当前场上角色<color=#f39001>承受的伤害提升</color>，当前场上的角色受到治疗时，将对附近多名敌人降下<color=#f39001>落雷</color>，造成雷元素伤害
- Salon Caritat Notice ｜ 卡朗代沙龙公告
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- But I can't guarantee how good the decks will be, hehe. ｜ 但是组出来的牌组究竟好不好用嘛…嘿嘿，那就不知道了。
- Plunge DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param9:F1P}
- Unlocked ｜ 已解锁
- Submerged Ruins: Central Quartier ｜ 水下城墟·中心区域
- Oh! Arabalika is already waiting for us over there. He's too quick... ｜ 啊！兰百梨迦已经在那边等我们了，他也太快了…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Did you set up this office just for me? Aw. That's so nice of you. ｜ 这是专门为我准备的办事处吗？你可真是用了心啊。
- I spend all my days out in the wild, among the flora. Fauna, on the other hand, are somewhat lacking in my life. ｜ 每天都在野外跟植物作伴，确实少了些动物的陪伴呢。
- But if someone does complain to the Akademiya, wouldn't it make Faruzan's situation more awkward? ｜ 可万一真有人去向教令院投诉，珐露珊前辈的处境，就更尴尬了吧？
- As such, I have been putting eyes and ears out ever since you reached Liyue... ｜ 所以，从你到璃月的第一天起，我就开始散出眼线…
- Hmm, I thought we would arrive at some familiar scene, but we seem to have landed in a completely unfamiliar place. ｜ 原本以为我们会来到某个熟悉的场景，但现在周围似乎都是陌生的风景。
- Close Shot ｜ 近景
- Reach the target location within %1% second(s) ｜ 在%1%秒内到达目的地
- Esnoir. It is nowhere near as frightening as you imagine. It's just a trip, that's all. ｜ 埃斯诺尔，这一切没有你想象的那么可怕，只是一场旅行，仅此而已。
- Character Story 5 ｜ 角色故事5
- The two of them went to Benoit Leroy's old house, if that's what you're asking. ｜ 他们两个去了伯努瓦的老房子，如果你们想知道的是这件事的话。
- Oh, you read it? Not that it matters, it's nothing confidential. ｜ 您看过了吗？没关系，不是什么重大的秘密。
- ATK Bonus|{param2:F1P} DEF ｜ 攻击力提高|{param2:F1P}防御力
- *chuckle* Paimon, don't worry, wearing a mask is optional... ｜ 派蒙，其实，面具也不是必须的哦…
- Fujin's Voice ｜ 浮锦的声音
- Ah, right. This is for you. Please consider it my thanks for your help. ｜ 辛苦你了，这些东西请你收下吧，就算是报酬了。
